Name: Waaree Group
Description: Founded in 1990, Waaree Energies Limited is India’s leading renewable energy company, driving the global transition to clean power. Headquartered in Mumbai, Waaree operates advanced manufacturing facilities with a total solar PV module capacity of ~22.77 GW worldwide and a solar cell capacity of (20.17 GW in India & 2.6 GW in USA). With a strong footprint across India and over 25 countries, Waaree offers a comprehensive portfolio spanning solar panels & inverters manufacturing, EPC services, green hydrogen solutions, battery energy storage systems, green energy infrastructure, and data centres. Committed to sustainability and innovation, Waaree delivers cutting-edge, cost-effective solutions to power a greener future.

Name: Soltec
Description:
Soltec is a global manufacturer and supplier of single-axis solar trackers with a global workforce of over 1.300 people blend experience of over 20 years with innovation. The company has manufacturing facilities in Brazil and Spain, as well as offices in Argentina, Australia, Denmark, Chile, Colombia, Egypt, Francia, Kenya, India, Israel, Italy, Mexico, Peru, and the United States. 

With a strong commitment to renewable energy and the environment, the company is dedicated to innovation, product standardization, and customer success.
Location: Molina de Segura, Región de Murcia

Name: Pertamina New & Renewable Energy
Description:
Pertamina New & Renewable Energy is a subholding of Pertamina whose task is to carry out activities such as the exploration and production of new and renewable energy sources (EBT) in an integrated manner, with its business scope covering the exploration and operation of geothermal work areas, geothermal power plants, gas power plants and development new and renewable energy. Several initiatives have been realized in the provision of clean energy which are implemented through Solar Power Plants (PLTS), Steam Power Plants (PLTU), Geothermal Power Plants (PLTP) and others. Pertamina New & Renewable Energy has been mandated to carry out Pertamina's energy transition since 2020. In 2021, Pertamina New & Renewable Energy seeks to realize the energy transition by collaborating with various strategic partners, both with Pertamina subholdings, between BUMNs, and with other strategic partners to realize Indonesia's energy transition and achieve the target of net zero emissions in 2060. In an effort to realize this target, there is a vision and mission of Pertamina New & Renewable Energy, namely, Energizing People and Planet With Green Energy and Leading Pertamina Energy Transition Towards Net Zero Emission.

Pertamina New & Renewable Energy (Pertamina NRE) carries the vision of “Energizing People and Planet with Green Energy,” reflecting its commitment to driving sustainable progress that empowers communities while preserving the environment. Guided by this vision, Pertamina NRE embraces its mission to lead the energy transition and become the regional leader in Low Carbon Solutions, Renewable Energy, and Future Green Business. Through continuous innovation and breakthrough initiatives, Pertamina NRE strives to create long-term value for stakeholders, positioning itself as a key driver in shaping a cleaner, greener, and more resilient energy future.

Name: Nextpower
Description: Nextpower (formerly Nextracker) designs, engineers, and delivers an advanced energy technology platform for solar power plants, innovating across structural, electrical, and digital domains. Our integrated solutions are designed to streamline project execution, increase energy yield and long-term reliability, and enhance customer ROI. Building on over a decade of technology and market leadership, the company delivers intelligent power generation systems and services to meet rapidly expanding global electricity demand. Nextpower partners with the world’s leading energy companies to power what’s next.

Name: BYD Energy Brasil
Description: Líder na comercialização de veículos elétricos no Brasil e consolidada na fabricação de tecnologia de energia solar, a BYD vem expandindo sua atuação no país, desde sua chegada em 2013. Compromissada em cuidar do planeta e investir na transição energética sem emissão de poluentes , a empresa possui em solo nacional fábricas de montagem de chassis de ônibus 100% elétricos e de produção de módulos fotovoltaicos, ambas em Campinas (SP). Tem também no Polo Industrial de Manaus (AM), uma unidade dedicada à produção de baterias de fosfato de ferro-lítio. Além disso, importa empilhadeiras, paleteiras, rebocadores e caminhões para o Brasil, todos 100% elétricos. Em novembro de 2021, começou a comercialização de automóveis de passeio no país e já conta com diversos modelos e uma rede consolidada de concessionárias em operação. No ano passado deu início ao projeto para a construção do Complexo de Camaçari, na Bahia, onde vai instalar a primeira fábrica de carros fora da Ásia. A companhia ainda é responsável por um projeto de SkyRail (monotrilho) na cidade de São Paulo (SP) (Linha 17 – Ouro do metrô). Eleita pela revista americana Times como uma das 100 empresas mais influentes do mundo, a BYD integra o Pacto Global das Nações Unidas (ONU), uma iniciativa que fornece diretrizes para a promoção do crescimento sustentável e da cidadania, por meio de lideranças corporativas comprometidas e inovadoras.

Name: EDF solutions solaires
Description:
EDF solutions solaires est une filiale à 100% du groupe EDF et leader de l'autoconsommation solaire chez les particuliers depuis plus de 20 ans. 

Nous concevons des solutions clé en main pour les particuliers, les professionnels et les collectivités. Jour après jour, nous accompagnons nos clients dans leur transition énergétique en leur proposant des solutions solaires personnalisées, performantes et innovantes. 

 Notre ambition : construire un monde où l’électricité est décentralisée en permettant à chacun de nos clients de devenir producteur de leur propre énergie durable, locale et décarbonée et de maîtriser leur consommation.

 EDF solutions solaires, ce sont des équipes présentes partout en France, dans 15 sites (agences et bases travaux) afin d'accompagner nos clients à chaque étape de leur projet solaire et durant toute la vie de leur installation photovoltaïque.

Aujourd’hui plus de 100 000 clients nous ont fait confiance, pourquoi pas vous ?

 Demandez-nous le soleil !

Name: Associação Brasileira de Energia Solar Fotovoltaica - ABSOLAR
Description:
Fundada em 2013, a Associação Brasileira de Energia Solar Fotovoltaica (ABSOLAR) é uma pessoa jurídica de direito privado sem fins lucrativos que congrega empresas de toda a cadeia produtiva do setor fotovoltaico (FV) com operações no Brasil. A ABSOLAR coordena, representa e defende os interesses de seus associados quanto ao desenvolvimento do setor e do mercado de energia solar fotovoltaica no Brasil, promovendo e divulgando a utilização da energia solar fotovoltaica no País.

Nossos principais objetivos:

1 - Representar e promover o setor fotovoltaico brasileiro no País e no exterior, perante o governo brasileiro, as demais entidades do setor elétrico brasileiro, a imprensa, ONGs, empresas e a sociedade civil.

2 - Acompanhar o avanço do setor fotovoltaico no País, produzindo informes e relatórios sobre a capacidade instalada e suas taxas de crescimento; divulgando aos membros da ABSOLAR as atuais oportunidades de negócio no setor (ex.: editais, projetos, leilões, entre outros) e divulgando para a sociedade brasileira projetos fotovoltaicos emblemáticos realizados no País.

3 - Servir de ponto de encontro e debate para as empresas do setor, por meio de reuniões estratégicas com autoridades e especialistas do setor, atividades desenvolvidas em nossos grupos de trabalho e assembleias e plenárias periódicas para os associados.

Name: ENGIE GREEN
Description:
Acteur de référence des énergies renouvelables en France, ENGIE Green est présent sur toute la chaîne de valeur :
développement, financement, ingénierie, construction, exploitation-maintenance, vente de l’énergie et démantèlement des installations éoliennes et solaires. Nos clients et parties prenantes associés à nos
600 collaborateurs constituent une communauté d’acteurs engagés pour un avenir énergétique durable et souverain. Notre méthode de développement et d’exploitation a fait l’objet d’une certification baptisée TED (Transition Énergétique Durable). Ce label garantit le déploiement de projets intégrés à leur territoire, respectueux de l’environnement et utiles à la diminution des émissions de carbone du mix énergétique français. En 2023,l’électricité produite par nos parcs a couvert la consommation électrique de plus de 3 millions d’habitants, et évité l’émission d’environ 3 millions de tonnes équivalent CO2. Au 1er janvier 2024, les parcs opérés par ENGIE Green représentent en puissance installée 2,5 GW éoliens et 1,9 GW solaire.

Name: Copec Flux
Description:
Energizamos el mundo de forma sustentable e inteligente  #CambiaTuEnergía
Somos una empresa chilena con más de 10 años de experiencia en la industria solar, especializada en proyectos de energía solar y eficiencia energética.

Nos encargamos del diseño, ingeniería, construcción y mantenimiento de proyectos solares, entregando soluciones integrales para impulsar un futuro más limpio.

Name: Zendure Maroc
Description: Zendure Morocco offers smart solar solutions tailored for residential use. Our systems adapt to balconies, façades, flat or sloped roofs, and enable households to produce and consume their own electricity, with or without battery storage. A green innovation, easy to install, to reduce your bills and carbon footprint.

Name: Waaree Renewable Technologies Ltd
Description:
Waaree Renewables Technologies Limited (WRTL), (Formally known as SANGAM RENEWABLES LIMITED) is a subsidiary company of Waaree Group and spearheading the Solar EPC business. Waaree Group has successfully installed 10000+ solar projects, with a total operating capacity of 600+ MW. We are also a solar developer that finances, constructs, owns, and operates solar projects. Headquartered in Mumbai, We operate across geographies, focusing on long-term investments within the commercial and industrial customer segments. This subsidiary was formed to tap into the growing renewable energy market.

Waaree group is a leading renewable energy company that caters to Individual, Industrial, and Commercial customers by encouraging them to adopt energy solutions that helps in reducing the release of carbon. We provide clean energy to our clients by setting up both on-site solar projects (rooftop and ground-mounted) and off-site solar farms (open-access solar plants).
Location: 504, Western Edge-I, Opp. Western Express Highway, Borivali (E), Mumbai - 400066., Maharashtra

Name: Husk Power
Description: Husk powers prosperity by delivering renewable electricity to unserved and underserved communities in the Global South. Its AI-enabled distributed energy resources (DER) platform serves three types of customers: communities, commercial & industrial (C&I) businesses and individual households. It offers flexible “pay-as-you-go” at the lowest cost and the fastest deployment. All Husk assets are grid interoperable, supporting national electrification efforts in Africa and Asia, where 2.5 billion people still live without reliable electricity. In 2024, Husk was named one of Fast Company’s 50 Most Innovative Companies in the World, ranking #24 overall, and #1 in the energy category. It was also named “World’s Best Challenger Brand” in the energy industry, and CEO Manoj Sinha was selected as a TIME 100 Most Influential Climate Leaders in Business.

Name: JAKSON SOLAR (Modules, Cells & Rooftop Solutions)
Description:
Welcome to Jakson Solar – Assurance of Best Quality Solar Modules manufactured at our 1.2 GW Manufacturing Facility at Greater Noida
We specialize in manufacturing High Quality, Durable & Dependable Solar Panels ranging from Mono-Facial, Bi-Facial & Topcon modules at our 1.2 GW state-of-the-art Module Manufacturing  facilities at Greater Noida that stands as a testament to our resilience and commitment to technological advancements
Jakson Solar is part of the Prestigious Jakson Group that has a legacy spanning over 77 years in the Energy and Infrastructure sector. 
Our mission is clear: to contribute significantly to India’s net-zero goal through renewable energy generation. We take immense pride in strengthening India’s solar power portfolio and empowering all segments of society, from large-scale commercial and industrial clients to small businesses and households. Our goal is to make solar energy accessible and approachable for everyone.
At Jakson Solar, we offer a sustainable future powered by solar energy. Join us on our mission to make the sun’s power available to all and be a part of the clean energy revolution.
Key Highlights
1.2 GW Module Manufacturing Capacity
In-House Design, Engineering, and R&D Facility
Pan-India Presence with Wide Sales & Service Support Network

Name: AFSIA (Africa Solar Industry Association)
Description:
The Africa Solar Industry Association (AFSIA) is a non-governmental solar trade organization. Our mission is to create a solar community in which all the stakeholders, from both the public and private sector, can come together and help grow the footprint of solar across the entire African continent. Our activities and publications aim to expand the awareness and applications of solar energy in the region, to strengthen the local solar industry, and to facilitate business opportunities for our members. 
Our reach covers the entire continent including the following countries:

Name: TrinaTracker
Description:
TrinaTracker is a leading provider of smart tracker solutions, operating under Trina Solar Co., Ltd. (SHA: 688599). We specialize in the development, manufacturing, engineering design, installation, and maintenance of solar trackers.
 
With over 20 years of experience in the solar mounting systems business, TrinaTracker is the only company in the photovoltaic industry to have R&D and engineering centers in both Europe and Asia. Our key products, including Vanguard 1P and Vanguard 2P, are complemented by our smart control system, featuring the SuperTrack algorithm and the Trina Smart Cloud platform, which significantly improve solar plant energy generation.
 
TrinaTracker operates multiple branches across China, APAC, the Middle East & Africa, Europe, Latin America & the Caribbean, and North America, providing global solutions. By the end of 2023, we had delivered over 20GW of mounting systems, spanning 700+ projects in more than 60 countries, with a global tracker production capacity exceeding 10GW annually.

Name: Artha Energy Resources
Description:
Artha Energy Resources (AER) is at the forefront of the renewable energy revolution in India, with a particular focus on developing the rooftop solar industry. As a leading renewable energy developer, our mission is to develop 1GW of rooftop solar assets annually by 2030, contributing to a sustainable and cleaner future. 

At AER, we pride ourselves on being a vertically integrated organization covering every aspect of solar energy, including Power Generation, Engineering, Procurement and Construction (EPC), Operations and maintenance (O&M), Software solutions, Asset Performance Management, and Financing. This comprehensive approach allows us to deliver innovative and cost-efficient systems that drive higher Return on Investment for owners.

Our passion for renewable energy and commitment to excellence has positioned us as a key player in transforming India's energy landscape. We are dedicated to harnessing the sun's power to power thousands of factories, making India's manufacturing base carbon-efficient and sustainable.

Join us in our journey towards building a greener planet, one rooftop at a time.

Name: X-ELIO
Description: X-ELIO: global leader in the development of renewable energy projects. With 20 years of experience and over 3 GW built, we drive our #PositiveEnergy to play a key role in the transition of businesses and communities to a sustainable future. We continue advancing toward a global business model based on responsibility for the planet and its inhabitants.

Name: Sono Solar
Description:
VISION 
We believe in mobility free from fossil fuels. It is our mission to accelerate the transition towards sustainable mobility by making every vehicle solar.

Name: Sono Motors
Description:
VISION 
We believe in mobility free from fossil fuels. It is our mission to accelerate the transition towards sustainable mobility by making every vehicle solar.

SOCIAL MEDIA 
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sonomotors/
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/SonoMotors
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sono_motors/

Name: Bright Inc
Description:
Bright accelerates the energy transition for industries in Mexico with tailored solar and storage solutions.
We design flexible, intelligent financing models that help companies reduce operating costs, strengthen competitiveness, and achieve their sustainability (ESG) goals.

With over 43 MW installed and 6,000 clients, we transform energy into a strategic advantage through:

Solar PPAs and leasing schemes
Solar and energy storage systems (BESS)
24/7 monitoring and management technology

Our investors and partners include the IFD, Inter-American Development Bank, Y Combinator, JB Straubel, Daniel Servitje, and Silicon Valley leaders who support our vision: a sustainable and accessible energy future for emerging markets.

Bright: Smart energy to grow your industry

Name: Fotowatio Renewable Ventures (FRV)
Description:
We are world leaders in providing comprehensive renewable energy solutions. 

For more than 15 years, we have striven to surpass the limitations of conventional energy value chains, developing innovative utility-scale renewable energy solutions.

Today, FRV has moved from a pure PV utility-scale developer to a renewable energy Independent Power Producer (IPP).
 
We are strengthening our commitment with investment in infrastructure and innovation, exploring new technologies, new business models and even newer ways of thinking with our specialist team FRV-X, to create breakthrough solutions along the ‘New Energy’ value chain.

Name: AXS Energia
Description:
A AXS é mais que energia solar: somos um movimento por um futuro sustentável. 
Com nossos planos de assinatura, qualquer pessoa ou empresa pode economizar na conta de luz e, ao mesmo tempo, fazer parte da transição energética. 
Juntos, estamos mostrando que #ÉFácilSerSolar.
 Siga a AXS Energia e venha se inspirar com a revolução solar.

Name: WE Sol
Description:
WESol, a brand of Warranium Energy Group, is a leading engineering and distributed energy company providing low carbon energy solutions to industrial and commercial customers with headquarters in the New Delhi, India. Warranium Energy is named as ‘Warranium Energy Private Limited’. 

WESol provides clean energy to its clients by setting up both on-site solar projects (rooftop and ground-mounted) and off-site solar farms.

Warranium Energy was founded on the belief that the built environment can change people’s lives for the better. Every day, everywhere, we strive to meet this aim – helping clients solve their biggest challenges by harnessing our diverse skills and constantly expanding what’s technically possible.

We are a creative team of energy consultants, engineers, designers, technicians, and strategic thinkers who are passionate about utilising solar energy. We are determined to conceptualise, design, and deliver solutions that fit the client’s unique needs.

#WarraniumEnergy #WESol #WECareForNEXT #Warranium

Name: Nexamp
Description: Nexamp is leading the transformation to the new energy economy with proven solutions for the deployment and operation of solar energy assets.  Our comprehensive capabilities span the entire solar project lifecycle – from project development, design and construction, through financing, operations, and maintenance.  Our integrated, best-in-class solutions make solar energy simple and profitable for our clients and partners and make an impact every day. With a rapidly expanding network of property owners, businesses, communities, and residents benefitting from our growing portfolio of solar assets across the US, Nexamp is laying the groundwork for a cleaner, more secure energy future.

Name: Enerparc Energy
Description:
Enerparc India, part of Enerparc AG, Germany, is headquartered in Bengaluru. 

We specialize in investment and EPC services for rooftop and ground-mounted solar PV systems, focusing on the Industrial & Commercial segments.

Globally, ENERPARC leads in developing, engineering, building, and operating large-scale PV systems. We've connected over 4,700 MW of solar systems to grids globally, delivering projects with speed, flexibility, and quality.

We specialize in designing world class PV systems!

Name: Avaada Electro
Description:
Avaada Electro, the manufacturing arm of Avaada Group, is a global leader in solar PV module and cell production, dedicated to delivering high-quality, precision-engineered, and sustainable solar solutions. With state-of-the-art facilities of module production and solar cell capacity, Avaada Electro is setting new global benchmarks for efficiency, reliability, and performance.

By leveraging cutting-edge manufacturing, R&D innovation, and vertical integration, Avaada Electro is helping accelerate the global transition to clean, affordable, and sustainable energy.

Name: EIDF
Description:
EIDF es una empresa de ámbito nacional especializada en instalaciones de energía fotovoltaica, actuando con un operador integrado en el sector energético. Su actividad de negocio se desglosa en tres áreas: autoconsumo industrial, generación y comercialización. 

En el área de autoconsumo cuenta con más de una década de experiencia en el diseño y ejecución de proyectos fotovoltaicos para el sector empresarial.  Ofrece servicios de ingeniería, consultoría e instalación a través de proyectos llave en mano que incluyen todas las fases:

- Estudio de viabilidad (informe técnico y económico)
- Proyecto de ingeniería
- Asesoramiento técnico
- Mantenimiento
- Tramitación 

Su sede central se ubica en Pontevedra (Galicia) y cuenta con once delegaciones comerciales repartidas por todo el territorio español.

Ha ejecutado más de 2.200 instalaciones de autoconsumo en España para empresas de diferentes sectores y tamaños que suman una potencia de 450 MW. 

El área de Generación fue impulsada en 2020 con el objeto de desarrollar parques fotovoltaicos para explotación propia. La energía generada será destinada a la unidad de comercialización de la compañía. 

Desde julio de 2021 cotiza en la Bolsa española (BME Growth). 

¿Quieres saber más sobre nosotros? Entra en nuestra página web

Name: Pahal Solar
Description:
Pahal Solar is a high-performance solar PV module manufacturer and solar EPC contractor in India. We are not only dedicated to meet the needs of C&I and residential clients adopting solar energy, but are actively contributing to the country’s energy transition and climate objectives.

Pahal Solar manufacture superior-quality mono crystalline solar panels and N Type Topcon solar panels in our top-of-the-line solar manufacturing facility.

Name: Aldo Solar
Description:
A Aldo Solar completa 40 anos em 2022. A história da empresa se inicia em 1982, fundada por Aldo Pereira Teixeira em Maringá, no Paraná. Hoje, conta com aproximadamente 180 funcionários, que se orientam pelos valores e compromissos divulgados pela diretoria da empresa. A ALDO também destaca-se em investimentos, em infra-estrutura, treinamentos, responsabilidade social, esportes e no melhor atendimento com agilidade para os seus mais de 16.000 clientes.

Possui certificação ISO 9001 desde 2009 para todos os processos de industrialização e distribuição autorizada de produtos. Também consta no Ranking 1000 Melhores & Maiores da Revista Exame e possui nota máximo DUNS em avaliação de crédito.

Atualmente é parceira de negócios de várias empresas mundialmente conhecidas como HP, Microsoft, Intel, IBM, ACER, Gateway, Kingson, Belkin, entre outras. Inserida ativamente no processo "Brasil Originalmente Legal", dá sustentação aos seus parceiros e oferece suporte integral aos clientes quando o assunto é planejamento tributário, pois ensina revendas e fornecedores a respeito desse assunto. Atua fortemente na mudança de percepção dos envolvidos a respeito da importância da origem, procedência e qualidade dos produtos. Desenvolve também vários projetos de cidadania e responsabilidade social, envolvendo todos os seus parceiros nisso.

Name: SolarPACES
Description: SolarPACES is an international cooperative network bringing together teams of national experts from around the world to focus on the development and marketing of Concentrating Solar Power (CSP) systems (also known as solar thermal power systems). It is one of a number of collaborative programs, called Technology Collaboration Programmes, managed under the umbrella of the International Energy Agency to help find solutions to worldwide energy problems.

Name: Oorjan Cleantech
Description:
Oorjan is a technology-enabled distributed solar company in India, serving residential, commercial, and industrial end users. We offer turn-key projects, including funding solutions, to consumers. Our comprehensive offering features premium solar products from international brands, easy financing options, seamless installations, and hassle-free maintenance. Through partnerships with banks and private investors, Oorjan offers diverse financing choices to consumers, including loans under Capex, Opex, BOOT, and PPA (Power Purchase Agreement).

Oorjan possesses proprietary technology for site assessment, proposal creation, and IoT-based remote monitoring. This technology provides real-time and historical generation and savings data, along with proactive maintenance alerts. We have licensed these tools to over 20 installers across India.

In a short span, Oorjan has garnered more than 5000 customers across 22 states and has emerged as one of India's fastest-growing technology-driven companies.

The company is co-founded by three IIT Mumbai (and ISB / Stanford / Berkeley) alumni with experiences across renewable energy, engineering, EPC, finance, and building large businesses.

Name: SolarVolt
Description:
A SolarVolt é uma empresa especializada no desenvolvimento de soluções e projetos completos de micro e mini-geração distribuída de energia solar fotovoltaica.

Nossa equipe conta com profissionais experientes e qualificados com conhecimento de toda a cadeia de valor da indústria e da regulamentação brasileira mais atual.

Além disso, nossas parcerias estratégicas com fornecedores internacionais nos possibilitam oferecer aos clientes soluções inovadoras e eficientes.

Executamos a análise de viabilidade, elaboramos os projetos básicos e executivos, fornecemos e instalamos os equipamentos e preparamos a documentação completa para registro na concessionária de energia local!

Para garantir o perfeito funcionamento do sistema fotovoltaico, a SolarVolt monitora a geração e identifica as eventuais necessidades de manutenção.

Name: Enlight Mexico
Description:
En Enlight la pasión por la tecnología y el medio ambiente se unen. La energía que consumen nuestros clientes es más limpia, cuesta menos y viene acompañada de un excelente servicio e información oportuna sobre su uso.  
Estamos creciendo junto con un equipo de mentes brillantes y de alto desempeño. Nuestra cultura de trabajo se basa en la confianza, la responsabilidad y el cumplimiento de metas. Aquí, las buenas ideas pesan más que la edad o el estatus, el hacer y ejecutar es más valorado que el perfeccionismo.  

Con 7 años en la industria y más de 2,500 clientes satisfechos, estamos creciendo a un ritmo de 50% cada trimestre y hemos sido reconocidos como una de las empresas más prometedores y relevantes en el sector de energía solar en México.  Enlight está en la cresta de la ola de la increíble transformación que se está viviendo en el sector energético de México. En Agosto 2015 recibimos una inversión por parte de ALL VP, uno de los fondos de riesgo más innovadores en México. En febrero de 2017, hemos recibido una segunda ronda de inversión por parte de la más grande empresa generadora de energía del mundo, Engie, dándonos una gran oportunidad de crecimiento a nivel nacional e internacional. Estamos listos para dar nuestros siguientes pasos… y rápido.

Estamos buscando nuevos miembros en nuestro equipo que quieran un lugar en primera fila para vivir y participar en el cambio de paradigma de la red eléctrica de México. Queremos crecer el equipo con individuos que estén buscando un gran reto, que ponga a prueba sus capacidades de innovar, de trabajar con intensidad, de ser líder, de ser parte de la construcción de una empresa que está cambiando el estatus quo en México.

Name: LONGi Asia-Pacific
Description:
LONGi, founded in 2000, is a world leading solar technology organization. The company has had a long-term, unswerving commitment to monocrystalline technology, convinced, rightly, that its general adoption would bring about significant technological change for the whole PV industry. 

With 15 manufacturing bases and more than 30 branches around the world, LONGi produces monocrystalline silicon wafers and modules, delivering solutions for distributed and ground mount power station systems, promoting the development of the global PV industry and driving energy transformation. The company’s shipments have been among the industry’s highest for a number of years and, in 2020, it became the first manufacturer to ship more than 20GW of modules in a year.
 
LONGi’s ongoing high investment in R&D is a significant contributory factor in its success and the company has been rapidly applying new technologies and processes to large-scale production, making important advances in cost control and efficient product innovation.

In 2020, LONGi became the first Chinese solar energy company to join the RE100, EV100 and EP100 initiatives, set up to promote zero-carbon solar and sustainable development

Name: Svea Solar
Description: Svea Solar is digitalising energy. We have made it our business to shift the planet away from dirty energy towards renewable power. This is where we can make a difference – and we have only started our journey. We believe that good things will happen when people own their power.

Name: Portal Solar
Description:
The 1st and largest Solar Energy portal in Brazil is now a Franchise! 

We are a company focused in photovoltaic solar energy, part of Grupo Votorantim. 

We work to democratize access to solar photovoltaic information and projects, and we do this by helping consumers understand photovoltaic technology, training the best suppliers and implementing systems with the best possible products in the market, all thru our Franchises.

www.portalsolar.com.br

Name: TENERGIE
Description:
Fondé en 2008, au cœur de la région PACA, Tenergie est un producteur indépendant d’énergies renouvelables : nos 500 centrales solaires et éoliennes ont produit plus de 250 GWh en 2017 soit l’équivalent de la consommation électrique de moyenne de 50 000 foyers (hors chauffage).

Nous avons pour ambition d’aider les territoires dans leur transition énergétique : nous accompagnons les entreprises et les collectivités territoriales dans la création de centrales d’énergies renouvelables, à chaque étape, de la conception à l’exploitation. 

Nous développons nos projets sur tous types de supports : serres, hangars agricoles, centrales au sol, ombrières de parking, toitures. Acteur engagé, nous avons le souci constant de valoriser les lieux d’implantation. 

Si vous aussi vous souhaitez vivre l’aventure des énergies renouvelables, que vous souhaitez intégrer une entreprise à taille humaine favorisant la prise d’initiative, avec une ambiance de travail décontractée et exigeante, rejoignez-nous !

Name: Enerland
Description:
Enerland nace en España en el año 2007 con el objetivo de ser líder del mercado solar fotovoltaico internacional, proporcionando soluciones Llaves en Mano a sus clientes en cualquier país del mundo.

En la actualidad, Enerland desarrolla, construye, opera y mantiene plantas solares en países tan diversos como España, Italia, Portugal, Polonia, México, El Salvador, Colombia, Costa Rica, Túnez o Filipinas a través de sus compañías internacionales.

ÁREAS DE NEGOCIO

DESARROLLO DE PROYECTOS
Enerland desarrolla proyectos desde las primeras etapas, cómo la búsqueda del suelo, hasta que el proyecto está totalmente listo para construir, aportando cuando es necesario los PPAs.

EPC
Nuestra compañía ha construido y puesto en marcha plantas solares bajo la modalidad EPC desde el año 2007, asumiendo todo el proceso de ingeniería, contratación y construcción.

OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE
Enerland mantiene todas las plantas solares que ha construido, así como plantas de nuevos clientes.
Su centro de monitorización 24 x 7 y un equipo técnico especializado, garantiza un rendimiento óptimo de las plantas solares.

Name: Neosolar Energia
Description:
Empresa pioneira e inovadora, em rápido crescimento em um dos mercados mais promissores do país.
 
Especialista em enegia solar fotovoltaica, entrega soluções completas em todo o Brasil
 
Buscamos profissionais com perfil empreendedor em busca de grandes desafios e desenvolvimento.


A Neosolar Energia é uma empresa brasileira especialista em Energia Solar Fotovoltaica e atua desde 2010 em todo o território nacional, sendo uma das pioneiras no país.

A missão da Neosolar é promover o uso da Energia Solar Fotovoltaica no Brasil através de quatro grandes pilares:
- Comercialização de equipamentos e soluções completas, prontas para o uso.
- Serviços de engenharia que atendam as necessidades específicas de cada cliente através do desenho e implementação de soluções customizadas.
- Formação técnica de mão de obra especializada na engenharia, instalação e manutenção de sistemas fotovoltaicos.
- Disponibilização de informação que facilite e estimule o uso da energia solar, desde o projeto até a instalação e geração da energia.

Name: LIVOLTEK
Description:
LIVOLTEK is one of the leading solar product manufacturers and service providers worldwide. As a member company of Hexing Group, which is established in 1992 and listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange (603556) in 2017, we have a natural advantage in the smart grid and new energy industry of more than 90 countries, with global supply chain cutting edge technology and service network. 

LIVOLTEK Power is committed to providing high-quality solar power for global customers covering residential, commercial, and industrial scenarios. Our comprehensive portfolio includes grid-tied inverters, off-grid inverters, hybrid inverters, battery inverters, storage batteries, EV chargers, and smart field device management systems (Web and APP) for remote management and expertise diagnosis.

LIVOLTEK focuses on green energy innovation and is dedicated to providing people with better quality, more efficient, and more economical energy use experience. We are your trustworthy solar partner to deliver professional, responsive services and create sustainable customer value.

Thank you for your interest in LIVOLTEK. We hope you enjoy your time on our homepage!

Contact Email: info@livoltek.com

Name: 3P Energia
Description:
Na 3P Energia, formamos uma equipe de engenheiros altamente especializados dedicados a projetar e implementar soluções de geração de energia solar. Nossos princípios fundamentais giram em torno da confiabilidade, excelência técnica e um profundo respeito por nossos clientes. Orgulhosamente conduzimos nossas operações com equipes internas, cujos membros passam por um rigoroso treinamento em projetos e instalações. Além disso, selecionamos exclusivamente as mais renomadas marcas de equipamentos disponíveis no mercado de energia solar.
Com um histórico sólido de mais de 1.000 instalações bem-sucedidas, nós estabelecemos como uma das principais referências no setor de energia solar nas regiões Norte/Nordeste do país. Apenas recentemente, fomos honrados com a escolha do Grupo Neoenergia para liderar mais de 600 instalações residenciais em todo o estado da Bahia.

Na 3P Energia, nossa missão é proporcionar soluções de energia limpa e renovável, com foco incansável na entrega de performances de alta qualidade e, ao mesmo tempo, contribuir significativamente para a preservação do meio ambiente. Estamos à disposição para transformar sua residência ou empreendimento em um espaço mais sustentável e eficiente. Acreditamos firmemente que, juntos, podemos trilhar um caminho rumo a um futuro energético mais responsável e ecologicamente equilibrado.

Name: Gensol Engineering Limited
Description:
Established in 2012, Gensol Engineering Limited, the flagship company within the Gensol Group, specialises in engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) services, focusing on the solar power sector. Boasting a robust team of over 240 professionals, Gensol has demonstrated expertise in executing turnkey projects globally, having installed both ground-mounted and rooftop solar installations totaling more than 700 MW. Venturing beyond solar, Gensol has established a state-of-the-art electric vehicle (EV) production facility in Pune, India, dedicated to crafting electric three-wheelers and four-wheelers. Gensol EV have received approval from the Automotive Research Association of India (ARAI). In pursuit of revolutionising India's EV landscape, Gensol not only manufactures but also provides comprehensive EV leasing solutions, catering to a diverse clientele that includes PSUs, educational institutions, government entities, multinational corporations, ride-hailing services, employee transport companies, rental services, logistics, and last-mile delivery enterprises. Recently, Gensol acquired Scorpius Trackers, an innovative and world-class bankable solar tracking technology company primarily engaged in the design, development, marketing, and servicing of single-axis trackers for solar power generation, to enhance its offerings in the renewable energy sector.

In a short time, we become one of India’s leading Solar O&M player with marquee clients such as Delhi International Airport, Suzlon, Greenko, and Essel Infra.

Name: EF Solare Italia
Description:
Con più di 300 impianti e una capacità installata di 1,2 gigawatt, EF Solare Italia è un primario operatore di fotovoltaico in Europa. Si posiziona come leader industriale e tecnologico del settore ed è protagonista attivo del percorso di transizione energetica nazionale ed europeo attraverso l’eccellenza operativa, l’innovazione, lo sviluppo di nuovi impianti e la valorizzazione dei propri asset. 
EF Solare Italia opera attivamente da oltre 10 anni anche nel settore agrivoltaico, grazie ai 32 MW di serre fotovoltaiche ed allo sviluppo di un innovativo modello elevato ad utilizzo di terreno nullo. In quanto pioniere italiano dell’agrivoltaico, EF Solare è partner del progetto di ricerca europeo “Symbiosyst” che, selezionato e finanziato da Horizon Europe, ha l’obiettivo di progettare e sviluppare modelli scalabili per accrescere la competitività del settore in Europa. 
Partendo dal dialogo costante con enti, imprese, università e comunità locali, EF Solare crea sinergie volte a promuovere uno sviluppo virtuoso del fotovoltaico, sempre più integrato con l’ambiente, la biodiversità ed il territorio in cui opera.
Il 2 dicembre 2025, EF Solare Italia è entrata a far parte del Gruppo Sorgenia. Si crea una piattaforma industriale con oltre 6 GW di potenza installata, di cui più di 940 MW di capacità fotovoltaica in esercizio in Italia ed una pipeline di oltre 5 GW di nuovi progetti rinnovabili e sistemi di accumulo tra Italia e Spagna.

DEPCOM Power, a Koch Engineered Solutions Company, is a leading solar energy solutions partner providing  Development Support, Engineering, Procurement & Construction (EPC) Operations and Maintenance (O&M), Energy Storage, and Repowering + services.  DEPCOM Power leverages a highly experienced team of solar industry veterans, the best module technology available, the most cost efficient Balance of System (BoS) components and industry best-in-class business practices to provide high quality, high production, and cost effective energy solutions.

DEPCOM believes in hiring U.S. Veterans, buying American-made solar products and investing in the communities where we build solar. To date, DEPCOM has donated more than $7 Million dollars to outreach organizations supporting the impoverished, veteran initiatives, education and community solar projects. 

The company was founded in 2013, and currently has offices in Scottsdale, AZ, Bedminster, NJ, Pelham, AL and Pleasanton, CA.

Name: Technique Solaire
Description:
Technique Solaire is a French independent renewable energy producer. The group produces renewable energy by deploying solar photovoltaic and biogas infrastructures in France and internationally. Founded in 2008, it acts as a catalyzer of both the energy and agricultural transitions. The group’s ambition is to decarbonize the economy and contribute to the sustainable development of territories. With over 260 employees, the group operates 700 MWp of photovoltaic power plants in France, Spain, India, and the Netherlands, as well as 3 biogas production units in France. It is aiming to produce 4 GWp of solar energy and 4,900 Nm3/h of biogas production by 2030. 

For any queries, please contact us at contact@techniquesolaire.com
Visit our website at www.techniquesolaire.com/en/

Name: Harbor Solar
Description:
Harbor provides innovative home energy solutions that not only put money back in your pocket but also dramatically reduce your carbon footprint.

Why Harbor?

With Harbor, the solar process has never been more hassle-free. Reach out to us and we’ll arrange a visit from one of our expert Energy Consultants to walk you through the entire process. They will carry out your complimentary solar assessment, inspect your rooftop, and ensure you’re an ideal candidate to pocket some serious savings with a brand-new solar system. They’ll answer your questions, break down the investment, and lay out the entire process in a way that’s easy to understand.

Harbor’s Process:

It's a simple process that only requires your utility bill to get started.

Step 1 : Collect Your Utility Bill 
Step 2 : Review Custom Proposals & Select Best One For Your Home 
Step 3 : Design, Permit, and Apply for Interconnection 
Step 4 : Installation 
Step 5 : Power On 
Step 6 : Start Producing Clean Energy

Harbor Solar is an industry leader in smart, sustainable, and cost-effective energy solutions for your home. For years, we’ve provided top-notch service for homeowners looking to save, partnering with only the best install teams in the nation. With a commitment to educating and empowering homeowners throughout the solar process, it’s no accident that Harbor Solar is a fast growing company and has a sterling A+ accreditation with the Better Business Bureau!

Name: Greenbeam
Description:
Greenbeam Earth Private Limited is a leading B2B provider of sustainable energy solutions and a proud part of the diversified 38-year-old Rawalwasia Group. With our head office in Surat, Gujarat, we bring decades of expertise from various sectors including Textiles, Coal Trading, and Renewable Energy.

Our journey began in 1987 with polyester yarn manufacturing, and over the years, we expanded into yarns, fabrics, and coal trading. In 2015, we ventured into coal trading, importing shiploads of coal from Indonesia, now operating across 10+ ports in India.

Recognizing the rising energy costs faced by industries, we launched Greenbeam Earth in 2021 to offer viable solar power solutions. We specialize in turnkey solar solutions, solar park development, and commercial & industrial solar projects, ensuring long-term energy efficiency for businesses. With comprehensive project management and maintenance services, we help industries hedge against rising power costs and achieve sustainability goals.

At Greenbeam Earth, we are committed to delivering eco-friendly energy solutions that not only reduce carbon footprints but also offer significant cost savings over time.

Name: ENERBRAS - Energias Renováveis
Description:
A ENERBRAS foi a primeira empresa de Energia Solar Fotovoltaica de todo o Nordeste.

Somos uma empresa brasileira, sediada em Natal/RN, que atua com o desenvolvimento, gestão de projetos, implantação, operação e manutenção de Usinas Solares Fotovoltaicas. 

Temos um papel de pioneirismo e de relevância na indústria fotovoltaica, contando com o suporte da qualidade técnica e know-how adquiridos durante 15 anos de atuação internacional, somados aos 10 anos da presença da empresa no Brasil, que foi fundada em 2012.

Somos especializados em soluções completas para projetos EPC (Engineering, Procurement and Construction), que contemplam o desenvolvimento da engenharia, fornecimento de equipamentos e construção de Usinas Fotovoltaicas de qualquer porte, sempre prezando pela qualidade e garantia dos equipamentos utilizados, todos de origem européia.

Nossa experiência permite que a ENERBRAS garanta aos clientes a segurança e confiança no acompanhamento de cada fase dos processos. 

Até o momento, a ENERBRAS já participou da implementação de mais de 10MW de energias renováveis do Sergipe ao Ceará, prezando sempre pela qualidade de vida da atual geração e gerações futuras, cuidando ao mesmo tempo do meio ambiente.

Name: JinenU Solar/晶优光伏
Description:
Founded in 2020, JinenU Solar Group (JinenU) focuses on customized manufacturing of solar modules, offering high-efficient and stable solar products and customized services for global partners.

Name: Fusion Electrics

Competitive prices

Name: PVRADAR
Description:
Project developers of large-scale PV projects need to deliver world-class performance and reliability to their investors.

PVRADAR is a software platform for transparent assessment of soiling and snow related performance losses, optimization of cleaning strategies and modeling of economic scenarios. 

We believe the solar industry needs to achieve world class reliability: Underperformance could hold the sector back, at the very time when it needs to accelerate. 

This is why PVRADAR gives project developers the tools to quantify lifetime risks and find cost-optimal solutions starting on the first day of development: assess soiling losses based on satellite data, select a cost-optimal cleaning strategy from dozens of alternatives in our database, simulate bifacial gain improvements from the use of albedo enhancing materials. 

PVRADAR's team brings together PV engineer, with industry experience and software developers.

Name: Solar Energy Group

Name: Inicio
Description:

Grâce à un algorithme basé sur la reconnaissance d'image, nous détectons les terrains à fort potentiel. Nos équipes se rendent ensuite sur place pour évaluer techniquement la viabilité d'un projet solaire. Enfin, lorsque toutes les conditions sont remplies, nous identifions le développeur idéal vis-à-vis du contexte local.

À travers Inicio, nous allions tech, échange humain et gestion de projet pour répondre aux défis d'aujourd'hui.

Name: Okra Solar
Description:
700 million people still live without access to clean, reliable electricity. At Okra Solar, our mission is to unlock opportunities through energy access for everyone in the world by providing cutting-edge mesh-grid technology to energy companies servicing the last mile.

We are a B2B technology provider that enables energy developers to energize off-grid communities profitably and at scale. By pioneering mesh-grid technology, we bridge the gap between low-power solar home systems and high-cost centralized mini-grids.

The Hub & Spoke Model

We utilize a smart "cluster" model to reach every household in a community:
Hubs (Okra Sprout): Rugged, pre-wired enclosures designed for productive-use users. They provide up to 3.6kW AC output to power businesses like mills, stores, and freezers.
Spokes (Okra Leaf): An ultra-low CAPEX smart meter that enables developers to reach the lowest-consuming households profitably. It provides 150W AC power for essential needs like lights, fans, and phone charging.
OkraNet: A reliable wireless mesh communications solution built on the Wi-SUN protocol. It allows hundreds of homes to connect to the cloud via a single Beacon gateway, slashing data costs by up to 90%.

Our Harvest platform provides mission control for mesh-grid projects. It features automated issue detection, remote billing, and appliance financing and more to maximize project ROI.

Nos enorgullece ser distribuidores oficiales en Chile de los principales fabricantes de la industria fotovoltaica: Huawei, Fronius, Victron, entre otros. Así como Paneles Solares Trina Solar.

Garantizamos los más altos estándares de calidad, durabilidad y respaldo del fabricante en todo momento, lo que permite que la relación con nuestros clientes se fortalezca ya que ofrecemos rápida respuesta  y un servicio post-venta global en la ejecución de sus proyectos de energía solar.

Name: Core Energy Solar
Description:
Homeowners are feeling frustrated every month because they’re forced to pay astronomical prices to their utility company. At Core Energy Solar, we save you that frustration with a solar panel system that will power your home, save you money, and pay for itself, giving you the freedom to spend your money the way you want to!

Name: Fronius İstanbul
Description:
Fronius, 1945 yılında Pettenbach, Avusturya’da Günter Fronius tarafından küçük bir atölyede kurularak, akü şarj cihazları üretmeye başlamıştır. Ardından kaynak transformatörleri üretimine de girerek, 1950 yılında mıknatıslı boyunduruk ayarına sahip ilk kaynak transformatörünü piyasaya sürmüştür. 1992 yılında Solar Enerji sektörüne de girerek, günümüzde Akü Şarj Teknolojileri, Kaynak Teknolojileri ve Solar Enerji alanlarında, üç ayrı departman olarak faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir. 
Dünyanın bir çok yerinde faaliyet gösteren Fronius'un dünyada 36 uluslararası Fronius firması ve 60’tan fazla ülkede de Satış Partneri / Temsilcileri bulunmaktadır. 1.300'ten fazla aktif patenti ve dünyada toplamda 8000'den fazla çalışanı bulunan Fronius'un başarısının sırrı: Araştırmacı ve sürekli yeni, yaratıcı çözümler arayışı ile teknoloji lideri olarak kabul edilerek, her üründe mükemmel verimliliği hedeflemesidir. 
Fronius, Türkiye'de 1986 yılından beri faaliyet göstermekte olup, 2007’de irtibat ofisi açarak Türkiye pazarına olan ilgisini arttırmış, 2010 yılında ise şirketleşme kararı alarak Fronius İstanbul’u kurmuştur. Önce Kaynak Teknolojileri ve Solar Enerji departmanların faaliyete geçiren Fronius İstanbul, 2019 yılında Akü Şarj Teknolojileri faaliyetlerine de başlayarak, her 3 departmanı ile Türkiye’nin dört bir yanına irtibat ofisleri, satış takımları, teknik ekibi, hizmetleri ve partnerleri ile ulaşmaktadır. 
Sürdürülebilir büyüme hedeflerimiz doğrultusunda faaliyetlerimiz artarak devam etmektedir.

Name: Delos Power
Description:
Ogni giorno, lavoriamo per generare un impatto positivo sull'ambiente e sulla società.
In Delos Power crediamo in un futuro più sostenibile e lavoriamo ogni giorno per renderlo possibile. Dal 2016 ci impegniamo per trasformare il panorama energetico italiano 
attraverso la gestione e manutenzione di impianti di produzione di energia da fonti rinnovabili.
Grazie a un team di professionisti altamente qualificati, uniamo competenze tecniche e visione strategica per fornire energia pulita e contribuire attivamente alla transizione energetica.
Integriamo le operazioni di Asset Management e Operation&Maintenance garantendo una gestione efficiente degli impianti fotovoltaici ed eolici che ci vengono affidati, rispettando così l’orizzonte di lungo periodo degli investimenti sostenibili. 

Gestiamo gli impianti di proprietà dei fondi di investimento Tages Helios, Tages Helios II e Tages Helios Net Zero. Con un portafoglio di 372 impianti fotovoltaici ed eolici e 784 MW di potenza installata ci posizioniamo come il secondo operatore nazionale nella produzione di energia elettrica da fonte fotovoltaica.

Promuoviamo un futuro più sostenibile per le prossime generazioni.
Ma i numeri non sono tutto. Dietro ogni MWh prodotto c’è l’impegno concreto a ridurre le emissioni di CO₂, mitigare i cambiamenti climatici e preservare il nostro pianeta creando 
valore per le generazioni future.

Name: Encore Renewable Energy
Description: We are a leader in full-service community-scale renewable energy development, with a proven track record in project development from concept to completion. As a values-led commercial solar company, we specialize in reclaiming undervalued real estate for clean energy generation and storage, helping us to revitalize communities and create a cleaner, brighter future for all.

Name: DVP Solar
Description:
DVP Solar desarrolla proyectos solares fotovoltaicos a gran escala en Europa y LatAm.

Desde el inicio, nos ocupamos de todas las fases del desarrollo de un proyecto fotovoltaico, desde la identificación del terreno, hasta que el proyecto alcanza el estado de ready to build, pasando por la conexión a la red, los permisos. También tenemos la capacidad para financiar la construcción (a través de licitaciones públicas o PPAs privados). Finalmente, administramos el activo y supervisamos la construcción y operación y mantenimiento a largo plazo.

Creemos firmemente en que la energía fotovoltaica y el almacenamiento se convertirán en un componente esencial de nuestra matriz energética y queremos estar en el centro de esta transición hacia una economía de cero emisiones de carbono.

DVP Solar develops large scale solar photovoltaic Projects in Europe and LatAm. 

From inception, we take care of all the phases of a project development, from land identification to grid connection and permitting, until the Project reaches ready-to-build status. We also have the capacity to finance the construction and to secure long term PPAs (through public tenders or private PPAs). Finally, we manage the asset and supervise the construction and operation and O&M of the Project.

We ﬁrmly believe in PV and storage becoming an essential component of our energy matrix and we want to be at the core of this transition to a zero-carbon emission economy.

Name: Smart Energies
Description:
Smart Energies (www.smart-energies.eu) is an Independent Power Producer (IPP) specialized in the development, financing, construction and operation of renewable projects across Europe. Smart Energies was created in 2012, as a new structure coming from former SPTI group which had had a long history in the energy market in the 20th century. 

Smart Energies develops a growing portfolio of solar and storage plants, with a strong focus on solar rooftops and solar park shelters (from 100 kW) in Europe (primarily in France, Italy, Greece and Nordics). At Smart Energies, we strongly believe that installing gigawatts of solar PV is possible without consuming natural, agricultural or forest land. As of April 2024, Smart Energies owns and operates more than 500 plants, and more than 160 MW in operation or under construction. Smart Energies recorded a turnover of more than 40 millions euros in 2023.

Smart Energies is owned by the historical shareholders of SPTI (family offices), as well as by Rgreen Invest (financial investor) and by managers and employees of the group.

Name: AMP Soluções em Engenharia
Description:
A AMP é uma empresa líder no mercado de instalações elétricas e existe desde 2007. Ao longo dos anos, temos acumulado uma vasta experiência em diversos setores, incluindo renováveis, predial, industrial, naval e offshore. Nosso compromisso é fornecer soluções energéticas eficientes para o mercado, visando contribuir para um futuro mais limpo e sustentável.

No cenário atual, a construção de usinas solares fotovoltaicas centralizadas é o nosso foco principal. Reconhecemos a importância da energia solar como uma fonte renovável e limpa, capaz de reduzir os custos de energia a longo prazo e mitigar os impactos ambientais. Com nossa expertise nesse setor, estamos comprometidos em projetar, construir e operar usinas solares fotovoltaicas eficientes e de alta qualidade.

Nosso processo de construção de usinas solares fotovoltaicas é abrangente e inclui etapas essenciais, como a avaliação do local, projeto e engenharia, aquisição de equipamentos, instalação e comissionamento. Temos uma equipe altamente qualificada e experiente, capaz de lidar com todos os aspectos ambiciosos desse processo e entregar projetos dentro dos prazos.

Através da nossa dedicação à excelência e qualidade, a AMP conquistou uma presença sólida no setor. Estabelecemos parcerias estratégicas com fornecedores e parceiros de engenharia, o que nos permite oferecer soluções integradas e eficientes para nossos clientes. 

Nossa equipe se esforça para entender as necessidades e expectativas de cada cliente, adaptando nossas soluções para atender às suas demandas específicas. Comprometemos-nos a fornecer serviços de alta qualidade, suporte técnico especializado e manter uma comunicação clara e transparente ao longo de todo o processo.

Na AMP, estamos garantidos de nosso legado de sucesso na indústria de instalações elétricas. Continuamos a aprimorar nossas habilidades e conhecimentos, mantendo-nos atualizados com as últimas tendências e avanços tecnológicos.

Name: Switching Battery
Description:
Switching Battery is the first flow-through energy storage system that combines storage, switching, and control into a single step using XY Logic.  It can be compared to a living system where the battery serves as the lungs, the built-in switch acts as the heart, and the logic controller functions as the brain. This integrated XY Logic design seamlessly manages energy flow directly from the battery to the load, enabling simultaneous charging (in parallel, or X-mode) and discharging (in series, or Y-mode)—a system that replaces traditional 0-1 binary switching with smooth, continuous flow.

XY Logic integrates the battery management system (BMS) that provides advanced power control without the need for additional components. This design also creates an uninterrupted power supply (UPS) when connected to one or more renewable sources, as it operates as a flow-through energy system—unlike traditional batteries that require external switching and control. 

A Variable Frequency Drive (VFD) is an electronic device used to control the speed, torque, and direction of AC (Alternating Current) motors. VFD systems achieve this by varying the frequency and voltage of the power supplied to the motor, making it essential in applications where precise motor control is necessary.  Traditional VFDs use a three-step process—converting AC to DC, stabilizing it, then converting it back to variable AC—resulting in complexity, energy loss, and heat generation. 

In contrast, Switching Battery’s XY Logic modulates power directly from within the battery system, simplifying VFD into a single step.  By leveraging fuzzy logic with VFD-like capability, Switching Battery dynamically controls both duty cycle and frequency, optimizing energy flow using microcontrollers for high efficiency – it is compact, ideal and scalable solution for solar energy, artificial intelligence (AI), and sustainable technologies.

Partant du principe que la « révolution énergétique » que nous connaissons ne peut pas profiter à quelqu’un au détriment des autres, TERAPOLIS et sa fondatrice Carole Descroix misent sur le concept de « mutualisation ». Au-delà des bénéfices perçus par les exploitants agricoles et propriétaires des parcelles sur lesquelles TERAPOLIS installe de grandes centrales, l’entreprise propose des actions qui participent à leur essor et à celui de leurs citoyens via une approche de création de valeurs responsable et durable.

Name: UVENERGY Chile
Description:
UVENERGY es una empresa chilena que nace con la misión de liderar la transición energética compartiendo conocimiento, demostrando un sólido compromiso social y manteniendo una firme responsabilidad ambiental.

Nuestra especialidad se encuentra en el sector de energías renovables en Chile, con un enfoque en sistemas fotovoltaicos, y con una amplia experiencia en plantas PMGD y Utility. Nuestro equipo cuenta con más de 20 años de experiencia combinada en áreas relacionadas con la gestión de contratos, procesos de licitación, evaluación de proyectos, desarrollo, diseño, construcción, operación y mantenimiento.

Entre nuestros servicios, ofrecemos:
-Servicios integrales de Gestión de Activos para Plantas Fotovoltaicas, incluyendo Operaciones y Mantenimiento (O&M), abarcando diversos aspectos como permisos, cumplimiento ambiental, derechos mineros y el fomento de relaciones positivas con las comunidades locales y propietarios de terrenos.
-Creación y revisión de contratos de O&M.
-Desarrollo y revisión de pronósticos de generación de energía, presupuestos de OPEX y CAPEX.
-Proyección de generación electricidad a largo plazo, junto con cálculos de rendimiento, incluyendo estimaciones P50/P90.
-Creación y revisión de planes de mantenimiento, utilizando un enfoque de Mantenimiento Centrado en la Confiabilidad (RCM).
-Revisión y cálculo de indicadores de rendimiento, como el Performance Ratio, Disponibilidad y Métricas de Mantenimiento.
-Preparación y revisión de informes de mantenimiento, evaluaciones termográficas u otra documentación técnica necesaria.
-Gestión eficiente de repuestos utilizando metodologías basadas en la confiabilidad.
-Realización de inspecciones en terreno, levantando observaciones y proponiendo sugerencias de mejora para garantizar un rendimiento óptimo.
-Manejo de reclamos de garantía con fabricantes y subcontratistas, manteniendo comunicación directa con compañías de seguros y liquidadores.

Para mas información, visítenos en www.uvenergy.cl

Name: E-Ports

Wij zijn E-Ports, een kei in de carport. Onze ontwerpen ademen eenvoud, juist omdat we zoveel aandacht hebben voor de details. Dat kom je maar zelden tegen. Als het aan ons ligt hebben álle middelgrote en grote bedrijven in België en Nederland, hun energie straks in eigen hand. Meterslange parkeerterreinen beter benut. Dat is onze inzet.

Zie de potentie, kies voor eenvoud. Stel zelf je carport samen en ontvang binnen 2 minuten een quickscan in je mailbox.

Zo doet je parking lot, lots more.

Volem que la ciutadania sigui protagonista d'aquesta transformació de gran abast, incrementant la cultura energètica de la ciutadania i capacitant-la per participar en aquest futur sostenible.

Name: INNO-NEAT Energy Solutions
Description:
INNO-NEAT Energy Solutions is a groundbreaking startup dedicated to revolutionizing access to safe drinking water through innovative and sustainable solutions. Our unique approach combines renewable energy and water filtration to address a critical global challenge.

The Problem: Billions of people worldwide lack access to clean and safe drinking water, leading to waterborne diseases, economic hardship, and diminished quality of life, particularly in low-income, off-grid communities. This glaring problem demands scalable and affordable solutions.

The Solution: INNO-NEAT Energy Solutions offers SafiSolar, a solar-powered water filtration system that removes contaminants like bacteria, viruses, and heavy metals from water sources. What sets SafiSolar apart is its affordability, portability, and ease of maintenance, making it accessible to low-income households. We employ a Pay-as-You-Go (PAYGO) model to ensure even the most financially constrained communities can access this life-saving technology.

Our Business Model: We generate revenue through the sale of SafiSolar units and replacement water filters. Our PAYGO model allows customers to pay for their systems in manageable installments, enhancing affordability. Furthermore, we establish partnerships with community associations, NGOs, and local governments for distribution and maintenance.

Geographies: Our initial focus is on Kenya, where millions lack access to safe drinking water. However, our scalable and adaptable technology holds the potential to impact communities globally, particularly in regions facing similar challenges.

History and Scale: INNO-NEAT Energy Solutions was founded in 2022 by Godfrey Simiyu Katiambo, a seasoned business development and innovation expert in the off-grid solar industry. Since our inception, we've developed and deployed three prototypes in western Kenya, serving over 250 households and producing 5,000 liters of clean drinking water daily. Name: Energy Wired - Solar Experts
Description:
Energy Wired has been providing sustainable solar solutions to businesses, not-for-profits, government, and households seeking to reduce their costs and carbon footprint for over 12 years.  

We work across Victoria, South Australia and New South Wales. 


Here's a few reasons to partner with Energy Wired as your solar provider:

Top Quality:  When switching to solar it’s important that you receive top quality across the board. We provide quality installation, products and service. In fact, Energy Wired was rated in the top 5% for quality installation by Clean Energy Regulator. 

Experienced Specialists:  We've been in business for over 10 years, which means not only are we experienced, but we’ve developed specialised skills and niche solar industry knowledge so that we can serve you better. 

Longer Warranty: Energy Wired is a certified partner of several solar manufacturers. One of the big bonuses of these partnerships is that you receive a longer warranty on your system when purchased through us. 

Customer Focused:  Our focus is always on getting you the best quality installation, and providing quality customer service. Our customer reviews rank us as one of the highest ranked solar businesses in Victoria on Google. 

Financing Options: As part of our service, Energy Wired can set you up with leasing options to buy now, and pay as you go, keeping you cash flow positive and saving off your energy bill. 

Community Focused:  One of the initiatives we’re most proud of at Energy Wired is our relationship with Kiva. For every solar system installed we donate to Kiva so businesses and farmers in developing countries can have access to solar too.

Commercial results: Considering solar for your business? Energy Wired has delivered savings of 30% per year off businesses power bill. Over the course of a year that could save you approximately $50,000 from a 100 Kilowatt solar system, and some of our clients even end up in credit on their bills.

Growth - We embrace a growth mindset, always seeking opportunities to improve our understanding and actions, both individually and as a team. This principle extends to the physical growth of our community through strategic engagement and thoughtful development.

Wij zijn sterk in het seriematig leveren van veel kleine installaties voor particulieren of woningcorporaties, maar ook in het leveren en onderhouden van grootschalige zonnedaken en zonnevelden.

Landelijke dekking
Volta Solar is onderdeel van een landelijke groep van 7 Service Partners: Volta Limburg, Energiewacht, Energiewacht Groep, Geas, Kemkens, Nederland Isoleert en Isoprofs. Samen bedienen wij meer dan 1,3 miljoen klanten in heel Nederland met een breed aanbod waaronder zonnepanelen, zonneboilers, CV-ketels, warmtepompen en woningisolatie. Onze adviseurs en monteurs zijn altijd in de buurt.

Centre of Expertise Zon
Binnen de groep is Volta Solar het Centre of Expertise op gebied van zonne-energie. Dit betekent dat Volta Solar als kenniscentrum fungeert en dat een aantal zaken als inkoop en logistiek bij Volta Solar zijn gecentraliseerd voor heel Nederland en België.

Innogy
Samen met alle Service Partners en Essent zijn wij onderdeel van Innogy, een afsplitsing van de Duitse energiereus RWE. Met 40 duizend medewerkers en een omzet van 45 miljard is Innogy een van de grootste groene energiebedrijven van Europa. In Nederland werkt Volta Solar nauw samen met Innogy Renewables voor de realisatie van grootschalige zonne-energie installaties.

Name: SolarTAP
Description:
SolarTAP is a Helmholtz Foundation initiative with the goal to accelerate the deployment of multi-benefit photovoltaics based on emerging printed PV-Technologies like organic photovoltaics and perovskites.

SolarTAP wants to make existing surface areas in agriculture, construction and transportation usable for the expansion of solar energy through the use of printed solar cells. In this way, not „only“ green energy is generated, but in certain applications additional benefits are created resulting in a „multi-benefit“ for the respective application.

Together with a network of industrial partners, SolarTAP is further developing the necessary technologies and transferring the results along the entire value chain „lab-to-fab“ in order to quickly make these new PV solutions market-ready and accelerate the commercial use of the technologies.

Name: Shankshila Solar Energies Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 2021, ShankShila Solar Energies Private Limited (SSSEPL) is led by promoters with over two decades of expertise in motor pumps, electrical systems, electronics, and the automotive sector. Our unwavering commitment to innovation drives us to deliver excellence across our product lines.
At ShankShila (SSSEPL), we operate with a core philosophy centered around people, uncompromising quality, and customer satisfaction. Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with fully automated production lines for Solar PV Junction Boxes, EV Wiring Harnesses, Controller Harnesses, Power Cords, and an in-house molding unit, ensuring streamlined production and consistent quality.
Our products stand out for their variety, innovative design, and broad market reach, earning the trust of customers nationwide. While we currently serve markets across India, we have also embarked on expanding our reach to global markets through exports.

ShankShila (SSSEPL) is ISO 9001:2015 certified and our products meet stringent international standards, having secured certifications from TUV and other globally recognized certification bodies.

With an annual production capacity of 5 GW for junction boxes and 1.2 million units for wire harnesses, we are committed to staying ahead of industry trends. As we continue to innovate, we remain focused on advancing the solar photovoltaic industry, promoting green, renewable energy, and contributing to global carbon reduction efforts.

Name: Saver-Solar

Saver Solar was established in 2018 in Lahore to serve Pakistan’s growing energy needs. As a pioneer in providing both grid-connected and off-grid Solar Photovoltaic (PV) systems, Saver Solar has earned a reputation for innovation and reliability. Our team of young and dynamic energy entrepreneurs is committed to delivering comprehensive solar solutions, which include the design, sourcing, installation, commissioning, operation, and maintenance of solar power systems.

We specialize in offering full turnkey solutions at competitive prices for both on-grid and off-grid configurations. With our decentralized structure, we can swiftly and efficiently meet our clients' needs, ensuring top-tier service quality.

Our services include:

- Grid-tied, Off-grid, and Hybrid Solar Solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial sectors.
- Solar Tubewells to support agricultural energy needs.
- Solar Street Lights for effective public and private lighting.
- Lithium-ion Battery Storage Solutions for enhanced energy reliability.
- Site Surveys to optimize solar system installations.
- Solar Financing Options through partnerships with major banks.
- Net-Metering Services, as an approved vendor, allowing customers to sell excess energy back to the grid.

At Saver Solar, we are transforming energy consumption with sustainable, innovative solutions designed to provide reliable and cost-effective solar power.

Name: SOLARGIE
Description:
Solargie, fondée en 2003, est une entreprise spécialisée dans l'installation de panneaux solaires photovoltaïques et de bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques, offrant des solutions globales pour la production d'électricité solaire.

Nous proposons des solutions clés en main, adaptées tant aux particuliers qu'aux professionnels (entreprises, agriculteurs, etc.), afin d'optimiser votre consommation énergétique et de réduire vos coûts. En plus de l'installation de panneaux solaires et de bornes de recharge, nous mettons à votre disposition une gamme complète de services :

 Panneaux solaires : Réduisez votre facture d'électricité en produisant votre propre énergie.
 Batteries de stockage : Maximisez votre autoconsommation en stockant l'énergie produite pour une utilisation optimale.
 Carports solaires et ombrières solaires : Protégez vos véhicules tout en générant de l'énergie verte.
 Bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques : Rechargez votre voiture rapidement et économiquement.
 Maintenance et nettoyage des panneaux solaires : Assurez le bon fonctionnement et l'efficacité de vos installations grâce à nos services de maintenance et de nettoyage professionnels.


 Zones d'intervention : Vendée, Loire-Atlantique, Maine-et-Loire, Mayenne, Sarthe, Deux-Sèvres, Charente-Maritime, Charente.

Nos équipes, composées de 35 collaborateurs, regroupent des experts en bureaux d'études, services commerciaux, administration des ventes et services techniques. Grâce à plus de 20 ans d'expérience, Solargie est devenue un acteur incontournable dans le domaine de l’énergie solaire, en offrant des solutions innovantes, performantes et parfaitement adaptées aux besoins de chaque client.

Vous avez un projet énergétique ? Contactez-nous pour obtenir une étude gratuite. Un de nos experts se déplace chez vous pour analyser votre consommation et vous proposer des solutions personnalisées.
Location: La Roche-sur-Yon, Pays de la Loire

Name: TSOe Solar Engineering
Description:
TSOe is born due to the demand for new ways of installations and solar energy commercialization in the solar PV market. This market is dramatically growing during the past and forthcoming years (more than $100 billions total spending in 2015), and is mainly based on utility plants and rooftop installations, a fact which progressively decreases prices and benefits for the stakeholders and leads the sector towards concentration. Something peculiar if we think of such a social energy like the sun. 

TSO knows that there exits an important gap between current ways of solar PV installations with flat modules and the new future that solar energy brings to all of us. This gap can be filled with R&D and innovation, connecting commercial-scientific initiatives and big OEM manufacturers (tier 1&2) with solar stakeholders interested in deploying new solar PV markets. Our commercial-scientific team has the expertise to help those companies diversify their solar business or enter it with new approaches.

Se você deseja fazer parte dessa mudança, escolha SolarSky para suas necessidades de energia solar.

Name: SOPIM ENERGIA
Description:
SOPIM nasce nel 2004 da un team di tecnici esperti con esperienza presso Enel, Acea ed Azienda Elettrica di Bolzano e Merano nel campo della produzione/distribuzione dell’energia elettrica per reti di alta, media e bassa tensione. 

Si specializza nell’allestimento di grandi Centri di Calcolo che realizza per società private, banche ed enti statali. Approfondisce la propria cultura nei sistemi elettrici sostenuti da gruppi statici di continuità (UPS – Uninterruptible Power Supply) necessari a garantire alimentazione ad utenze privilegiate che per il loro corretto funzionamento non possono subire interruzioni di corrente.

Nel 2005, con l’inizio dello sviluppo in Italia delle Energie Rinnovabili, SOPIM dedica un ramo d'azienda a tale specializzazione e realizza sistemi elettrici e applicazioni industriali/residenziali, privilegiando la produzione di energia elettrica attraverso l’utilizzo di Impianti Fotovoltaici.

A seguire la Società acquisisce l’ambita certificazione Premier Partner SUNPOWER, azienda Leader, nota nell’ambito degli impianti fotovoltaici per la produzione di Moduli riconosciuti come i più efficienti al mondo. 

Cura il Programma 1.000 tetti fotovoltaici con il progetto Energia Mia, viene assunta come Società di riferimento tecnico specialistico per il Programma Ambientale avviato dalla BCC di Frascati sull’Efficienza Energetica e Sulle Energie Alternative nel territorio Regione Lazio.

Successivamente incrementa la realizzazione e lo sviluppo di sistemi elettrici residenziali, commerciali, industriali con l'impiego di impianti Fotovoltaici per i quali, grazie alla collaborazione diretta con SUNPOWER, segue ed applica in anticipo le innovazioni possibili.

Ad oggi SOPIM detiene importanti Convenzioni: Telecom Italia, Banca d’Italia, centri Carrefour Italia, Cna Roma, Anla Lazio per la realizzazione d’Impianti Fotovoltaici ed inoltre vanta l’ambita certificazione TESLA POWERWALL - società Leader mondiale - per i sistemi di accumulo in batteria.

Name: SOLARMA
Description:
Chez Solarma, nous croyons que la réussite durable repose sur des relations de confiance solides et des partenariats à long terme. Nous nous engageons à comprendre et à répondre aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients et partenaires, plutôt qu'à imposer des solutions préconçues. Cette approche repose sur une écoute attentive et un engagement sincère envers la satisfaction de nos clients.

Nous avons également une vision sociale claire : contribuer activement au développement durable de Madagascar. Nous sommes convaincus que l'énergie solaire est un levier essentiel pour améliorer la qualité de vie et stimuler la croissance économique du pays.

Notre expertise technique, fruit de nos expériences personnelles et collectives, est mise au service de cette ambition. Nous visons à transformer le paysage énergétique de Madagascar en offrant des solutions innovantes et efficaces qui répondent aux défis énergétiques actuels et futurs.

En somme, notre vision est celle d'un avenir où la confiance, la responsabilité sociale et l'excellence technique se conjuguent pour construire un Madagascar plus lumineux et durable.

Name: Green FOX Energy
Description:
Green FOX Energy ist ein unabhängiger Projektentwickler sowie Bestandshalter von Erneuerbaren Energien-Anlagen und damit unabhängiger Stromerzeuger (IPP) mit Sitz in Hamburg. Wir erwerben und betreiben leistungsstarke Anlagen und erwirtschaften stabile planbare Erträge durch langfristige Stromabnahmeverträge oder feste Einspeisevergütungen.
