Name: UGT Renewables
Description:
Led by our mission of providing sustainable but competitive clean energy, we have been developing complete and refined solutions for solar energy since 2009. Thanks to our technical expertise, supply chain capabilities, and access to capital, UGT Renewables can deliver solar generating power plants at any scale with market-leading costs and efficiency. Whether it’s large-scale photovoltaic solar farms, commercial rooftops, parking structures, or energy storage, we identify these possibilities and transform them into reality.

For those looking to invest in renewable energy, UGT Renewables provides an insight into what it means to be a clean energy company, with several utility-scale solar projects already developed. Our goal is to meet the increasing demand from utilities for clean electricity at highly competitive prices with our development strategy aimed at building a balanced portfolio of utility-scale solar projects ranging in size from 1 - 50 MW. Our industry knowledge and expertise assist in securing government tax incentives, subsidies, grants, negotiating real estate terms, and contracting long-term power purchase agreements with local electrical companies.

From our experience, the key component to successful development is the partnerships and relationships amongst all parties involved. Our partnerships with the largest energy engineering/procurement/construction companies (EPC) enable us to create and follow the most economical pathway in efficiency and construction of renewable energy sites by selecting the optimal electrical generating components, contracting installation, and maintaining real-time monitoring of the physical site. The relationships with project stakeholders can make or break a project. Establishing communication early on and throughout the development cycle is what has made us successful.

Name: Gas Fast
Description:
Gas Fast trading as Wickes Solar is a trusted UK solar provider built on over two decades of experience in home energy solutions. Originally known as Solar Fast, we earned recognition as one of the fastest-growing solar companies in the UK, driven by our commitment to quality, transparency, and exceptional customer service.

In 2024, our partnership with Wickes marked an important milestone in our journey, strengthening our ability to bring reliable, high-performance solar systems to homeowners nationwide. This collaboration reflects a shared vision: to make renewable energy more accessible, trusted, and straightforward for every customer.

In 2025, we evolved from Solar Fast to Wickes Solar, aligning our brand identity with this trusted partnership while maintaining the same family-run values and operational excellence that have defined our success. Every installation, from initial consultation to aftercare, continues to be fully managed by Gas Fast. Our customers benefit from a seamless, end-to-end experience—supported by dedicated design, installation, and technical teams that ensure quality at every stage.
Solar Fast have partnered with top solar energy industry organisations and bodies to ensure that our work is the finest, most professional that you can find. We value old-fashioned workmanship and integrity.

After we built Gas Fast, a nationwide-recognised boiler installation company in 2001, it was becoming ever-clearer that people were missing out on the potential solar energy.

Fast forward to 2022, Solar Fast is becoming one of the biggest solar panel installers in the UK – trusted by 1,000s of customers across the country, on a mission to stamp out fossil fuels and save on energy bills.

Today, Gas Fast trading as Wickes Solar stands as a symbol of trust and progress in the UK’s solar industry, combining the stability of an established energy company with the confidence of one of Britain’s most recognisable retail brands.

Name: Nätverket för solparker
Description:
Nätverket för solparker är ett branschsamarbete mellan sexton stora aktörer som nu investerar i utbyggnad av storskalig industriell solkraft på mark, så kallade solparker. Vi vill bidra till att öka kunskapen om solparker bland beslutsfattare, intressenter och allmänhet. 
 
Vi verkar också för regulatoriska förändringar som underlättar etablering av, och lönsamhet i, storskalig markbaserad solkraft i Sverige. Genom att sprida kunskap kring solkraften hoppas vi kunna accelerera energiomställningen i Sverige och bidra till både minskade utsläpp och en snabbare elektrifiering av samhället.

Med stora privata investeringar och helt utan statliga subventioner har Nätverket för solparkers företag möjlighet att förse Sverige med ett avsevärt bidrag av ny elproduktion på både kort och lång sikt. Fram till halvårsskiftet 2023 hade nätverkets medlemmar tillsammans fått tillstånd att anlägga 1,2 GW solkraft – mer än hälften av den totala kapacitet som länsstyrelserna godkänt – och anläggningar på ytterligare 3 GW väntar fortfarande på besked.

Nätverket för solparker består av: Alight, Arise, BayWa r.e. Nordic, BeGreen, Better Energy, E.ON Energiinfrastruktur, EnergiEngagemang, European Energy, Fortum, GreenGo Energy, Helios Nordic Energy, Neoen, Nordic Solar, OX2, Solkompaniet, Svea Solar, Turn Energy, wpd Scandinavia

Established in 2010, BeBa Energy have been developing, designing, installing and maintaining the highest quality commercial solar PV systems. Name: Light Up The World (LUTW)
Description:
Light Up The World (LUTW) is a Canadian non-profit organization focused on the principle that access to energy changes lives. LUTW implements projects that provide sustainable energy solutions to remote communities without access to the power grid. Since 1997, LUTW has been helping people transition away from unhealthy fuels to solar power in 54 countries - working to make energy and lighting in vulnerable communities as inexpensive and sustainable as possible.

Access to renewable energy is transformational - it creates a healthy and safe home environment, enhances opportunities for education and contributes to economic development by increasing disposable income and encouraging entrepreneurship. With a focus on training and developing the capacity of local service providers, LUTW builds partnerships so that communities are empowered to move towards a more sustainable future.

•	Axe II: Analyse and design strategies in order to direct society towards a low carbon economy, the transposition of rules, raise awareness, train key actors and build capacities in the public sector

This experience reflects in many project s and works:
-	Building EE, with more than 300 studies in the last 10 years
-	RE investments, with more than 1,5 MW installed of many different technologies
-	EE training, with more than 300 courses and 4000 participants
-	Creation of more than 25 local and regional EE management plans

Our team counts on more than 45 university graduates of the industrial and environment areas.

AGENEX has extensive experience in the coordination and implementation of European projects, such as:

Name: Sunport Structures
Description:
Sunport Structures Ltd. (SPS) was established in 2016 at the dawn of the solar structure industry in Canada. Based out of Calgary, the hub of Canada's energy industry, our core motivation is to produce industry-leading, innovative solar structures at an affordable price.

Our structures help drive the triple bottom line - balancing economic, social, and environmental prosperity. Since our inception, we have produced projects across Canada and the United States, exceeding 5 Megawatts (MW), including Canada’s largest solar carport structure.

We equip municipalities, organizations, and individuals with a financially viable, multi-faceted, turn-key application. With the global trend toward net-zero, our solutions drive renewable energy generation, particularly solar energy. Our end goal is to minimize society’s carbon footprint by displacing carbon-emitting sources.

We have created a specialized process that mounts solar panels in such a way to maximize solar harvest. Our main offerings are carport structures that make use of under-utilized urban land (i.e. parking lots), which allows for LEED certification opportunities and minimizes encroachment on green spaces.

We consult extensively with our clients throughout the project. The front-end engineering is the key stage of the project cycle, and we work closely with our clients to maintain project goals and keep within budget.

Learn more about us at our website: www.sunport.ca.

Name: Sunfinity Renewables Pvt Ltd
Description:
Sunfinity Renewables Pvt Ltd  (SRPL) is an integrated solar energy company based in India, dedicated to delivering cutting-edge solar solutions to commercial and industrial energy consumers, Independent Power Producers (IPPs), and EPC contractors. As a proud 100% subsidiary of Taurus Opto Semiconductors—an industry leader with over 40 years of expertise in the electronics sector—SRPL combines deep industry insights with innovative technology to drive the clean energy revolution in India.

We specialize in developing, engineering, procuring, constructing, and operating solar power projects, with a vision of establishing a 500 MWp solar portfolio by 2027. Our diverse offerings include:

•	Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC)
•	Power Purchase Agreements (PPA) at utility scale
•	PM KUSUM projects
•	C&I (Commercial and Industrial) segment solutions

As we expand our footprint, we are proud to share that SRPL is at the final stage of signing agreements for 150 MW of solar projects with various state governments, reinforcing our commitment to fostering sustainable energy adoption across the country.

With a proven track record of executing rooftop and ground-mounted solar projects nationwide, we are driven by professionalism, strong performance ethics, and unwavering integrity. Our operations cover every phase of project execution—from conceptualization to commissioning—ensuring seamless delivery and customer satisfaction.

By leveraging a robust network of global and local suppliers, coupled with key stakeholder partnerships, we maintain a resilient supply chain while adhering to the highest standards of quality and service.

Our Vision
Rooted in the legacy of Taurus Opto Semiconductors, we are committed to building a greener tomorrow. Guided by our team of experienced engineers and industry leaders, we believe that renewable energy is essential to shaping India’s future. At SRPL, we are not just envisioning a sustainable future—we are engineering it.

Name: Sollar Sul Energia Solar
REM TEC
Description:
REM Tec is an Italo- French Group active in the field of innovative agriPV solutions and having developed its own patented agrivoltaic technology. Offered on the market under the brand AGROVOLTAICO , the Group’s technological portfolio comprises double axis (3D), single axis (2D) and fixed agrivoltaic systems. The advantage of such systems is that it allows to combine agriculture and renewable energy power production underneath, leading to the preservation of agricultural reality (and thus food production) by at the same time producing sustainable and carbon free electricity. 

REM Tec, with more than a decade of agrivoltaic experience, has been the first Company worldwide to develop and commercialize such solutions. The Company, backed by its own Agronomic team, works closely together with Italian and French research institutes, to better understand the behavior of different crop sorts (e.g. maize, vineyard, tomatoes, salads, pumpkin, kiwi, melon, blackberries, rice and many others)  under such plants (effects analyzed include e.g.: yield of crop, shadow effects, water consumption etc.). The research results help to continuously develop the technology and to improve service offering.

REM Tec can support potential customers in all relevant agrivoltaic project phases including: 
-	Pre-project phase (preliminary layout implementations and energy production estimations)
-	Development phase (support to get all relevant grid connection and construction approvals)
-	Construction phase (delivery of Agrivoltic structure and monitoring of construction and integration performed by dedicated EPC company)
-	Operations phase (support of customer through dedicated O&M team ensuring high quality maintenance)

As of today, REM Tec has realized projects in Italy, France, China and Japan and has offices in Asola (MN, Italy) and Garches (close to Paris).

Name: ERL SOLAR MONTAJ SİSTEMLERİ
Description:
Biz ERL SOLAR MONTAJ SİSTEMLERİ olarak, sürekli sanayileşen ve genişleyen toplumumuzun, artan enerji gereksinimlerinin karşılanmasında en etkin yolun solar enerjiye yönelik yatırımlar olacağının fikrinden hareketle sizler için en ideal çözümler üretmek üzere yola çıktık.
Erol Metal A.Ş’ nin çeyrek asrı aşkın süredir metale form verme serüveninde edindiğimiz sanayi tecrübesini ERL SOLAR MONTAJ SİSTEMLERİ bünyesinde siz değerli müşterilerimiz, çalışanlarımız, tedarikçilerimiz ve diğer paydaşlarımızla beraber daha da ileriye taşımak istiyoruz.
ERL SOLAR MONTAJ SİSTEMLERİ, üretim yeteneğini sadece solar montaj sistemleri üzerine yoğunlaştırmış, dinamik, etkin, hedef odaklı Ankara merkezli, anahtar teslimi solar montaj sistemleri üreticisi ve uygulayıcısıdır.
Yenilikçi fikirler, Enerjik çözümler ERL SOLAR MONTAJ SİSTEMLERİ ’nin temel yaklaşımını oluşturur. Solar Montaj Sistemleri konusunda tüm süreçlerde,müşterilerimiz kalite, hız, yüksek verimlilik elde edeceğinden emin olabilir. Bu minvalde Dilovası Organize Sanayi Bölgesinde 10.000 m2 alanda günlük 3 MW üretim kapasitesiyle Türkiye’nin en büyük solar montaj profili üretim hat/larını C Profil A.Ş adı altında hizmete açmıştır.
Yenilikçi fikirlerimizde sınır yoktur, zorlu arazi koşulları, en azami yükler altında bile, ERL SOLAR MONTAJ SİSTEMLERİ sizler için en uygun çözümü sunacaktır. Bunu sağlayabilmek için alanında etkin uzman çalışanlarımız, sizlere en optimum çözümü en düşük maliyetle ve yüksek kalite bilinciyle sunmaya hazırdır.
İhtiyaçlarınıza uygun sistemler için saha keşfi, analizler ve bu analizler neticesinde detaylı bir fizibilite ve akabinde projelendirme, tedarik, uygulama/entegrasyon çalışmalarıyla sürdürülebilir bir proje için bizimle irtibata geçebilirsiniz.
Kuruluşundan bugüne kadar dünya genelinde 905 MW üzerinde ERL SOLAR MONTAJ SİSTEMLERİ ile Fotovoltaik Güneş Enerji Santrali tesis edilmiştir.

 Production, transport et distribution d'électricité ;

Le solaire est un domaine concurrentiel. Chez DI SOLAR, leader sur le marché, nous avons choisi de nous démarquer grâce à la relation de confiance que nous entretenons avec nos clients tout en gardant des prix compétitifs.

Name: Peridot Solar
Description:
Peridot Solar, founded in 2022, is a leading international Independent Power Producer specializing in renewable energy solutions. With strategically located offices in London, Milan, and Catania, we are committed to advancing the global transition to clean energy. Our mission is to develop, build, own, and operate state-of-the-art renewable energy facilities, aiming for a pipeline of 5 GW by 2027.


As a portfolio company of FitzWalter Capital, a global private investment firm founded in 2020 by senior members of Macquarie’s CAF Principal Finance business, Peridot Solar leverages extensive expertise and support. FitzWalter Capital invests across a broad spectrum of sectors and asset classes, including corporate businesses, real estate, infrastructure, renewables, and other tangible assets. By providing both capital and strategic insight, FitzWalter Capital empowers management teams to unlock the full potential of their businesses and assets, especially in complex and transitional scenarios.

Our objective is to generate long term recurring cash flows, with a positive environmental and social impact.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Beter Duurzaam BV - 10 Jaar  Solar & Storage professionals
Description:
Beter Duurzaam is dé specialist en uw partner op het gebied van duurzame oplossingen. Onze adviseurs staan naast onze opdrachtgevers en verstrekken vrijblijvend advies. Onze visie op duurzaamheid is altijd eerst besparen. Dit kan door middel van de nieuwste technieken, maar is vaak ook te realiseren door logisch nadenken. Wij bekijken de energiehuishouding van bedrijven, verenigingen en particulieren waarna we een traject van oplossingen aanbieden die stap voor stap leiden tot duurzame verbeteringen. 

Wij renoveren daken waarna deze geïsoleerd kunnen worden en zonnepanelen plaatsen mogelijk maakt. De meest doordachte zonneboilers besparen veel gas en dus ook kosten. Door onze jarenlange ervaring en kennis zijn wij van alle markten thuis. Onze vakmensen staan voor u klaar.

Naast het leveren van producten zijn wij ook een betrouwbare partner als het gaat om energie inkoop en subsidie aanvragen. Als adviseurs kijken niet alleen naar de huidige situatie om een business case kloppend te krijgen. Onze mening is dat men moet rekenen met een verbeterde situatie, dit betekend dat wij ook kijken naar de kostprijs van energie, de eerste stap is om deze te verlagen als deze te hoog is. 

Mochten er subsidie mogelijkheden zijn, zoals SDE subsidie, LEADER of POP subsidies om investeringen aantrekkelijker te maken, gaan wij dit traject graag met u in.

Name: Sun Ballast

Name: Green Gold Energy
Description:
Green Gold Energy Pty Ltd is a specialised company in the development, construction, operation and general contracting of solar farms, We are ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018 certified. Since its inception, it has maintained close ties with the local government and SA Power Networks (SAPN) and has become a pioneer in the renewable energy industry in South Australia. Green Gold Energy established its Melbourne office in 2019, focusing on Victoria and New South Wales project development. Green Gold Energy offers solar PV project services including project site selection, PV system design, equipment procurement, network connection application, development approval application, construction, operation and maintenance for customers and system owners.
Green Gold Energy boasts overseas PV technology and enterprise management experience to ensure high quality and comprehensive service. This wealth of knowledge and understanding has laid an unparalleled foundation for Green Gold Energy’s development in the renewable EPC industry.
Green Gold Energy actively works to provide renewable energy solutions to a plethora of communities; from small business owners, to governments and large corporations. All the while, Green Gold Energy continuing to introduce the newest PV technologies including energy storage to its customers. Up until now, more than 50 solar farms have been built in South Australia, and many are currently under construction.

GreenSpark's expert team of NABCEP-certified installers has completed nearly 350 MW of clean energy to date, holds a NYSERDA Gold Quality Installer designation, is a recurring Top Solar Contractor by Solar Power World, and is a proud member-owner of the Amicus Solar Cooperative, a national network of mission-driven, independently owned solar companies.

JOINT SOLAR PV modules currently have a capacity of 300 MW, which is soon to be expanded to 600 MW in this FY. With a production capacity of 300 MW and 24 years of industry experience, Joint Solar is committed to providing cutting-edge solar solutions to customers worldwide.

•	High-Quality Solar Panels: designed and manufactured to meet the highest standards of performance and durability. Offer solar panels like mono facial, bifacial, mono HC 450 Watt, 590 Watt, and poly 50 Watt to 340 Watt.

At Joint Solar, we believe in the power of renewable energy to transform lives and protect our planet. Join us as we lead the charge towards a greener tomorrow! Follow our page for the latest industry updates, insights, and innovations in solar technology.
Our fully automatic, state-of-the art two solar panel manufacturing unit is spread over more than 1,00000 sq. ft. of area with automatic machinery, which delivers A-grade quality solar PV modules ranging from 40 W to 595 W, confirming to all international and domestic standards such as BIS, IEC, MNRE, ALMM, ISO, etc. Our panels are also a part of ALMM. Our products are promoted under the brand name of Joint Solar. Joint Solar approved ALMM, BIS, IEC 61215, IEC 61730, IEC61701, IEC 62804, and IEC 61853, and approved all state agencies.

Name: Usinas Brasil Solar
Description:
Com mais de uma década de experiência, a BRASIL SOLAR oferece a você a oportunidade de um investimento baixo risco e sustentável no mercado de ENERGIA FOTOVOLTAICA.

A BRASIL SOLAR projeta, financia, constrói e aluga frações de Usinas Fotovoltaicas (UFVs) em diversas regiões do Brasil. A pluralidade de clientes proporciona um diversificado portfólio gerador de um fluxo de caixa com baixo risco e estável.

Contamos com uma equipe multidisciplinar de profissionais com renomado track record nos setores de geração fotovoltaica, mercado financeiro e construção civil, além de um Conselho Diretivo de vasta experiência nos segmentos de energia e construção.

Name: Autarq GmbH
Description:
Autarq GmbH is an established radical innovator and Climate Tech creator. Its proprietary PV-module architecture, designed and produced in Europe, provides the basis for an industry leading building integrated photovoltaic (BIPV) system. The uniquely miniaturised PV-module supplemented by a proprietary wire harness, both manufactured with standard tier 1 components, enables a Plug & Play installable BIPV system that operates in a parallel circuit in SELV (safety extra low voltage). The resulting system characteristics enable the most aesthetic, safest, most flexible and easiest to install and maintain BIPV system currently on the market.

Autarq GmbH maintains two European made-to-order manufacturing sites with more than 100 people and has build a suite of tailor-made digital applications allowing the downstream optimisation of design, planning and installation tasks as well as the application of an entire digital customer journey.

Our philosophy is simple - we help businesses to Buy Better, Use Less and Generate Your Own Energy. In addition to finding the very best deals available on the market for your gas & electricity supplies, we also deliver high-performance sustainable energy solutions to commercial, industrial, and public sectors and occasionally domestic properties.

Drawing on many years of experience in the energy efficiency and renewable energy industries, our team will help your organisation by analysing what is best for your business:

 Buy Better:
- Smart energy procurement service

- LED lighting solutions with up to 10 yr warranties
- Far infra-red heating systems
- Voltage management/optimisation
- Energy monitoring solutions

 - Solar photovoltaic (PV) systems

Our team of experts takes care to assess each business individually from the start, to propose the right long-term, sustainable energy management solutions that best meets your business requirements and offer reliable, low-cost, independent sources of energy with a great rate of return across all solutions.

Key Clients we have worked with - TVS Supply Chain Solutions, Hager, Laltex Group, Linney, Integrated Doorset Solutions, Westbrook Industrial, UBT, Instarmac Group PLC, Crystal Doors, CK Foods LTD, D&L Growers, Werfen, Trimline Group, Searchlight Electric, Tetrosyl Group Limited, Anilox Laser Technology LDT, Bunzl, Datim, The Manchester Metropolitan University, East Lancashire Chamber of Commerce, The Box Factory, AK Sheet Metal Fabrications.

Name: SKY-NRG
Description:
SKY-NRG S.p.A.è una società in cui si fondono le esperienze delle diverse realtà aziendali dei singoli soci che hanno scelto di unire l’esperienza e la professionalità maturate da ciascuno indistinti ambiti lavorativi, per applicarle e svilupparle nel settore delle energie alternative; operando infatti da diversi anni nell’ambito delle costruzioni e dei relativi apparati impiantistici i quattro ideatori dell’azienda percepiscono che qualcosa sta cambiando sia sul fronte delle forme di approvvigionamento energetico, sia nel senso della crescente sensibilità nei confronti dell’ambiente e dirigono le proprie energie in tal senso.
L'azienda dal momento della costituzione è stata caratterizzata da un rapido sviluppo che ha determinato ben presto l'esigenza di un riassetto aziendale finalizzato al potenziamento della capacità produttiva, ed ha creato i presupposti per l’ottenimento dell’attestazione SOA per la categoria di opere OG9 (gli impianti per la produzione di energia elettrica) che certifica la presenza dei requisiti tecnici ed economici idonei alla realizzazione di opere pubbliche di entità rilevante.
Lo sviluppo aziendale ha determinato anche una trasformazione nella tipologia dei propri Stakeholder interessando sempre maggiormente il settore degli impianti medio-grandi.

Name: LOGEN Group
Description:
LOGEN S.r.l. nasce il 28 gennaio del 2008.
La VISION di Logica Energetica è diventare un punto di riferimento nel centro Italia per quanto riguarda la materia dell’efficientamento energetico.
Per arrivare a questo risultato ci siamo specializzati in sistemi di vario genere con particolare focus sugli impianti fotovoltaici.

I primi anni di vita LOGEN inizia da subito a realizzare impianti ma la parte maggiore dello sforzo viene fatta per far crescere l’azienda dal punto di vista del know how.
L’obiettivo è stato quello di inserire dei meccanismi aziendali che portassero ad un miglioramento continuo automatizzato.
Questo approccio aziendale ci ha portato a non appaltare fuori nessuna delle attività aziendali che infatti ad oggi vengono tutte espletate da risorse interne.
In quest’ottica l’ottenimento del certificato ISO 9001 nel 2014 è stato un passaggio naturale.
Tornando a 2 anni prima il 2012 rappresenta un anno di crescita e riorganizzazione è così che LOGEN cambia sede e si sposta da Viale dei Colli Portuensi, 79 dove mantiene la sede legale in Via F. Bonfiglio in una sede più strategica sia come posizione che come conformazione. Inoltre l'azienda ottiene la categoria SOA - OG9 Classifica I valida per partecipare agli appalti pubblici. 

Sempre nell’ottica di consolidare l’azienda gli amministratori nel maggio 2013 fanno un ulteriore investimento aumentando il capitale sociale da 12.000 € fino a 87.000 €.

Il 13 aprile 2015 viene lanciato il primo vero e proprio prodotto di LOGEN (Fotovoltaico Evoluto) con una campagna di web marketing che accompagna il lancio.

Sempre nel 2015 LOGEN ottiene la Classifica III sempre nella categoria OG9.

Nel 2017 inizia il suo percorso nella posa in opera della parte elettrica di impianti fotovoltaici, con 60 MWp realizzati.

Negli anni successivi la società continua ad operare nei montaggi elettrici delle centrali fotovoltaiche aprendo branch sia in Spagna che in Olanda.

Name: Solar360 de Repsol y Movistar

Esto es inteligencia solar

En Repsol y Movistar hemos unido nuestra experiencia en innovación y tecnología para crear una nueva solución de autoconsumo.

Name: Rewatt | Renewables Developer
Description:
Pretendemos que seja simples a introdução de energias renováveis na sua empresa, sem a desfocar do seu negócio principal.

Com a Rewatt pode optar por uma de duas soluções:
1)	A Rewatt assume o investimento e gere a central durante a parceria, assumindo todos os riscos de eficiência, avarias, operação e manutenção. Com uma tarifa simples, competitiva e não sujeita às flutuações do mercado o cliente apenas contribui com o espaço, beneficiando de electricidade verde sem qualquer custo além da tarifa sobre a energia produzida.
2)	O Cliente financia o investimento na central, assegurando a Rewatt a engenharia e construção, podendo também optar pela Rewatt para a operação e manutenção da instalação.

Rewatt | Energia Verde, Simplificada

Name: SOLARMARKT
Description: 35 years ago, Solarmarkt was one of the pioneers in solar energy; today, the company is Switzerland's number one wholesaler of PV components. Its portfolio includes solar modules, inverters, storage systems, and everything else needed to build a PV system. In addition, Solarmarkt has also developed its own solar system, Arres, based on the company's many years of experience. However, Solarmarkt does not plan and build solar systems itself. The focus is on consulting, supporting customers and partners, and promoting photovoltaics in general. Solarmarkt's services range widely: from support in planning solar systems and training for installers to assistance with commissioning smart homes. Solarmarkt customers benefit from modern tools for assessment and planning work and the referral of specialist partners for installation, quality testing, etc. Through all these services, Solarmarkt aims to move step by step closer to its vision of solar energy being used on every suitable roof in Switzerland.

Name: Silicéo
Description:

Entreprise familiale et acteur régional de référence, Silicéo poursuit son développement sur le territoire national au travers d’une grande diversité de solutions d’accompagnement s’adressant à l’ensemble des secteurs d’activité avec une ambition : répondre à vos objectifs environnementaux et économiques avec des solutions adaptées et dimensionnées en fonction des attentes clients.

Membre actif d’Énerplan et du Groupement des Métiers du PhotoVoltaïque au sein de la Fédération du Bâtiment, Silicéo s’investit dans la promotion de la filière solaire en mettant en avant l’ensemble des métiers qui la composent et en favorisant l’émergence de formations professionnelles dédiées. 

Notre mission vise également à sensibiliser les différents acteurs économiques, agricoles et territoriaux à s’engager avec nous dans le respect de l’environnement, en optant pour un acteur local aux compétences internes reconnues.

Name: Kıvanç Enerji
Description:
2006 yılında kurulan Kıvanç Enerji Üretim A.Ş. enerji sektörünün farklı alanlarında hizmet sunan bir şirketler topluluğudur. 
‘’Fotovoltaik Panel Üretim Fabrikası’’ ve ‘’Yenilenebilir enerji santralleri’’ ile birlikte Enerji sektörünün farklı alanlarında faaliyet göstermektedir. 
Fotovoltaik Panel Üretim Fabrikası; 2023 yılı Ocak ayı itibariyle 250 bin metrekarelik bir alanda En son teknoloji kullanılarak, yüksek verimli güneş panelleri üretimine başlamıştır. 
Yıllık 1.2 GW/yıl güneş paneli üretim kapasitesi ile yenilenebilir kaynakların payını artırarak kaynak çeşitlendirme hedef ve vizyonu doğrultusunda yatırımlarımıza devam ediyoruz. 
Ayrıca Şirketimiz; Ülkemizin yüksek potansiyele sahip olduğu alanlardan Güneş, Rüzgâr ve Hidroelektrik enerjisi alanında yatırım yapmaktadır. 
Hidroelektrik santralleri ile başlayan yenilenebilir enerji yatırım süreci güneş ve rüzgar enerjisi yatırımları ile birlikte toplam 250 MW’lık enerji üretim kapasitesine ulaşmıştır. 
Sürdürülebilirliğe her açıdan katkı sağlayan projeler gerçekleştirme ilkesiyle hareket etmekte, Türkiye’nin yerli ve yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarını en verimli düzeyde kullanılması ve ekonomimize kazandırılabilmesi için çalışmalarımızı sürdürüyoruz.

Name: LONGi Solar LATAM
Description:
Fundada en el año 2000, LONGi, es una compañía líder mundial en tecnología solar. La empresa ha mantenido un compromiso inquebrantable a largo plazo con la tecnología monocristalina, con la convicción, acertada, de que su adopción generalizada supondría un cambio tecnológico importante para toda la industria fotovoltaica. 

Con 15 centros de fabricación y más de 30 oficinas en todo el mundo, LONGi produce obleas y módulos de silicio monocristalino, ofreciendo soluciones para sistemas de centrales eléctricas de generación distribuida y en tierra, promoviendo el desarrollo de la industria fotovoltaica mundial e impulsando la transformación energética. Los envíos de la compañía han estado entre los más altos de la industria durante varios años y, en 2020, se convirtió en el primer fabricante en enviar más de 20GW de módulos en un año.
 
La constante y elevada inversión de LONGi en I+D es un importante factor que contribuye a su éxito y la empresa ha aplicado rápidamente nuevas tecnologías y procesos a la producción a gran escala, logrando importantes avances en el control de costes y la innovación de productos eficientes.

En 2020, LONGi se convirtió en la primera empresa china de energía solar en adherirse a las iniciativas RE100, EV100 y EP100, creadas para promover la energía solar con cero emisiones de carbono y el desarrollo sostenible.

Name: 3ti Energy Hubs
Description:
The solar car park company turning car parks into renewable energy power stations.
3ti is the UK’s leading designer, installer, funder & operator of solar car parks. 
Passionate about renewable energy, we believe that providing low carbon EV charging infrastructure is the key to decarbonising the transport sector.  Where better to do that than in a car park? | B Corp Certified

3ti has a unique three technology (“3t”) approach to generating renewable energy, by integrating solar PV with battery energy storage systems and EV charge points in car parks.

Solar energy from a car park is a low cost, low carbon, innovative way of powering businesses, including factories, offices, shopping centres and leisure venues.  Combining it with a battery and local mains power allows 3ti to provide much needed EV charge points for customers, employees and guests.

EV charging in a solar car park
With around half of UK households unable to charge an EV at home, destination and workplace solar car parks are a cost-effective, sustainable way of providing not only low carbon electricity but also charging infrastructure to support the switch to EVs. 
Installing a solar car park to generate renewable energy and provide EV charge points facilitates destination and workplace charging in large numbers. This allows EV drivers to charge their vehicles whilst at work, out shopping, visiting a theme park or even at the gym!

Solar car park funding
3ti funds the installation and operation of its solar car parks, through a long-term Power Purchase Agreement (PPA), meaning that customers don’t have to commit to any significant capital expenditure.  
The PPA fixes the cost of electricity for the customer, with simple monthly payments for the power generated, delivering immediate savings, visibility of future energy costs and securing long term energy supply.

Why a solar car park?
•	Reduce electricity costs
•	Secure energy supplies
•	Meet sustainability targets
•	Cost certainty and transparency

 * Lift UPS Systems: Su-vastika is also installed more than 500 lift UPS systems, which provide uninterrupted power supply to elevators and Lifts. These Lift UPS has the Lithium battery option as well which keeps the lift working for backup without any break time. By combining the expertise of Kunwer Sachdev founder Su-kam, Inverter Man of India and a focus on cutting-edge technologies, Su-vastika is well-positioned to contribute to the transition to a sustainable and clean energy future.

Name: Solar Survey Ai
Description:
We help utility-scale solar operators produce more energy without adding a single panel.

Solar Survey AI combines drone-based data capture with AI-powered diagnostics to identify performance losses across large solar portfolios. Our platform detects issues like soiling, shading, and thermal anomalies, quantifies their financial impact, and delivers clear, actionable insights to improve yield and asset value.

Whether through our software platform, turnkey inspection services, or autonomous drone systems, Solar Survey AI empowers asset managers, O&M teams, and investors to make data-driven decisions that maximize ROI and portfolio performance.

Mission: To become the intelligence layer for global energy portfolios — starting with solar.

A DNA Elétrica está presente estrategicamente no estado de Minas Gerais, mais especificamente na cidade de Itaúna e região e possui uma equipe de profissionais capacitados, que visa a satisfação de nossos clientes e qualidade em nossos serviços.

A empresa surgiu da união de 3 sócios que acreditam no potencial da energia solar fotovoltaica no Brasil e confiam que este é o melhor caminho para a construção de um futuro e um planeta melhor.

Atendemos os mais diversos consumidores (comerciais, industriais, rurais, residenciais), garantindo uma assistência personalizada e equipamentos de alta qualidade, a fim de assegurar que nossos clientes gerem energia de forma eficiente.

A concepção e a engenharia do sistema fotovoltaico é feita com a máxima dedicação e seriedade, respeitando os limites técnicos dos equipamentos e as normas técnicas cabíveis.

Mediamos a compra de todos os equipamentos e materiais e acompanhamos o frete até o local de instalação, averiguando o cumprimento dos prazos e a correta entrega do que foi solicitado.

Toda a burocracia com a distribuidora é realizada por nós até que a conexão do sistema fotovoltaico à rede seja aprovada.

Qualidade e engenharia levados a sério. Conte conosco!
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: D solar
Description:
D solar

Ülkemizdeki enerji ihtiyacı, nüfus artışı ile paralel olarak, gün geçtikçe büyüyor. Enerji kaynaklarına olan bağımlılık kaçınılmaz bir hal alırken, temiz ve yenilenebilir enerji en iyi çözüm olarak karşımıza çıkıyor. Ülkemizin dünya haritasında ki konumu ve yüzölçümüne bakıldığı zaman en ideal görünen sınırsız enerji kaynağımız GÜNEŞ enerjisi dir.
Amaç

‘’Güneş tarafından işletilen, sürdürülebilir bir dünya yaratmak’’.
Vizyon

Sınırsız enerji kaynaklarını, inovasyona açık beyinler ile güçlendirerek en iyi teknolojiyi, en iyi hizmet ile birleştirip, dünya çapında bir kimlik oluşturmak.

Birlikte Güneşli Günlere…
Tarihçe

Drk Solar 2011 senesinde danışmanlık firması olarak ticari faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Firma içi yapının oluşmasından sonra Kayseri, Konya, Aksaray, Niğde, Nevşehir, İzmir, Antalya, Isparta illerinde GES projeleri geliştirmiş, yatırımcılarına 126 MW lık proje teslim etmiştir. Proje geliştirme faaliyetlerinin son bulmasından sonra 2014 yılından itibaren 1MW üzeri santral kurulumları için çalışmalar yapmış 2017 yıl sonu itibari ile 53 MW santral kurulumunu başarı ile tamamlamıştır. 2018 yılı başlarında ise kurulan santraller için O&M ağı oluşturmuş ve bu ağı geliştirerek Türkiye’nin çeşitli illerinde servis hizmetine başlamıştır. Diğer yandan 10kW altı çatı ve cephe uygulamaları yönetmelik taslağının açıklanması ile, son kullanıcılara daha iyi hizmet verebilmek, çatı sistemlerini uygulamalı olarak göstererek bu alanda öncü olabilmek adına, 400m² lik bir alanda showroom ve ofis alanı yaratarak, D SOLAR markası adı altında, şirket merkezini İzmir’in Urla ilçesine taşımıştır. Gelişmekte olan bu pazarın en büyük markası olabilme hedefinde emin adımlar ile ilerlemektedir.

Experience and expertise

Solar Products and Services

Residential Solar: We make it simple for homeowners to embrace solar energy. Our team of experts will assess your energy needs and design a customized solar system that maximizes energy generation and cost savings for your home.

Commercial Solar: Businesses across all industries can benefit from our commercial solar solutions. From small enterprises to large corporations, we offer tailor-made systems that help companies reduce operating costs and boost sustainability.

Solar Farms: We support utility-scale solar projects that generate clean energy on a larger scale. Our solar farm solutions are designed to meet the energy demands of entire communities and contribute significantly to a greener grid.

Battery Storage Solutions: 
We understand the importance of energy storage for a stable and uninterrupted power supply. Our cutting-edge battery storage solutions store excess energy generated during the day, making it available during peak demand or during cloudy periods.

Solar Maintenance and Support: Once your solar system is installed, our commitment doesn't end there. We provide ongoing maintenance and support to ensure your solar panels function at peak efficiency throughout their lifespan.

Standart güneş panelleri dışında firmamız, bina cephe ve çatılarına uygun özel çözüm ve üretim yapmaktadır.

Ürünlerimiz 12 yıl ürün garantisine ve 30 yıl performans garantisine sahiptir. 
Sahip olduğumuz kalite belgelerimiz; TUV , ISO, OHSAS, CE, IEC 61215, IEC 61730.

Ankara Solar olarak, yenilikçi ve çevreci çözümler sunarak, sürdürülebilir bir gelecek inşa etmeyi hedefliyoruz. Araştırma ve geliştirme departmanımız, sürekli olarak en son teknolojileri takip ederek ürünlerimizi geliştirmekte ve enerji verimliliğini artırmak için çalışmaktadır. Müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı hizmet anlayışımız sayesinde, projelerinizin her aşamasında yanınızda oluyor ve ihtiyaçlarınıza özel çözümler sunuyoruz.

Güneş enerjisinin potansiyelini en üst düzeye çıkaran ürünlerimizle, enerji maliyetlerinizi düşürmek ve çevresel ayak izinizi azaltmak artık çok daha kolay. Endüstriyel, ticari ve bireysel kullanıcılar için geniş ürün yelpazemizle hizmet vermekteyiz. Ayrıca, montaj ve bakım hizmetlerimizle de müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Ankara Solar'ın profesyonel ve deneyimli ekibi, projelerinizin tüm süreçlerinde size destek sağlar. Danışmanlık hizmetlerimizle, doğru ürün seçimi ve kurulum hakkında en iyi yönlendirmeleri yaparak, yatırımınızın geri dönüşünü maksimize etmenize yardımcı oluyoruz. Enerji çözümlerimizle, hem bugünün hem de yarının enerji ihtiyaçlarını karşılayarak, sürdürülebilir bir dünya için birlikte çalışıyoruz.

Geleceğin enerjisi için bugünden adım atın, Ankara Solar ile güneşin gücünü keşfedin!

Name: Heliolytics
Description:
Heliolytics’ consulting services improve the operations of renewable power assets with the use of our proprietary site inspection and data analytics tools and insights.

Heliolytics is the global leader in providing cost-effective aerial inspection services for PV systems. We lead the industry in actionable thermography analysis and reporting with the completion of more than 140 GW of inspections on more than 10,000 sites in sizes varying from 10 kW to 750 MW. We service and partner with solar owners, operators, developers, EPCs, financiers, equipment providers, insurers, asset managers, and independent engineers to optimize portfolio management of solar assets.

Heliolytics aerial inspection services use proprietary aircraft-based sensors to collect high-definition infrared and visual images of all modules on a site. This imagery is post-processed with our in-house imagery analysis software suite to provide accurate maps of fault locations and definitions. These images are analyzed by our PV experts to detect current failures, decipher potential failure modes, and determine the root cause of system faults. On average, we detect $23 million USD worth of annual recoverable revenue for our clients, which corresponds to an average energy loss of 1.2% not otherwise identified by current O&M practices.

Our services provide many benefits to our clients, including optimization of system performance, proactive mitigation of risk, tracking DC performance, reducing O&M costs, and increasing site safety.

Name: Plankton Energy
Description:
Founded in 2018, Plankton Energy is an industry leader providing commercial solar development services. Members of the Plankton Team have worked in the commercial solar industry since 2013. We have deep experience in project development, finance, engineering, and academia. Plankton Energy creates economic and environmental value for its clients with a strong commitment to sustainability.

We develop, engineer, finance, install, own and operate solar energy systems. Plankton is a long-term partner with its clients, providing operations and maintenance services on all systems installed. 

We determine a solar strategy based on our client’s environmental and financial goals. The key to a successful strategy is to incorporate market-specific financial incentives. Incentive programs vary by jurisdiction which will influence the deployment strategy. We tailor a portfolio-wide deployment strategy down to the individual asset level.

We aim to leverage the built environment, developing solar on rooftops, parking lots, and multi-story parking structures. Solar systems can be installed as a retrofit or as part of a building’s initial construction.  

Solar Parking Canopies combine the benefit of covered parking and onsite clean energy generation. Solar Parking Canopies allow you generate income while providing an amenity to the users of your parking lot and making a public statement of your commitment to environmental sustainability.

Rooftop solar transforms unused roof space into a profit center. Our rooftop systems are engineered to meet all building codes and maintain your roof warranty. We do not install solar on roofs with less than 20 years of life remaining.

Plankton’s clients range from houses of worship to publicly traded Real Estate Investment Trusts. We determine an interconnection strategy to maximize value. For the property owner, this may range from site lease revenue to a reduction in electricity expense. We develop solar to increase operating income.

At the same time, we have installed single-axis trackers from ATI, TerraFix, Clavijo, Nextracker, Exosun, Sunfolding, Soltec, RBI, FTC, and Archtech. 

We also worked on Ecolibrium, Aerocompact, Sollega, S5 and Erthos!

Name: SerenySun Energies
Description:
SerenySun Énergies a pour vocation d’accélérer le développement des circuits courts de l’énergie, et notamment à promouvoir le développement de quartiers éco responsables en encourageant la production citoyenne d’énergie renouvelable, par le déploiement de capacités locales de production d’énergie solaire consommée localement. Sa mission est de développer et exploiter des projets solaires photovoltaïques et smartgrid en milieu urbain (en toitures et ombrières). 

SerenySun Énergies est un acteur engagé dans la transition énergétique,  convaincu de la nécessité de favoriser un modèle énergétique moins centralisé. Son ambition est de faciliter les initiatives locales pour promouvoir l’ancrage territorial de la production d’énergie. Il est résolument engagé à faire émerger des solutions pragmatiques pour encourager les initiatives individuelles et citoyennes, en complément et en cohérence avec les initiatives structurelles des pouvoirs publics et réglementaires. 

Le modèle énergétique de demain est résolument orienté vers les circuits courts de l’énergie ; SerenySun a la vocation d’en être l'accélérateur ! 

L’une des missions de SerenySun est de faciliter l’accès à l’énergie solaire aux particuliers résidentiels et aux collectivités locales, grâce à l'autoconsommation collective, en proposant un modèle basé sur l’économie de fonctionnalité. C’est-à-dire, proposer un service d’énergie solaire produit localement sans que les propriétaires résidentiels n’aient à investir dans l’équipement, ce que nous appelons « Solar Energy as-a-Service ».

Name: Green Utility S.p.A
Description:
On March 9th 2007 the European Commission set as a compulsory political target that renewable energy reach 20% of total energy production within 2020.

This ambitious target requires a strong increase in the use of energy resources like sun, wind and biomasses, together with a new approach as to investing in environmentally friendly technologies. In conformity with the EC regulation most of the Member States have implemented measures aimed at increasing both investments and the deployment of new energy production system in the field of renewable sources.

The same day when the new “Green Revolution” broke out in Europe, Green Utility was set up. The company with its innovative solutions concerning energy production set the target of playing an important role in the energy field on a European level for the years to come.

As a Project Developer we are committed to deliver reliable and clean on-grid and off-grid energy where it is mostly needed.

Hexagon Impact VCC is registered as a Variable Capital Company, incorporated in Singapore in 2021 as an umbrella structure of closed-ended sub-funds, dedicated to impactful and ESG investments and acquisitions of operational renewable energy assets globally. 

Our first sub-fund is targeting to open for subscriptions in Q4 2021. The unique features of the fund offer: 

Investment Diversification
The difference between a typical investment fund and Hexagon Impact is the investors' ability to chose the assets you invest in and thereby control your risk exposure.

ESG Impact
Investors at Hexagon Impact make an environmental, social and governance impact by reducing CO2 emissions, saving money to off-takers, reclaiming water and creating work.

Portfolio Growth
While Hexagon Impact and our Fund Manager coordinate and manage the entire portfolio, investors simply need to plan your next investment. 

Performance Transparency
Hexagon Impact takes a conservative asset performance approach with considerable upside potential, while there are no additional asset performance fees to investors. 

Managing Liquidity
Investors can exit their position in any sub-fund at any time by selling thier portion to another investor through Hexagon Impact web platform. 

Risk Mitigation
Investors rely on leading independent third party technical, economic and legal consultants’ Due Diligence reports on each project you at Hexagon Impact.

Name: Kenergia S.r.l.
Description:
Kenergia è una società nata nel 2006  con l’obiettivo di trasformare la tecnologia fotovoltaica in un’importante risorsa energetica nazionale.

Nel corso degli anni  la società si è ampliata e ha modificato la propria offerta seguendo gli sviluppi del mercato, mantenendo uno standard qualitativo elevato e la completa indipendenza dai produttori di componenti ed EPC.

Kenergia è oggi una holding operativa che si occupa direttamente dei servizi di consulenza tecnica, diagnostica avanzata e progetti di ricerca nell’ambito delle energie rinnovabili.

La società è guidata dall’Ing. Giovanni Simoni, uno dei maggiori esperti italiani nel settore del fotovoltaico.

Simoni si occupa professionalmente di energia solare fin dal 1973, anno nel quale ha fondato la prima società di ingegneria nel settore, la “Solar Energy Development” ( S.E.D.) con sede a Londra ed è stato fondatore e primo Presidente dell’E.P.I.A. (European Photovoltaic Industry Association).

Nel 2017, Kenergia si allea con Moroni & Partners, rilevandone una importante quota azionaria e diventando partner strategico per lo svilppo del mercato internazionale.

Moroni & Partners può contare su un team di oltre 50 professionisti, lavora a livello globale e ha sedi UK, Australia, Marocco ed entro l’anno è prevista la prima sede nel territorio sudamericano.

Le principali attività gestite direttamente da Kenergia sono:

- CONSULENZA TECNICA
Diagnostica, revamping a norma GSE,  verifiche as-built, mantenimento dell’incentivo.

- ADVISORY PER IL MERCATO ESTERO
Consulenza e supporto per l'industria italiana nei paesi con il mercato delle energie rinnovabili in via di sviluppo.

- MONITORAGGIO DEGLI ASSET
Sistemi completi per il monitoraggio, software per la gestione degli asset, revamping e manutenzione dei sistemi di monitoraggio.

- EFFICIENTAMENTO E BOLLETTE
Controllo e riduzione dei costi sostenuti per l’energia elettrica e il gas. Nessun costo iniziale pensato per gli utenti commerciali ed industriali.

We specialise in the integration of solar PV and battery energy storage, with a strong focus on energy arbitrage, tariff optimisation, and system modelling. Our team arguably has the most comprehensive understanding in the industry when it comes to battery storage applications and energy arbitrage, enabling us to design and implement systems that maximise both financial return and operational performance.

We offer innovative and financially beneficial energy solutions to commercial and industrial clients, specialising in Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) and Rental Models. Our financial structures allow businesses to benefit from clean, reliable energy with no upfront capital required.

We provide full EPCM (Engineering, Procurement, Construction, and Maintenance) services, managing the entire lifecycle of each project, from feasibility and permitting to commissioning and long-term asset performance.

Our mission is to help businesses transition to a resilient, sustainable, and cost-optimised energy future.

Name: Megacomm Solar
Description:
A Megacomm é uma das maiores distribuidoras de equipamentos fotovoltaicos no Brasil, com mais de 5 anos de experiência no mercado fotovoltaico.

Name: A&R Solar
Description:
A&R Solar installs solar energy systems for homes and businesses across Washington and Oregon. We have offices and staff in Puget Sound, Portland, Bend, and the Eastern Washington area.

We have been designing solar energy systems for Northwest homes since 2007. Our system designers live in Washington and Oregon and have deep experience creating systems that maximize solar potential for each unique project.

Here are two other things that set us apart: We don’t use call centers. We don’t subcontract our electrical work. When you talk to an A&R Solar representative, that person is an employee, perhaps even an employee owner. Ask them.

And here are the things we promise:

1) We’ll show up when we say we’re going to.
2) We’ll do what we say we’re going to
3) We’ll communicate professionally should complications arise.

We're a Certified B Corporation and Social Purpose Corporation, meaning we put people and planet right along with profit.  We also are a Tesla Powerwall Certified Installer, a 3-star Trade Ally of the Energy Trust of Oregon, and have more NABCEP certified employees than any other installer in the Northwest. 

Contact us to see about solar for your home or business--or to see if we have job openings. We look forward to hearing from you.

Name: We Power Latam

Ofrecemos soluciones de energía solar y eficiencia energética en todas las escalas, desde utility Scale hasta residencial. 

Brindamos servicios integrales y confiables para que usted lleve su proyecto desde las ideas hasta la realidad. Nos aseguramos de brindar soluciones en cada etapa, permitiéndole a usted tener la confianza de la rentabilidad de su proyecto. Desde el aseguramiento predial, los estudios previos, las licencias, factibilidad, Estudios de conexión, diseños base y detalle, hasta esquemas financieros y asesoramiento regulatorio. 

El futuro es ahora, ser renovables es ser sostenibles y ser sostenibles es ser eficientes. Un ciclo de mejora constante que catapulta los negocios al éxito y la perdurabilidad!

Nuestra red de profesionales tiene la experiencia y habilidades que usted necesita para estar tranquilo.

Name: Spirit Energy
Description:
Why Spirit Energy?

Established in January 2010, Spirit Energy is based in Reading, Berkshire and installs renewable energy systems all over southern England and the Midlands.

We have installed thousands of residential solar PV systems, and an increasing number of battery storage systems. We have installed several MW of solar PV in the commercial arena, working on behalf of a diverse range of corporate clients, schools, universities, further education colleges, councils, housebuilders and contractors.

In addition we are frequently asked to carry out feasibility studies and portfolio analysis to look at the potential for solar PV and battery storage across a portfolio of properties. We are also often asked for bespoke solutions, anything from a particularly challenging UPS system for an industrial site, to the installation of PV cladding for the side of an Oxford tower block. Increasingly, the requests are for off-grid systems and microgrids, both locally and in far flung locations across the globe.

Recent installs include 634kWp of solar PV for Sparsholt and Andover College (the largest installation of solar PV for a UK educational institution),103kWp solar PV installed for Morgan Sindall on the Dolphin Retail Park in Salisbury, and 50kWp installed for Oxford City Council at its Horspath Depot, as well as many battery storage systems and commercial LED retrofits.

We are passionate about the potential of technology to improve the efficiency and sustainability of energy generation, transmission, storage and usage. We are not salespeople, just engineers with a commitment to technical excellence and a belief that we can help to pioneer a more sustainable future.

We would be delighted to assist you in your project, whether residential or commercial, so please get in touch if you would like further information, or a quotation.

funcionamiento de todos los equipos.

Name: IMPIANTI SOLARI Ing.Patrizi
Description:
Per ogni tua esigenza di RISPARMIO ENERGETICO rivolgiti a noi, veri professionisti del settore. Dal 2007 Progettiamo e Realizziamo Chiavi in mano il tuo sistema per l’INDIPENDENZA ENERGETICA

Gli oltre 1000 impianti già realizzati sono le nostre migliori garanzie di Serietà, Professionalità e Competenze al tuo servizio nei settori: FOTOVOLTAICO, BATTERIE di ACCUMULO, POMPE di CALORE, SISTEMI IBRIDI, CLIMATIZZATORI,  EFFICIENZA ENERGETICA. Il nostro motto è: SENZA QUALITA’ NON C’E’ FUTURO

IMPIANTI SOLARI Ing.Patrizi&Patrizi srl è stata fondata nel 2007 a Ravenna dall’ing. Patrizi Francesco; si è distinta nel territorio come una delle prime realtà nate nel settore delle energie rinnovabili in grado di realizzare dal più semplice al più complesso impianto energetico chiavi in mano. Dal 2007 a oggi Impianti Solari Srl si è affermata con successo a livello nazionale (con due sedi in Italia: una a Ravenna sede Legale e Operativa; e l’altra a Luco dei M. -AQ-) interpretando le esigenze del mercato di riferimento. Ha organizzato la propria struttura creando le apposite Divisioni specialistiche, elevando così a sistema la produzione di soluzioni su misura.

L’alta qualità dei prodotti e dei servizi proposti è garantita dall’attenzione per il dettaglio; dallo studio di fattibilità alla progettazione, dalla scelta dei materiali all’installazione, dalla gestione dell’iter burocratico all’avvio in esercizio dell’impianto.

IMPIANTI SOLARI Ing.Patrizi&Patrizi srl si avvale di personale specializzato ed è capace di venire incontro ad ogni esigenza realizzando soluzioni totalmente personalizzate, scegliendo i materiali più appropriati e la tecnologia più idonea in base al luogo, alla tipologia e alla dimensione dell’impianto, con l’obiettivo di massimizzare le prestazioni energetiche del sistema. L’alta qualità dei servizi proposti è garantita dall’attenzione per il dettaglio, dalla fase progettuale alla installazione dell’impianto, fino alla gestione di tutto l’iter burocratico.

Name: The Sól Energy
Description:
The Sol Energy specializes in custom designing and implementing commercial, industrial, and utility scale solar energy systems. We handle all type certifications and applications for our clients, and also provide funding for various solar projects.

Our team of dedicated engineers is committed to producing clean, reliable, and cost-effective energy solutions that can be stored and backed up. We conduct thorough desktop designs and studies to ensure that our solar systems are optimized for maximum power generation with minimal investment. Additionally, we offer training to our customers on the solar plants and their online monitoring app, allowing them to effectively manage and monitor their solar plant.

We provide excellent after-care service and technical support, available 24/7 for your peace of mind. Our solar systems are designed to be upgradable, and we work with our clients from the beginning to discuss long-term plans and ensure they invest in the best products upfront.

Name: SOLON Corporation
Description:
SOLON Corporation is a leading provider of large commercial and utility-scale photovoltaic system solutions and battery energy storage systems to the Southwest United States. SOLON delivers complete and cost-effective turnkey PV systems to its clients with a streamlined approach from project development, design, and construction to financing and O&M.

From start to finish, SOLON manages your project with industry-leading experience. Each client and site is a unique project with complex and varying issues that require prudent decision making to maximize the solar benefits. SOLON performs a custom analysis of every site and proposes a solution that provides the greatest monetary benefit; as opposed to building the largest solar project possible at the expense of reduced efficiencies. Existing conditions, future upgrades, shading, and other details are all incorporated into a thoughtful and skilled solar design.

SOLON is driven by a passion for innovation and a commitment to providing superior solar energy solutions with unrivaled quality and reliability. We are committed to solar power and providing our clients the best solutions for deriving the greatest value out of solar energy.

Su creación proviene de la unión de grupos inversores relacionados con la ingeniería y las infraestructuras agrícolas, los servicios a explotaciones agrarias, las energías renovables y el I+D+i.
Tenemos el conocimiento del sector primario y sus industrias asociadas, diferenciándonos de la gran cantidad de empresas relacionadas con la energía, en que aportamos soluciones específicas adaptadas a ese sector.
Esos son los valores de AGROENER: Ofrecer soluciones adaptadas, específicas para cada cliente y situación, de forma que supongan ahorro en su consumo eléctrico.

Name: Biotech Energia
Description:
Siamo un team altamente qualificato e dinamico che ha sposato la filosofia del rispetto dell’ambiente e del risparmio energetico.
Realizziamo sistemi “chiavi in mano”, dalla consulenza preliminare allo studio di fattibilità, dalla progettazione al conseguimento dei titoli autorizzativi, dall’installazione, sino al collaudo e alla messa in servizio/monitoraggio/manutenzione degli impianti per Aziende, Enti Pubblici e Privati.

Investire nelle energie rinnovabili e nell’efficienza energetica significa utilizzare tecnologie in grado di generare notevoli benefici economici salvaguardando l’ambiente.
Inoltre, le vigenti Disposizioni Legislative consentono, grazie ai premianti meccanismi di incentivazione ed alle detrazioni fiscali, un rapido rientro dei costi di investimento sostenuti.

Garantendoti risparmi e ricavi, ti renderemo energeticamente indipendente, ti aiuteremo a ridurre i consumi, migliorando l’efficienza energetica di edifici, attività produttive, uffici e abitazioni.

I nostri sistemi sono equipaggiati con le migliori apparecchiature e tecnologie ad oggi disponibili sul mercato.
La nostra progettazione e i nostri servizi O&M ti assicureranno sempre le migliori prestazioni, perché se ci dai la possibilità di alleggerire l'impronta ecologica della tua azienda o della tua casa, lo faremo nel modo migliore possibile, senza compromessi.
La qualità dei nostri sistemi è la garanzia del tuo investimento.

Name: Gama Energia
Description:
Fundada em 2021, a Gama Energia é especializada na terceirização de serviços para o setor de energia solar, oferecendo soluções que garantem mais tempo e agilidade para empresas e profissionais da área.

Nossa missão é simplificar e otimizar processos, promovendo eficiência e competitividade no mercado de energia renovável. Atuamos com excelência em três pilares principais:

1 Energia Solar Fotovoltaica: Desenvolvemos projetos executivos, realizamos homologações rápidas e oferecemos consultoria técnica especializada.
2 Locação de Equipamentos: Fornecemos tecnologia moderna e eficiente para impulsionar seus projetos.
3 Laudos Periciais: Emitimos laudos técnicos confiáveis para garantir segurança e conformidade.

A energia solar é uma solução essencial para um futuro sustentável, com benefícios diretos para as pessoas, o meio ambiente e o setor energético. Nosso objetivo é fortalecer a presença dessa fonte limpa e renovável no mercado brasileiro, oferecendo serviços que tornam o trabalho de nossos clientes mais dinâmico e eficiente.

Gama Energia: dinamismo, competitividade e segurança no setor de energia solar.

Name: Independent Power
Description:
Independent Power has been designing and installing premium solar+storage systems for residential and commercial customers in Colorado and Montana since 1996. Our team of highly skilled engineers, electricians, and installers is committed to innovation in energy resilience and sustainability as well as helping the community achieve energy independence, do right by the environment, and save money in the process. To date, IPS has installed thousands of grid-tied, off-grid, remote wind, and microgrid systems including several challenging international projects for large commercial clients and the military. We take integrity very seriously and are not satisfied unless all our designs and installations are completed with long-term energy security and resilience in mind. Using the most powerful solar panels on the market and robust energy storage solutions, we provide high-quality, high-efficiency installations no matter the application. We’re proud to consistently achieve exceptionally high levels of customer satisfaction and delivering superior solar technologies to our communities. Our designs and installations are done in-house by our engineers, licensed electricians, and certified installers, and each comes with their own industry-leading warranty as proof of our confidence in our services and products. 
We are active in our communities, with many of our employees volunteering their time and passions with local organizations and helping to advance renewable energy policies at nearly every level of government. When our founder first started IPS, he was instrumental in educating the state utility on the virtues of solar energy and was ultimately awarded installation of the first grid-connected solar system in the state as well as the country. Today we are leaders in battery backup systems designed and installed to provide energy when it’s needed most.

Name: Yes Solar Solutions
Description: Yes Solar Solutions is the only NABCEP-accredited solar installer in NC, the first Tesla Powerwall certified installer in NC, a certified Green Plus company, and a woman owned company. Yes Solar has been designing, selling, and installing customized solar systems, electric vehicle charging stations, solar storage, and battery backup solutions for commercial, residential, government, and nonprofit clients in Cary and the surrounding areas since 2009. We set solar industry standards, make solar accessible, and guarantee the power of independence. We provide turnkey solutions to enhance our customers’ sustainability while providing the strongest customer experience available.

Name: Landsmill Solar
Description:
Landsmill Group, a long-established conglomerate with a robust presence in the FMCG sector, under the leadership of the Promoters is venturing into a green and sustainable manufacturing sector in Solar through Landsmill Solar. 
The Landsmill Group is establishing a groundbreaking venture in India’s renewable energy sector by setting up the country’s first fully integrated solar module manufacturing line. This pioneering project will encompass the entire production process, from raw materials to finished solar modules, including:
	Solar Module Assembly Manufacturing Unit
	Solar Glass
	Solar Aluminium Panel
	Solar EVA Sheet
	Solar PV Bush Bar Ribbon
	Latest Technology Solar Cells
To support this ambitious endeavour, Landsmill Group shall establish an integrated complex, which shall enable the company to:
	Enhance production efficiency
	Reduce reliance on imports
	Foster innovation and R&D
	Create employment opportunities
	Contribute to India’s renewable energy goals
By setting up this comprehensive manufacturing facility, Landsmill Group is poised to make a significant impact on India’s solar energy landscape, driving growth, sustainability, and energy self-reliance.
Benefits to the Nation:
	Reduced Dependence on Imports: Self-sufficiency in solar module production, minimizing reliance on international suppliers.
	Job Creation: Generating employment opportunities in manufacturing, research, and development.
	Economic Growth: Boosting the economy through increased investment, production, and exports.
	Renewable Energy Promotion: Supporting India’s commitment to renewable energy and reducing carbon footprint.
	Technological Advancements: Introducing cutting-edge technology, enhancing the country’s manufacturing capabilities.
	Increased Energy Security: Contributing to India’s energy self-reliance, reducing reliance on fossil fuels.
	Environmental Benefits: Encouraging sustainable energy production, reducing greenhouse gas emissions.

Name: Australian Centre for Advanced Photovoltaics
Description:
ACAP is a national research collaboration that was established in 2013 to advance Australia’s leadership position in photovoltaics by bringing together the nation’s leading solar photovoltaic research institutions in a coordinated longer-term research program. ACAP was established with the mission to provide a pipeline of opportunities to increase solar PV performance and reduce costs. ACAP has been very successful in this mission.

In 2022 ARENA laid out its vision for Ultra Low Cost Solar: by 2030, ARENA wants commercial solar cells to hit 30% efficiency, up from 22% today. Additionally, it wants large scale full system costs (panels, inverters and transmission) to fall by 50% to 30 cents per watt. In achieving these ambitious goals, the cost of electricity would be as low as $15/MWhr, opening vast opportunities in green industrial processing, such as green- steel and green-ammonia. 

To achieve these targets the research program at the Australian Centre for Advanced Photovoltaics (ACAP) has been extended out to 2030.
 
Led by the University of New South Wales, ACAP's partner institutions now include the Australian National University, CSIRO, University of Melbourne, Monash University, University of Queensland and the University of Sydney.  ACAP also works with industry partners, joining the dots from technology breakthrough to commercialisation.

Solar PV technology is revolutionary, despite being in its early stages. It needs to be deployed as quickly as possible to enable the continued learning and enhancement of the technology.
Concurrently, to fully decarbonise every sector of our economy, including the industrial processes needed for producing green steel and aluminium, we must invest in research and development. This will help drive down the costs of solar PV even further.

SOSTENERE lo sviluppo delle energie rinnovabili in Italia con gli obiettivi del 2030 e 2050;

Debemos de ser conscientes que cada elemento que extingamos no podrá ser sustituido. Permitamos hacer a la sociedad partícipe en el cuidado del planeta. Contamos con un equipo técnico multidisciplinario con años de experiencia en las diversas ramas de la ingeniería ( eléctrica, electrónica y energética ), cumpliendo con las expectativas y los altos estándares de las industrias más exigentes y trabajando para mantener la continuidad en el camino de la excelencia. La planificación, gestión y optimización de costes marcan la diferencia de los trabajos.
Nuestra misión es proporcionar soluciones, que aporten mejoras competitivas, de manera eficiente, innovadora y sobre todo sostenible, siendo cada cliente y proyecto tratado de forma individual, para dar respuestas óptimas y personalizadas en cada caso. Todo ello manteniendo una filosofía en la que todas las partes implicadas en un proyecto obtengan beneficios. Contribuimos al avance tecnológico que está sucediendo hoy en día, ayudando, aconsejando y orientando a nuestros clientes para que adapten, bajo sus posibilidades, sus instalaciones para esta nueva era.

Name: Moose Power Inc.
Description:
Moose Power is one of Ontario’s leading full-service solar developers, specializing in commercial, industrial, and multi-residential rooftop solar projects. With 15+ years of experience, we manage every step of the process—from permitting and financing to engineering, construction, and lifetime operational support.

We collaborate closely with building owners, tenants, and institutional partners to deliver reliable, high-performance solar systems that generate long-term value. Our flexible, turnkey approach minimizes time investment for clients while maximizing energy savings and financial returns.

Name: Pakistan Solar Solutions
Description: We are the Solar Energy Specialists driven to create an affordable and a clean energy future for residential, commercial & industrial entities in the region.

Name: EY Enterprise
Description:
EY Enterprise is a premier Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) company headquartered in Karachi, Pakistan. We specialize in solar energy, Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), MEP (Mechanical, Electrical & Plumbing), and Pre-Engineered Building (PEB) solutions for commercial, industrial, and institutional clients.

Our turnkey services include:

Solar Power Systems (On-Grid, Hybrid, Net Metering)

Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) — Peak Shaving, Backup, Load Management

Pre-Engineered Steel Buildings (PEB) — Warehousing, Industrial Sheds

HVAC, Electrical, and Plumbing Systems

Industrial Automation & Smart Energy Management

EY Enterprise is known for technical expertise, on-time execution, and sustainable engineering practices. Our experienced in-house teams deliver reliable, compliant, and cost-efficient energy and infrastructure solutions tailored to Pakistan’s industrial and environmental needs.

Whether it’s powering factories with hybrid solar + BESS, building LEED-certified structures, or executing complex MEP projects—we engineer smarter energy futures.

Name: Solar Energy Bucharest Summit
Description:
Welcome to SOLAR ENERGY BUCHAREST SUMMIT the most important expo-conference in the solar energy field in Romania. The objective of this event is to bring together the biggest international producers of solar panels with the biggest investors in the solar industry in Romania, with local or international capital.
The event will take place on the 28th of October in Bucharest, at Radisson Blu Hotel. Located in the heart of the city, SOLAR ENERGY BUCHAREST SUMMIT will represent the core of the new business in Romania – renewable energy.

With an estimated 5.000 MW of solar capacity to be installed in the next 7 years, evaluated at 3 billion Euros, Romania has become the newest destination for investors, producers, and developers in solar.
The event will have a special format: an expo-conference with stands where the industry producers, the investors, the banks, or any other interested stakeholders will have their special space for contacts, meetings, and discussions.
We hope that you can join us and meet the people who will help you make the right decision when investing in the solar energy business in Romania.

Name: SYSTÈMES SOLAIRES
Description: Située à Cournon d'Auvergne 63800 depuis 2007, SYSTÈMES SOLAIRES est spécialisée dans l’installation de centrales photovoltaïques avec une spécialisation dans le domaine de l’autoconsommation photovoltaïque avec ou sans stockage ainsi que dans l’installation en sites industriels de forte puissance.

Name: ASP Energía

Name: Excell Energy and PowerGen Corp.
Description:
Excell Energy and Powergen Corp. (Excell Energy) is a Philippine-based solar solutions provider established in 2019. It is a subsidiary of Mabuhay Energy Corporation, a Retail Electricity Supplier in the Philippines duly licensed by the Energy Regulatory Commission.

Our ultimate goal is to empower commercial businesses and industrial companies to reduce carbon footprint and play their part in tackling climate change. We do this by making solar more accessible through innovative financial and technological solutions, one solar rooftop at a time.

Name: RST CleanTech Solutions
Description:
The RST Cleantech Solution is an automated solar panel cleaning system designed to increase solar energy production and preserve your panel warranty. The system uses filtering technologies and advanced water engineering to treat water scaling and corrosion found in water sources around the world. It is designed and developed in accordance with the solar panel manufacturers’ warranties and maintenance guidelines – and it is one of the only solar panel cleaning systems in the world that is completely green. We don't add chemicals and avoid all chemical byproducts.

RST CleanTech Solutions Ltd was established in 2013 and has since become a global leader in automated panel cleaning, cleaning over 1,000,000 panels every day around the world. We have sales and marketing offices in USA, Latin America and Middle East, specializing in solar PV industry, automatic operation and maintenance (O&M) solutions.

Name: Newen Solar SpA
Description:
Newen Solar somos una empresa chilena con más de 4 años de experiencia asociada al ámbito de la ingeniería eléctrica y energía solar, contando con profesionales con más de 17 años de experiencia profesional y 8 años dimensionando, evaluando y desarrollando proyectos de energías renovables, específicamente de generación solar. 

Te entregamos asesoría especializada y capacitación en las áreas de energía solar y sustentabilidad.

Name: Manalco Power - LibanEnergie
Description:
Manalco Sal - LibanEnergie is committed to delivering the most lucrative investments in renewable power and power protection equipment. Our team of highly skilled engineers excels in crafting innovative systems, optimizing existing ones, and enhancing energy efficiency to reduce operational costs. Complementing these experts is our meticulous crew of field technicians, specializing in installation, relocation, preventive maintenance, and swift emergency repairs.

Our extensive inventory at Manalco Sal includes a wide range of equipment:
Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS)
Batteries (both lithium and Sealed Lead Acid - SLA)
Solar Panels & Inverters
Battery Energy Storage
Electric Vehicle (EV) Chargers

We offer comprehensive turnkey solutions in 3 key areas:

PV Services and Solar Inverters: This encompasses engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning, operations, and maintenance. We also provide expert assistance in project feasibility and energy performance analysis. Our commitment to excellence extends to high-end panels, inverters, and storage solutions, all backed by a robust 29-year warranty and flexible financing options.

Electric Vehicle Charging Stations (EV Mobility): Our offerings include a diverse range of EV charging stations for both home and business use. These stations feature a modular system for easy installation, maintenance upgrades, and, above all, exceptional quality. We not only handle the installation and online integration of each station but also provide comprehensive support, including tracking and billing for every charging session, as well as operational and management assistance.

UPS Systems: In summary, UPS systems are a cornerstone of our commitment to delivering reliable and efficient power protection solutions. Our diverse product range, advanced technology, and unwavering dedication to customer satisfaction make us the go-to choice for businesses and individuals seeking dependable power continuity solutions.

Description:
