Name: Carson Power
Description:
Our mission is to transition our planet to one that is powered by clean energy and no longer relies on fossil fuels. We do that by creating and building solar and storage power plants, and by investing in a broader range of issues, including promoting diversity in the energy industry and access to renewable energy for low income households in the US.

New York is on a path to achieving 70% renewable energy generation by 2030 and 100% by 2040, Carson Power is here to support that path towards these goals. We develop and own solar and storage projects to support the energy transition of the State of New York.

Name: Visiolar GmbH
Description:
Mit maßgeschneiderten Solarenergie-Lösungen entwickeln wir von VISIOLAR nachhaltige Projekte im Bereich der erneuerbaren Energien und schaffen langfristigen Mehrwert im ländlichen Raum. Wir fördern die strukturelle Aufwertung der Region, generieren Einnahmen für Kommunen, Flächeneigentümer und Landwirte und liefern günstigen grünen Strom für die Bürger.

Erneuerbare Energie aus Solarstrom erhöht die regionale Wertschöpfung dauerhaft, schafft wertvolle Strukturvorteile und trägt zu einer nachhaltigen Zukunft für uns alle bei. Um die Nutzung von Solarstrom noch effizienter und flexibler zu gestalten, integrieren wir Batteriespeichersysteme (BESS) in unsere Projekte. Diese sorgen für eine zuverlässige Energieversorgung, indem sie Solarstrom speichern und bedarfsgerecht bereitstellen. Darüber hinaus verbessern sie die Netzstabilität, indem sie kurzfristige Schwankungen ausgleichen, und reduzieren Spitzenlasten, wodurch das Stromnetz entlastet wird.
Unsere Freiflächen- und Agri-Photovoltaik-Projekte, ergänzt durch diese innovativen Speicherlösungen, bringen konkrete Vorteile für die Menschen in der Region.
Location: Winsen an der Aller, Lower Saxony

Name: Franensa
Description:

The members of Franensa’s board, with more than 20 years of experience in developing large-scale solar PV projects, have successfully designed and built over 2,000 MW (2 GW) of solar plants across Spain and Latin America.

Today, Franensa maintains strong partnerships with major industrial clients, investment corporations, and energy suppliers, who rely on our proven expertise to deliver solar projects that are well-designed, efficiently executed, and built to last. In addition, Franensa brings the financial capacity to execute projects directly, ensuring timely delivery and long-term reliability.

Description:
Wij zijn de grootste energiecoöperatie in Groningen en één van de grootsten van Nederland. Erg gaaf, want hiermee vervullen we een pionierspositie. Met veel aandacht en daadkracht faciliteren we dat er 100% groene energie wordt opgewekt dóór Groningers, vóór Groningers. Samen zijn wij Grunneger Power! 

Grunneger Power zorgt ervoor dat iedereen kan meedoen om Groningen duurzaam te maken. Wij helpen met het besparen, opwekken en gebruiken van groene energie. Zo investeren we samen in een duurzaam Groningen en een mooiere wereld. Daarmee wordt energie groener en ook weer van onszelf.

VenFeld transformeert de wereld met hoogwaardige en innovatieve technologie in energieoplossingen.

Name: Consórcio Solar Panorama
Description: Atuando no cenário de energia renovável a CSP, se destaca como referência neste segmento de implantação de usinas fotovoltaicas e trabalhou com uma grande gama de trackers como Soltec, STI Nortland, Convert Italia, Nextracker, Brametal e  Archtech e outros, tornando se referência na prestação de  serviço.

Name: Adriatica Energia
Description: La nostra mission è guidare lo sviluppo dell'energia solare come principale fonte di energia. Attraverso la trasformazione della nostra conoscenza ed esperienza in soluzioni innovative, ci impegniamo a migliorare il benessere e il progresso dell'umanità. Promuoviamo uno sviluppo economico sostenibile minimizzando l'impatto ambientale e ci posizioniamo come leader del settore grazie alla nostra esperienza, trasparenza, flessibilità, redditività e qualità.

Name: Amaranto Group
Description:
Realtà imprenditoriale italiana in continua espansione dal 2010, il Gruppo Amaranto trae la sua forza dalla sinergia delle società controllate e ad esso collegate con una costante spinta verso l'innovazione. La diversificazione dei segmenti di business, oltre a quello principale delle energie rinnovabili in cui opera, e l’affidabilità nell'implementazione dei progetti, sono i fattori chiave del suo successo. 
Grazie a partnership strategiche con i principali player del settore, ha elaborato e realizzato alcuni dei più importanti progetti per la produzione di energia da fonti rinnovabili. 
Nel 2013, conquista il podio nella classifica del IHS Technology Report come installatore di impianti fotovoltaici a terra grazie alla realizzazione di 90 MW in Romania, attraverso l’operato della sua partecipata Energia Prima SpA. 
Nel corso degli anni, il Gruppo ha integrato gradualmente l’intera filiera di produzione di energia, dallo sviluppo, al servizio EPC, completando i servizi offerti con opere di manutenzione ordinaria e straordinaria degli impianti, fino alla gestione globale degli asset, oltre a diventare investitore in proprio. 
Grazie ad un team multidisciplinare, cresciuto nelle professionalità, è in grado di offrire ai propri clienti un know-how basato sulle numerose e complesse casistiche incontrate nel corso delle diverse iniziative, continuando, in un’ottica di diversificazione, ad orientarsi verso tutti i mercati mondiali, nessuno escluso a priori.

Name: NRGreen
Description:
NRGreen er en ledende totalleverandør af solcelle- og batterianlæg til erhverv, industri og landbrug. Vi er en del af TSG Group. 

Med over 12 års erfaring og mere end 350 succesfulde solcelleprojekter ved vi, hvordan vi bedst leverer løsninger, der ikke kun gavner miljøet, men også din bundlinje.

NRGreen analyserer jeres virksomheds energibehov og foreslår den mest miljørigtige løsning til den bedste pris. Vi står for alle ansøgninger og tilladelser.

Når løsningerne er installerede, står vi for drift og vedligehold af installationen.

NRGreen kan tilbyde at finansiere din virksomheds grønne løsning  - besparelserne bruges til betaling af investeringen.

Derfor koster det intet at omlægge til en bedre, billigere og mere miljørigtig løsning fra NRGreen.

Name: Younergy Solar
Description: At Younergy Solar, we are pioneers in solar energy, offering tailored solutions for a cleaner and sustainable energy future. With our expertise since 2015, we empower individuals and businesses to switch to clean energy today. Together, let's build a future powered by the sun, where everyone can contribute to a greener and more balanced world. Join us on this mission towards a brighter energy future.

Name: Arkolia
Description:
Arkolia est un énergéticien intégré qui se positionne parmi les principaux acteurs multi-énergies français. Actif sur les domaines du photovoltaïque, de l’éolien et du gaz vert, Arkolia possède des capacités de production installées ou en construction de 900 MWc en 2025, réparties sur plus de 3 000 sites.

Notre différence réside dans notre approche multi-énergies et notre capacité à développer une technologie française de rupture, notamment dans la filière biogaz avec 9 brevets déposés.

Nous intervenons dans les études et la conception, l’administratif et le financier, la construction, l’exploitation et la maintenance afin d’optimiser le rendement des centrales électriques.

Créée en 2009, la société compte aujourd'hui 260 collaborateurs partageant 3 valeurs fortes : humanité, innovation et performance.

Chiffres clés :
CA 2024 : 225 M€ (181 M€ CA construction + 44 M€ production d'énergie) 
CA 2023 : 190 M€ (150 M€ CA construction + 40 M€ production d'énergie)
CA 2022 : 128 M€ ( 94 M€ CA construction + 34 M€ production d'énergie)
CA 2021 : 98 M€ (71 M€ construction + 27 M€ production d'énergie)

+ de 3000 centrales construites

Pour en savoir plus sur Arkolia : www.arkolia.com

Name: Solcor Chile
Description:
Solcor Chile, parte de Energy Holding, grupo internacional de origen belga con más de 10 años de experiencia en soluciones energéticas sostenibles, desarrolla, financia y opera proyectos solares para empresas, ayudándolas a reducir costos y avanzar hacia una operación más eficiente y limpia.

Con más de 500 plantas solares conectadas en Chile, entregamos acuerdos simples, transparentes y de largo plazo que impulsan el crecimiento sostenible de cada cliente. 

 www.solcorchile.com

Name: Better Energy
Description:
Better Energy is a renewable energy company. Together with our partners, we power the green transition. We develop, construct and operate large-scale solar parks that deliver green energy to companies. Because choosing green energy is good for business and better for all of us. 

We sell the green energy from our solar parks to companies through Power Purchase Agreements. 

We develop our parks to have an impact in the nearby region and with a fundamental respect for local communities and nature. This approach is embedded in our strategy, our way of working and our commitment to nature.

Name: Axial Structural Solutions
Description:
Axial Structural Solutions is a benchmark in the design and manufacture of fixed structural systems and solar trackers for photovoltaic installations. From the beginning, as expert manufacturers of photovoltaic structures, Axial has become a partner with experience, international presence, prestige and a great accumulated know-how.

Axial’s business project is based on a high level of technological development, providing great advances in the design and manufacture of solar structures and trackers for photovoltaic installations.  Axial is present throughout the project, from its initial design to its execution, in order to achieve excellence and customer satisfaction through its products and services.

In recent years Axial Structural Solutions has undergone a consolidated growth that has led it to be a company of reference in the photovoltaic sector.

Name: ECO Soluções em Energia
Description:
A Eco Soluções em Energia é pioneira no Nordeste no segmento de energia solar. Fundada em 2010 por um engenheiro de produção, a empresa é especialista em oferecer  as melhores formas de captação solar para cada perfil de cliente.  Sediada em Fortaleza, no Ceará, a Eco atua com excelência nas áreas de micro e minigeração de energia renovável, construindo parcerias com os principais fabricantes do setor ao mesmo tempo que desenvolve projetos de grande alcance local, regional e nacional. Vanguardista em tecnologia e engajada nas importantes transformações do mercado de energias renováveis, a Eco Energia está em acelerada expansão e se destaca em um próspero e relevante segmento. 

A Eco acredita que soluções em energia podem impactar cidades e municípios, transformando a realidade de diversos setores da sociedade e suas classes sociais, gerando resultados positivos, crescentes e não poluentes. Mais do que placas solares e soluções em energia, a Eco vende dinamismo, inovação, modernidade, futuro plantado e regado no presente, que gera frutos socioambientais reais. 

Está é uma empresa que visiona além do seu tempo, profundamente enraizada em seus valores éticos e no seu compromisso em fazer deste um mundo que valoriza sua natureza, trabalha em resgate do seu meio ambiente e desconstrói diferenças para reconstruir qualidade de vida e um futuro melhor.

Name: KSL Cleantech Limited
Description:
𝐊𝐒𝐋 𝐂𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐡 𝐋𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐝, Authorized Channel Partner of 𝐀𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐢 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐚𝐫, is an ambitious, audacious, fast emerging Clean Technologies and Solar Power Company with presence across India and abroad.

We 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧, 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐮𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞, 𝐛𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐝 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞 solar photovoltaic systems and plants varying from 𝐤𝐖 𝐬𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐦𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢 - 𝐌𝐖 𝐬𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐞. The systems are designed to meet diversified needs- from rural electrification to powering urban growth areas, defense outposts to banking centers, residential apartments to industrial complexes - in all sectors. We offer the complete range of solutions from design, engineering, supply, installation, financing, operation and maintenance. We have an overall experience of over 400+ Solar Power Plant installations across the country over the past decade.

We are constantly evolving as a company into new and emerging Cleantech areas including Water Systems, Electric Mobility, Storage Systems.

At KSL, we dream of a transformed world which is absolutely driven by clean & smart technologies in each aspect of our lives - energy, mobility, productivity.
 
𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐚𝐜𝐡 - 𝘌𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘺 𝘊𝘭𝘪𝘦𝘯𝘵 & 𝘗𝘳𝘰𝘫𝘦𝘤𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘵𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘸𝘪𝘵𝘩 𝘶𝘵𝘮𝘰𝘴𝘵 𝘐𝘮𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘢𝘯𝘤𝘦.

✶ On finalization, our company will execute the project on a turnkey basis and also provide after sales service / maintenance on a regular basis. We have a dedicated team of in-house service professionals to offer site support and maintenance 24x7 online.

Name: Alligator Solar (Alligator Energies Pvt Ltd)
Description:
Founded in 2015, Alligator Solar (Alligator Energies Pvt. Ltd.) is the renewable energy arm of Alligator Automations, dedicated to revolutionizing the solar energy sector. Our mission extends beyond conventional approaches, focusing on delivering economically viable and eco-friendly solutions that make a significant positive impact on the environment by reducing greenhouse gas emissions.

We specialize in cutting-edge solar energy systems that are at the forefront of the movement toward a cleaner, more sustainable future. Our innovative technology and highly skilled, dynamic team are key to our success, enabling us to tackle challenges with exceptional expertise.

At Alligator Solar, we are committed to the highest standards of performance, cost-effectiveness, and reliability. In a world increasingly affected by climate change, our vision is to lead the transition to more sustainable energy solutions. We aim to provide affordable, dependable, and eco-friendly energy, paving the way for a secure and green future.

Join us in powering a new era of solar energy and making a positive impact on our planet.

Description: Conheça a IVI Energia, uma empresa que nasceu para ser protagonista em geração distribuída no Brasil.

Name: RAYZON GREEN PVT LTD
Description:
Rayzon Green Pvt. Ltd. is a leading solar EPC company that specializes in providing sustainable energy solutions tailored to industrial and ground-mounted projects. As a trusted subsidiary of Rayzon Solar, we excel in managing EPC projects with a strong emphasis on cost-effectiveness and resource efficiency. Our experienced team ensures that each project operates at its highest potential, delivering long-term value to clients.

At Rayzon Green, we are dedicated to helping businesses meet their energy and sustainability goals. Our commitment to optimizing project outcomes through best practices enables us to drive impactful results, reducing carbon emissions and contributing to a greener future. Focusing on delivering high-quality solutions, we work hand-in-hand with our clients to meet their unique energy needs.

Name: Freedom Forever
Description:
Freedom Forever is a residential solar installation company that partners with solar sales companies in the industry. Since 2011, we have enabled our dealer partners’ success with a premium offering and a 25-year production guarantee that provides the ultimate peace of mind for homeowners making the big investment. With Freedom Forever, homeowners know what they’re getting every time.

We currently service 36 states out of 57 large, regional installation hubs. Our headquarters in Temecula, CA, and Las Vegas, NV are home to some of the most forward-thinking and diverse professionals in the industry, who truly embody the Freedom Way of disruption, servant leadership, accountability, integrity, diversity, and collaboration.  

We continue to expand at a very rapid pace as witnessed by Freedom Forever being on the Inc. 5000 list 7 years in a row!  As we grow, so does our Freedom Family, and we are always looking for great new members. Come join one of America’s top-rated solar installation companies, where we offer competitive benefits to all employees, such as healthcare, dental, vision, 401K, Life Insurance covered 100% by Freedom, a wellness program, and employee perks discounts, as well as competitive install bonuses for crews. Please send your resume to staffing@freedomforever.com. If you’re interested in partnering with us as an Independent Authorized Dealer, please visit https://freedomforever.com/dealer/

Name: Valmont Solar
Description:
Valmont Solar is one powerful partner, brining together more than 75 years as a global manufacturer of vital infrastructure, decades of trusted partnership with utilities, and nearly 20 years of technical expertise in solar tracker technology. Count on Valmont Solar to deliver with optimized design features customized to our diverse global markets so you know your solution can meet any local challenge like tough terrain, domestic content and regulatory requirements, or demanding delivery schedules. 

With over 6.2GW of projects around the world, our Convert Single-Axis Solar Trackers have been setting the industry standard for nearly 20 years with their streamlined design, ensuring the fastest installation times as verified by lean experts. This efficiency, along with low maintenance requirements, and boosting energy production by up to 25% over traditional fixed-tilt systems translates into a powerful, low LCOE solution for your next project.

Name: Orb Energy
Description:
Orb Energy is a vertically integrated solar energy solutions provider - including manufacturing solar photovoltaic panels in Bengaluru and financing SME customers. Established in 2006 in India, we specialise in photovoltaic systems for rooftop and ground mounted applications. Orb Energy also has a subsidiary in Kenya serving the African solar market.

Our product portfolio includes residential, commercial and industrial solar photovoltaic and solar water heating solutions. Orb's USP remains its end-to-end integrated approach to helping customers transition to solar energy – including manufacturing, system design, sales consultancy, installation, after-sales service, government liaison for connection, to in-house finance. 

The 400+ strong team is spread across 12 states of India - Karnataka, Maharashtra, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Odisha, Delhi NCR, Gujarat, Haryana and Madhya Pradesh – where Orb is particularly strong in working with SMEs.
 
We are unique in offering an in-house credit facility for SMEs. Our collateral-free solar loans, with 3-5 year tenures, enable SMEs to quickly adopt rooftop and ground mounted solar solutions. The financing facility is designed to allow financial freedom - including zero down payment options, and designed such that electricity savings from solar are greater than the monthly EMI. Rooftop solar has a payback of just 3-4 years, so once the loan is paid off the system has also paid for itself, and from then on it is free power for the business.

Name: 3P Energia
Description:
Na 3P Energia, formamos uma equipe de engenheiros altamente especializados dedicados a projetar e implementar soluções de geração de energia solar. Nossos princípios fundamentais giram em torno da confiabilidade, excelência técnica e um profundo respeito por nossos clientes. Orgulhosamente conduzimos nossas operações com equipes internas, cujos membros passam por um rigoroso treinamento em projetos e instalações. Além disso, selecionamos exclusivamente as mais renomadas marcas de equipamentos disponíveis no mercado de energia solar.
Com um histórico sólido de mais de 1.000 instalações bem-sucedidas, nós estabelecemos como uma das principais referências no setor de energia solar nas regiões Norte/Nordeste do país. Apenas recentemente, fomos honrados com a escolha do Grupo Neoenergia para liderar mais de 600 instalações residenciais em todo o estado da Bahia.

Na 3P Energia, nossa missão é proporcionar soluções de energia limpa e renovável, com foco incansável na entrega de performances de alta qualidade e, ao mesmo tempo, contribuir significativamente para a preservação do meio ambiente. Estamos à disposição para transformar sua residência ou empreendimento em um espaço mais sustentável e eficiente. Acreditamos firmemente que, juntos, podemos trilhar um caminho rumo a um futuro energético mais responsável e ecologicamente equilibrado.

Name: Australian Premium Solar (India) Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 2013, APS is an NSE-listed solar technology leader, proudly driving the #MakeInIndia movement with a clear mission: to build a sustainable and energy-independent India.

With a cutting-edge manufacturing facility in Tajpur, Sabarkantha (Gujarat), APS delivers high-performance solar solutions tailored for residential, commercial, and agricultural needs. Our product range includes APS-manufactured solar panels, advanced inverters, and solar water pumps, trusted by thousands across India.

We currently operate with a 700 MW manufacturing capacity, which is being expanded to 1.2 GW by the end of 2025, including a 500 MW addition focused on TopCon technology, a bold step toward the future of solar innovation.

APS is certified for quality and reliability, holding IEC certification for environmental testing and being listed in the Government of India’s Approved List of Modules & Manufacturers (ALMM).

Key Highlights:
 16,000+ Satisfied Customers
 Presence Across India
 1,000+ Member Strong Workforce
 Continuous Innovation & Expansion

Choose Perfection. #ChooseAPS

Name: Faro Energy
Description:
Faro is a distributed solar energy company, bringing solar finance to commercial and industrial users in Brazil. Faro enables businesses across Brazil to benefit from solar energy with no upfront costs. 

Working with world class partners and equipment suppliers, Faro builds and operates high quality and long lasting solar systems.  Faro's customers save on energy bills, reduce energy price volatility and increase independence from the grid. Faro's investors benefit from stable, long term returns on their investment.

Faro partners with a network of local engineers and developers across the region, bringing together the best local knowledge and engineering skills with international capital and solar expertise.  And the Faro team have years and gigawatts of experience in financing, installing and operating distributed energy solutions across the world

Faro is proud to be one of 1600+ Certified B-Corps globally.  B Corps are for-profit companies certified by the non-profit B Lab to meet rigorous standards of social and environmental performance, accountability, and transparency. They aspire to use the power of markets to solve social and environmental problems. Faro’s triple bottom line objectives (profit, environment, social impact) are enshrined in its Articles of Association.

Alfa Solar Energy is a world-class manufacturer of photovoltaic (PV) panels in a ultra-modern facility with lean production, real quality understanding, production experience, and experienced technical staff in renewable energy sources.

Name: Alexandria
Description:
Desde 2017, estamos construindo o caminho para um futuro mais sustentável, produtivo e livre, para que você possa escolher como a energia impacta a sua vida. 

Nossa filosofia de negócio é baseada no aumento recorrente da lucratividade das operações, com o intuito de promover crescimento sustentável no longo prazo e a rentabilidade aos investidores.

Investimos em inovação e trabalhamos com as melhores tecnologias do mercado. Somos pioneiros na utilização da metodologia BIM (Building Information Modeling) para o setor de energia solar fotovoltaica que permite, entre inúmeras funcionalidades, a visualização do projeto em realidade aumentada. 

Fazemos parte do Pacto Global da Organização Mundial das Nações Unidas (ONU) e nossas mais de 100 usinas evitam a emissão de 1.265.625 toneladas de carbono/ano, o que equivale ao plantio de 9.492.188 árvores. 

Somos a Alexandria e acreditamos que, quando permanecemos focados no desenvolvimento de novas maneiras de interagir com a energia, iluminamos a vida de mais pessoas.

Saiba mais sobre quem somos e o que fazemos:
https://alexandria.solar/
https://www.instagram.com/alexandriasolar/

Name: GÜNDER
Description:
Uluslararası Güneş Enerjisi Topluluğu – Türkiye Bölümü (GÜNDER), Uluslararası Güneş Enerjisi Topluluğu (International Solar Energy Society – ISES) in Türkiye Bölümü olarak, 3335 sayılı Uluslararası niteliklerdeki teşekküllerin kurulması hakkındaki Kanunun 1. Maddesine göre, Bakanlar Kurulunun 10 Şubat 1992 tarih ve 92/2752 sayılı kararı ile kurulmuştur. GÜNDER in kurucu üyeleri olarak T.C. Enerji ve Tabii Kaynaklar Bakanlığı (ETKB), Elektrik İşleri Etüt İdaresi Genel Müdürlüğü (EİE), Devlet Meteoroloji İşleri Genel Müdürlüğü (DMİ) ve Türkiye Bilimsel ve Teknolojik Araştırma Kurumu (TÜBİTAK) ile diğer kamu kurum ve kuruluşlarından konuya ilgili personeller, konu ile ilgili akademisyenler ve güneş enerjisi ile ilişkili konularda üretim ve ticaret yapan sanayiciler bulunmaktadır.

--------------------------
GÜNDER, founded in 1992, was appointed to represent International Solar Energy Society – Turkey Section (ISES-TR) by resolve of the Council of Ministers with date of 10th February 1992 and with number of 92/2752, depending on the 1. article of the law about the establishment of international institutions with number of 3335. GÜNDER is not only appointed to represent Republic of Turkey in International Energy Agency Solar Heating Cooling Program (IEA SHC) and International Energy Agency Photovoltaic Power Systems Program (IEA PVPS), but also working actively in cooperation with SolarPower Europe (the new EPIA, European Photovoltaic Industry Association), European Solar Thermal Industry Federation (ESTIF), International Solar Energy Society (ISES), Global Solar Council (GSC), Association of Turkish Construction Material Producers (Türkiye IMSAD), Danish Green Growth Network (DGGN), Middle East Solar Industry Association (MESIA), German Solar Association (BSW), Turkish HVAC-R Exporters (ISIB), The Union of Chambers and Commodity Exchanges of Turkey (TOBB), Asian Photovoltaic Industry Association (APVIA) through its memberships.

Name: France Solar
Description:
Nous croyons en l’énergie solaire photovoltaïque comme incontournable source d’énergie durable. Animés par cette ambition du premier jour, nous accompagnons les entreprises, les agriculteurs, le monde de l’industrie ou les collectivités locales dans leur projet

Quoi de mieux à partager que des réponses aux grands défis de demain ?

FRANCE SOLAR • SOLAIRE PHOTOVOLTAÏQUE
Donnons à l’avenir une nouvelle énergie

Name: Diverxia
Description: Diverxia is a global company focused on the development and execution of large-scale renewable projects. Belonging to an important industrial holding and almost 20 years of experience in the Renewables sector, gives Diverxia a solvency and versatility that makes it a trustworthy ally to execute infrastructures anywhere in the world. Global solutions for Renewable Projects, Diverxia is specialized in the development of large-scale clean energy projects and offers a wide range of services for the integrated management of green energy generation. The company participates in the entire project development process, supporting its clients and offering very flexible financial solutions that allow them to optimally plan the economic structuring for the project. With headquarters in Spain and subsidiaries in the USA, Colombia, Brazil and Mexico, Diverxia combines experience, long-term commitment and steady growth, generating a significant added value for the projects in which the company takes part.

Name: ILIOS Power
Description:
ILIOS Power is a Solar EPC company providing end to end solutions from bidding stage to the commissioning of solar power plants. Our engagement extends to a lifetime support via our Operations and Maintenance services. ILIOS Power has executed projects in India, Africa, Europe & Carribean. 

In Over 700 MWs of installations with 100% in-house engineering and construction teams, EPC at ILIOS has been acclaimed to stand for Ease of Execution, Transparent Pricing & Confidence in Quality.

We have been trusted by the best like BPCL, HPCL, GAIL, NHPC, Enfinity Global, Cleantech, Hinduja Renewables, Sagitaur, My Home Group, DLF, SBI, LV Prasad, Singareni Collieries, Cybercity Builders, Sumeru Energy, Bora Agro, to name a few & have operations in India, Africa & Americas.

Name: Holu Solar
Description:
Nós somos a holu, uma experiência de compra única para energia solar.

Existimos para tornar a energia solar mais acessível a todos e queremos mudar a forma como as pessoas se relacionam com energia. Nossa promessa é que você irá se livrar da conta de luz e economizar milhares de reais.

Name: Standard Solar
Description: Standard Solar, a Brookfield company, is powering the nation’s energy transformation – channeling its project development capabilities, financial strength and technical expertise to deliver the benefits of solar, as well as solar + storage, to businesses, institutions, farms, governments, communities and utilities. Building on 16 years of sustainable growth and in-house and tax equity investment capital, Standard Solar is a national leader in the development, funding and long-term ownership and operation of commercial and community solar assets. Recognized as an established financial partner with immediate, deep resources, the company owns and operates more than 300 megawatts of solar across the United States. Standard Solar is based in Rockville, Md. Learn more at standardsolar.com and Twitter: @StandardSolar.

Name: DAS SOLAR
Description:
Founded in August 2018, DAS Solar specializes in the R&D, manufacturing, and marketing of high-efficiency solar cells, PV modules, and system applications, as well as investment, construction, and operation of power plants. It's also a state-level high-tech enterprise. Additionally, DAS Solar holds more than 150 patents in various areas.

As a leader in N-type PV technology, DAS Solar boasts two key products: N-type modules/ lightweight modules and full-scenario PV system solutions, which have successively been brought under the procurement directory of a number of large global companies. DAS Solar has sophisticated marketing networks in the local area and abroad, which have introduced the products and solutions to more than 60 countries and regions.

DAS Solar, light up your life!

Name: ACES Africa
Description:
A leading EPC specialising in Solar PV, large-scale BESS, and Building Integrated PV solutions. 

In early 2025, ACES ranked as one of the top 60 fastest-growing companies in Africa. As well as in 2024, ACES was recognised as one of Africa’s fastest-growing companies by Financial Times and Statista, ranking 35th overall and 4th in the Energy & Utilities category. Notably, we are the 10th highest-ranked South African company on the list and the 2nd highest in our category.

As a leading provider of Building Integrated Photovoltaics (BiPV) in Africa and one of the foremost Solar PV companies in the continent, we have built over 140MWp (PV) and 50MWh (BESS) of systems across seven countries, while our management team has consulted on 370MWp of projects across Africa. Our projects span South Africa, Nigeria, Namibia, Rwanda, Kenya, Mozambique and Angola. 

Our team consists of a highly skilled Engineering Team dedicated to delivering affordable, sustainable, and efficient energy solutions to clients in South Africa and beyond.

We founded our business with the mission to address the modern energy needs of Southern Africa and the broader African continent by providing premium, energy-enhancing systems that add value to our clients' investments. To realise our vision of engineering world-class, customised solutions in the renewable energy sector, our engineers continually source the best products and engineering solutions globally to serve African construction industries.

We specialise in a range of critical elements integral to modern energy solutions, including Building Integrated PV (BiPV) Engineering, Consulting, and Distribution, as well as Solar PV and BESS System Engineering, Procurement, Construction, and O&M.

For more information, please visit our website at www.acesafrica.com, or contact us via email at admin@acesafrica.com, or by phone at 021 852 4692 or 086 199 9926.

Description:
a professional company with a long experience in the Green energy solution industry. Our goal in be part of the world future and to participate in the green energy initiative.
With a large number of personnel, warehouses and branches over the middle east. We will always make sure to provide you with th most up to date products around in world

Name: GENERALE DU SOLAIRE
Description:
GÉNÉRALE DU SOLAIRE was created in 2008 at the initiative of Daniel Bour. The Group is specialised in developing, engineering, procurement, construction (EPC), financing and operating solar power plants. The Group is also an independent power producer.

GÉNÉRALE DU SOLAIRE manages turnkey solar projects, from the development stage until commissioning, operation and maintenance (O&M). The Group is one of the leading rooftop and ground mounted PV system installers in France. The Group is very active on the international photovoltaic market, where dynamic emerging countries make a significant contribution to the Group’s growth.


GÉNÉRALE DU SOLAIRE’s recognised expertise:

- building-integrated photovoltaic systems (built on flat or pitched roofs)
- ground mounted photovoltaic systems (using fixed structures or solar trackers)
- new construction projects (parking shelters, commercial buildings, agricultural sheds, photovoltaic greenhouses, etc.)
- innovative techniques (self-consumption, energy storage solutions, hybrid off-grid photovoltaic systems, etc.)


GÉNÉRALE DU SOLAIRE offers tailored solutions for :

- the public sector and the local authorities
- small and medium businesses in the service sector
- large industrial companies
- agricultural enterprises

Key Figures 
- more than 200 power plants built
- more than 100 winning projects at the French Energy Regulatory Commission (CRE) bids
- a total installed capacity of 100 MWp
- a production capacity of 40 MWp

www.gdsolaire.com

Name: Solar Landscape
Description:
Solar Landscape is the nation’s leading commercial rooftop solar developer, with 800 megawatts of solar deployed across 75+ million square feet of rooftop space. We partner with the country’s largest real estate owners to turn rooftops into reliable, revenue-generating assets. 

As a vertically integrated company founded by construction professionals, we build, own, and operate solar projects nationwide. Our in-house team manages every step — from engineering and permitting to interconnection and operations — enabling partners to scale solar quickly, with zero CapEx and no tenant disruption.  

Recognized as the #1 National Commercial Rooftop Solar Developer by Solar Power World (2025), the #1 Distributed Generation Developer by New Project Media, and winner of the U.S. Department of Energy’s Grand Prize for Clean Energy, we combine industry leadership with proven execution. 

Headquartered in Asbury Park, New Jersey, we have offices in Chicago, Baltimore, and New York City, and operate in over a dozen states nationwide.

Name: SkyPower Global
Description:
SkyPower is the largest and one of the most successful developers and owners of utility-scale solar energy projects in the world. With roots dating back more than 15 years, SkyPower’s global team possesses a vast track record of over 1000 years of combined experience in power and large infrastructure projects. 

The experienced and accomplished SkyPower team has built, assembled and acquired an extensive pipeline of over 25 GW worldwide – some of which were recently announced in bilateral agreements, and other contract awards, to be built in the Middle East, Africa and South Asia over the next five years. 

SkyPower’s over 30 utility-scale solar Power Purchase Agreements (PPA) and Contracts at various stages of development, construction and operation, in aggregate, represent over USD 80 billion dollars’ worth of long-term renewable energy sales to leading utilities and governments around the world. 

The SkyPower team over the past decade has proudly established long-term strategic hybrid partnerships with local communities, governments and in-country developers. As well, SkyPower has consulted for and advised utilities, international leaders and Heads of State in its unprecedented approach to working in unison with these environmentally conscious leaders to ensure a brighter future for generations to come. 

Through its dedicated team members, composed of employees, consultants and advisors working out of 35 international locations, SkyPower develops, finances, owns and operates solar energy projects from the initial stages through commercial operation in nearly every region of the world. 

SkyPower prides itself on its established relationships with world-leading banks and financial institutions, as well as with its global and local suppliers, and the indigenous peoples and communities who work hand in hand with SkyPower with the shared objective of producing hundreds of millions of kWh of clean electricity each and every year.

Name: Erthos
Description:
Erthos is a solar power deployment platform that is fundamentally transforming the utility-scale solar industry. By building its novel technologies on a foundation of proven PV module and inverter products, it minimizes adoption risk and provides immediate bankability. Applying the principals of structural simplicity, intelligent supervision, and autonomous operation, Erthos does what no other solar power plant can do.

The Erthos team has aggregated experience of more than seven gigawatts of deployed solar, including the development, EPC, and financing of several of the world’s largest solar power plants. Its executives and management hail from companies including Tesla, Intel, Sterling & Wilson, First Solar, Canadian Solar, SMA, and Solar Frontier. The team has extensive experience in global markets, including the US, Latin America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, India, Asia and the Pacific. In addition to expertise in the areas of solar development, EPC, project engineering, and new solar product development, the team boasts experts in the areas of mathematics, advanced thermodynamics, software engineering, industrial controls, robotics, and IIoT.

Name: CORSICA SOLE
Description:
CORSICA SOLE est un producteur indépendant d'énergie solaire et leader du stockage d’énergie en France. 
En pleine croissance, l’entreprise compte aujourd’hui plus de 150 MWc de centrales photovoltaïques et plus de 360 MWh de stockage d’énergie en exploitation et développe un portefeuille de projets de plus de 3 GW. 
Spécialiste des zones insulaires depuis 2009, Corsica Sole développe, construit, finance, exploite ses propres projets, en France et dans l’Europe entière. 
Corsica Sole déploie son savoir-faire pour apporter par les énergies renouvelables et l'innovation technologique une réponse pertinente à la transition énergétique pour la lutte contre le changement climatique.

Name: SmartFlower Solar
Description: SmartFlower is a revolutionary solar energy system that follows the sun from sunrise to sunset. The dual-axis system allows SmartFlower’s solar panels to follow the sun across the sky throughout the day, always maintaining the optimal 90° angle to the sun. This makes SmartFlower produce up to 40% more power than a conventional solar system and capable of producing up to 6,500 kWh/year, depending on your location. Our product platform consists of the SmartFlower and our battery-storage option SmartFlower +Plus. We sell our products worldwide to commercial, institutional, and residential customers searching for iconic design, superior performance, and ease of installation. There’s no better way to showcase your commitment to sustainability than with SmartFlower.

Name: Evolua Energia
Description:
Somos a Evolua. Temos o propósito de gerar energia limpa e renovável para os pequenos e médios comércios, condomínios e empresas atendidas pela rede de baixa tensão. Levamos aos nossos clientes a oportunidade de escolha que até hoje era restrita aos grandes consumidores.

Com a Evolua você pode gerar sua própria energia sem necessidade de investimento e escolhendo quanto você quer economizar. Utilizamos uma solução inteligente de geração distribuída compartilhada, sem risco e de fácil contratação.

Temos em nosso DNA a expertise em energia, engenharia e infraestrutura. Agregamos a isto, uma solução comercial digital e centralizada no cliente.

Name: SIMAI TECHNOLOGY SRL
Description: SIMAI TECHNOLOGY SRL specialize in new technology products. Currently, our main products are solar photovoltaic panels, photovoltaic inverters and photovoltaic cells.

Name: SunnyHUB
Description:
Brazil has one of the most expensive electricity rates in the world and the costs are rising fast and projected to keep rising.

Buying a solar energy system is still very expensive for Brazilian households.

For the first time in Brazil, we are offering the solar leasing for households, turning solar energy accessible and cheaper than standard forms.

SunnyHUB does not charge any upfront costs and installs system that meets all customer requirements. 

The benefits are instant: cheaper, cleaner sustainable energy.

Customer overall discount of up to 20% when compared to their regular source of energy.

Name: Cansol Energy Solutions
Description:
CANSOL ENERGY SOLUTIONS, construyendo un futuro sostenible.

Somos una empresa energética andaluza, con una clara misión: ofrecer un servicio de calidad y confianza a nuestros clientes en el ciclo completo de vida de las instalaciones de Energías Renovables. 

Desde nuestros orígenes como empresa de obra civil e instalador eléctrico, líder en el mercado nacional fotovoltaico, hemos desarrollado nuestros departamentos de EPC y de O&M.

Más de 3,5GW instalados en proyectos de grandes plantas fotovoltaicas, parques eólicos y proyectos BESS nos han permitido un conocimiento exhaustivo de todas las fases de vida de un proyecto renovable, desde su construcción hasta su operación y mantenimiento.

Nuestro mayor valor es nuestro equipo humano, compuesto por ingenieros multidisciplinares con experiencia en las compañías líderes del sector a nivel internacional y personal cualificado, que dotan a nuestra estructura del músculo necesario para poder afrontar cualquier reto.

Name: Italia Solare
Description:
ITALIA SOLARE is a social promotion association which works to enhance environmental and human health protection by supporting smart and sustainable ways to produce, store, manage and distribute energy through distributed generation from renewable sources, especially solar PV. ITALIA SOLARE also promotes their integration with smart grids, electric mobility and with energy efficiency technologies which enhance energy performance of buildings.
"ITALIA SOLARE is the only Italian association dedicated exclusively to Solar PV and to technology integration for smart energy management”.

Name: Waaree Solar Americas Inc.
Description: Waaree is a global leader in solar energy, boasting the largest presence outside of China. Our commitment to excellence, sustainability, and diversity drives us to harness solar power for a greener future. With operations across multiple continents, we deliver cutting-edge renewable energy solutions worldwide. At Waaree Solar Americas, we take pride in our US manufacturing capabilities, contributing significantly to a sustainable and energy-independent future. Our reliable, efficient solar products support sustainable development and are backed by the latest technological advancements. We believe that diversity and inclusivity are key to innovation and success, and our workforce reflects this commitment. Waaree has 1.6 GW of module manufacturing facility in the USA and 1.6GW under exceution, reinforcing our leadership in the solar industry and our dedication to the US market.

Name: Greencol Energy SAS | Energía Solar
Description:
Empresa colombiana de energía solar con más de 7 años de experiencia gestionando proyectos de energía solar a nivel nacional en el sector comercial, industrial y residencial.

Acompañamos a las empresas para que tomen la mejor decisión en la transición a energía solar.

Promovemos ahorros en costos energéticos, sostenibilidad corporativa, y cambio cultural con el uso de energías renovables.

Sostenibilidad - Rentabilidad - Accesibilidad

Name: Candi Solar
Description: Candi Solar partners with businesses to provide simple, end-to-end solar & battery solutions. Our flexible approach, coupled with our financial expertise, enables us to tailor an offering to your exact needs. Our shared value model guarantees we are invested for the long run, owning the risk and ensuring you reap the full rewards.

Name: TSE, énergie de confiance
Description:
Expert en développement photovoltaïque et agrivoltaïque, TSE est un des principaux producteurs d’énergie solaire en France. Créé en 2012, notre parc en exploitation représente 18 centrales solaires l’équivalent de la consommation électrique d’environ 110 000 habitants.
En 2021, TSE a inauguré la centrale photovoltaïque de Marville, la seconde plus grande centrale de France. Avec une solution totalement innovante d’ombrière agricole, TSE est aussi un des leaders de l’agrivoltaïsme et a inauguré́ en septembre 2022 sa première canopée agricole, innovation mondiale, à Amance, en Haute-Saône sur une parcelle de grandes cultures.

Name: IRISOLARIS
Description:
Fondée en 2009 avec l'objectif de participer activement à la transition énergétique, IRISOLARIS Energie fait aujourd’hui partie des entreprises majeures en France dans le domaine des énergies renouvelables.
Notre Société développe ses propres centrales et est aujourd'hui productrice indépendante d’énergie. 
Nous accompagnons également les entreprises et collectivités dans la transition énergétique. Nous construisons des centrales photovoltaïques en toiture, au sol et en carport. 
Nos équipes assurent l'ensemble des prestations : de l'ingénierie commerciale et technique, à l’installation et la maintenance de nos centrales.
Contactez-nous pour échanger sur votre projet photovoltaïque !

Name: Efficient Energy Group
Description:
Efficient Energy Group's goal is to deliver nationwide energy-saving and resource management solutions, that save our clients money and reduce their individual carbon footprint.

Being energy efficient and improving energy productivity in our homes and commercial buildings can help to:

• Reduce our daily operating costs
• Protect and care for the environment
• Take advantage of government incentive schemes
• Reduce our carbon footprint by better managing your energy needs

Efficient Energy Group is leading the way in NSW, QLD & VIC by providing huge discounts to both commercial and residential projects through the Australian Government Energy Saving Scheme. (ESS)

Name: Greenvolt Comunidades
Description:
We arrived in the Portuguese market in April 2022 to create and manage energy communities in which families and companies share clean, cheaper energy for everyone.
We seek to offer security, advice and quality of service to our customers, sharing environmental, economic and autonomy values.
We want this energy to reach everyone, and continue to grow and create sustainable, democratic, inclusive and social solutions.

Name: SolarizEgypt
Description:
An IPP (Independent Power Producer) certified company that finances, designs, installs, and commissions PV (Photovoltaic) solar power plants. The first company to apply on-grid PPA (Power Purchase Agreement) in Egypt back in 2019.

Our dream of blanketing Egypt’s golden deserts with solar panels and unlocking its massive energy potential took off in 2013. 

Today, we offer our products to the commercial, industrial, and agricultural sectors: giving electricity consumers a better, cheaper and cleaner alternative to conventional energy with zero investment or operational cost.

Name: Novum Solar
Description: Somos una empresa peruana con gran experiencia en el desarrollo integral de proyectos de energía solar fotovoltaica y almacenamiento de energía con un solido respaldo financiero y con el objetivo de aportar en la creación de una matriz energética peruana más eficiente, sostenible y resiliente para todos los peruanos.

Name: ENTEGRO ENERJİ SİSTEMLERİ
Description:
ENTEGRO FOTOVOLTAIK SISTEMLERI San. ve Tic. Ltd. Sti., is a joint-venture (%40 Turkish - %60 German) EPC (Engineering-Procurement-Construction) company, based in Izmir. The key activity field of Entegro is Solar Power Plants.
The German shareholder company Entegro GMBH which was founded in 2007 in Fröndenberg has installed hundreds of systems. They are one of the leading company in their region.
The Turkish shareholder Akademi Solar Enerji is one of the leading companies in Turkish solar market. The main area of activity of Akademi Solar Enerji is Solar Power Plant projects development. 

ENTEGRO's Mission: 
To increase the quality of life of the individuals and the competitiveness of the institutions with our expertise in Solar Energy,
To contribute to the development of solar energy systems,

ENTEGRO’s Vision:
To be a leading company in the solar energy sector with its exemplary corporate culture and high customer satisfaction

Our Values:
We are experts in our business
We make our customers happy
We are innovative
We are creative
We're reliable, we keep our promise
We care the professional development of our employees

The activity areas of Entegro Turkey:
•	Residential Solar Power Systems
•	Commercial Rooftop Solar Systems
•	Ground Mounting Solar Power Plants
•	Operation and Maintenance

Name: Solargik
Description:
Solargik’s mission is to unlock the potential of solar energy by solving the industry’s biggest challenges in solar tracking - efficient land utilization, challenging terrains, and sophisticated controls.

Our versatile, cost-efficient trackers and intelligent control software increase power generation, efficiency, and profitability while reducing overall CAPEX and OPEX.

Solargik was founded by veterans of the solar energy industry with hundreds of years of combined solar industry experience. They have designed, installed and operated hundreds of thousands of solar trackers with Gigawatts of installed capacity.

Name: REDEN
Description:
REDEN is an independent producer of photovoltaic renewable energy, focused on the development, construction and operation of photovoltaic power plants on an international level. Founded in 2008 in the French Lot-et-Garonne region, REDEN owns and operates 1 GW of installed capacity on 800 sites. Growing steadily since its creation, REDEN employs more than 200 people across nine countries: France, Spain, Portugal, Greece, Italy, Germany, Mexico, Puerto Rico and Chile. Its values of Benevolence, Ethics, Commitment and Professionalism are at the heart of the Group’s performance. 

Our solutions: ground-mounted power plants for degraded land, livestock and arable farming, agrivoltaic greenhouses, crops and car park shades, as well as photovoltaic and agrivoltaics rooftops.

Since July 2022, Macquarie Asset Management, in a consortium with British Columbia Investment Management Corporation (BCI) and MEAG, has been supporting the Group in its new growth phase.

Name: Hybrytec
Description: Design and installation of solar energy systems for off grid and grid connected areas.  Hybrytec has a distributor network of over 300 companies nationwide.  The main products offered are solar panels, solar fridges, solar pumps, charge controllers, inverters, solar hot water collectors, water storage tanks,  deep cycle batteries, solar lamps.

Name: Enoé
Description:
Enoé est un producteur français d’énergies vertes et locales, maîtrisant l’ensemble de la chaîne de valeur : design, développement, financement, construction, exploitation et
maintenance de centrales au sol, toitures ou ombrières photovoltaïques.

Enoé est né d’entrepreneurs expérimentés et convaincus par la nécessité de respecter notre environnement, qui se sont fixés pour objectif de développer et de démocratiser des approches novatrices pour une production d’énergies renouvelables accessibles.

Enoé a placé au cœur de sa stratégie l’innovation et une forte présence locale afin de répondre aux attentes d’un marché en très forte croissance : contrats d’achat long terme (PPA) pour les entreprises afin de sortir du cadre des subventions, agrivoltaïsme pour les agriculteurs, optimisation des surfaces occupées pour la collectivité… les solutions sont variées et garantissent toutes une électricité « 100 % verte » directement issue de la production d’Enoé.

Name: Bulbe Energia
Description:
Olá, somos a Bulbe, sua próxima energia.

Geramos energia a partir de fontes renováveis e sustentáveis, com o propósito de universalizar o acesso dos mineiros à energia limpa e com preço acessível.

Contribuímos ativamente com a redução dos custos de energia e com o bem-estar global, promovendo consumo consciente e impactos positivos para pessoas e negócios. Fazemos parte de uma nova economia: mais humana, ética, igualitária e sustentável. 

E por que somos sua próxima energia?

É simples! Sua próxima energia é sustentável, revolucionária, livre, digital, conectada e compartilhada por pessoas como você que sabem que um futuro melhor começa com as escolhas que fazemos, agora!

Name: Energía Real
Description:
Energía Real ofrece soluciones energéticas para todo tipo de empresas.

Nuestros financiamientos están diseñados para que tu empresa logre sus objetivos medioambientales y económicos sin la necesidad de invertir.

Name: Eden Renewables India
Description:
Incorporated in 2016 as a joint venture between TotalEnergies and EDF power solutions, Eden Renewables India, LLP is an Indian leading Renewable Energy Developer aiming for long-term investments in Renewable Energy (Solar PV, Wind -Solar Hybrid Projects). Both Promoters of Eden Renewables, TotalEnergies, and EDF power solutions (Part of French government-owned EDF Group) are present in India since 2013. 

Eden Renewables India has been developing, engineering, financing, constructing, and operating over 2.3 GWp of Solar PV assets in India. Amongst these, 657 MWp are currently operating across 3 States (Rajasthan, Uttarakhand, and Madhya Pradesh). 

Leveraging on the experience of both its shareholders (having a successful track record of over 15 GW of total gross installed capacity worldwide), Eden Renewables India has developed an in-house multi-disciplinary team, with expertise and experience across the entire value chain of a solar PV project from engineering and procurement to financing, construction supervision, and operation & maintenance.

With an embedded culture of high-quality, safety, and integrity standards, Eden Renewables India strives to develop cost-competitive, Innovative, and socially responsible renewable energy solutions to actively contribute to India’s journey towards a greener and more sustainable energy future.

Name: Solarity
Description:
Construimos y operamos plantas solares sin inversión y a la medida de cada empresa. Somos una empresa de Brookfield Renewable. 

Somos líderes en energía solar renovable para empresas, con más de 250 plantas en todo el país. Nos encargamos del financiamiento, construcción y operación para que pagues menos y reduzcas tu huella de carbono.

Vendemos energía limpia a un precio menor que tu proveedor local. Nos encargamos de la inversión, construcción, operación y mantenimiento de la planta solar, para que operes con energía limpia, más barata y con un precio conocido en el tiempo.

Name: PVinsight Inc.
Description: Excellence and value engineering build into every design. A bespoke engineering, design and development consulting firm for utility scale PV solar projects across the United States.

Name: Freedom Power
Description:
Freedom Power delivers heating & cooling, battery backup, solar power, and generator solutions for homes and businesses across the great state of Texas & Florida. Based in Austin since 2007, Freedom Solar has installed more than 281 megawatts of solar panels for tens of thousands of homeowners and hundreds of top companies such as Ford, Toyota, Whole Foods, Office Depot, Chevrolet, the University of Texas, and more. 

We staff in-house experts across sales, design, permitting, installation, and customer care. We hire people who are humble and hungry to leave the world a better place. We only install carefully curated high-quality technology, and we do so with an attention to detail, so you and your families can depend on the power.

Name: Green World Renewable Energy Ltd
Description:
Green World Renewable Energy is dedicated to powering a cleaner, more sustainable future. We help communities and businesses reduce their carbon footprint and energy costs through innovative, reliable solar solutions.

What We Do:
We provide complete back-office solar design services for residential, commercial, and utility-scale projects across the U.S., including:

Preliminary layouts & shading reports
Permit-ready drawing sets (AHJ-compliant)
Proposal drawings
PE/EE/SE stamping
EV charging station design
Remote system monitoring

Name: Soltech Energy Sweden AB
Description:
Kort om Soltech Enegry

Soltech-koncernen är en helhetsleverantör av energi- och solcellslösningar. Vi utvecklar, säljer, installerar och optimerar alltifrån tak och fasader med fullt integrerade solceller till laddstolpar och batterier. Genom att ta ansvar för hela värdekedjan, från utveckling till installation, kan vi förvandla alla former av fastigheter till effektiva energiproducenter. Det finns många kunder som har ett behov av traditionella solenergilösningar, både privatpersoner och företag, och därför levererar vi detta via våra dotterbolag. Soltech Energy är noterade på Nasdaq First North Growth Market med 41 000 aktieägare (jan 2021).

Verksamheten i Kina

I hopp om att påverka klimatet allra mest har vi även expanderat till platsen där problemet är som störst — Kina. Där hjälper vårt dotterbolag Advanced Soltech landets fabriker att byta ut traditionella energikällor mot förnybar energi. Affärsmodellen består i att finansiera, installera, äga och förvalta solenergiinstallationer på kunders tak i Kina. 

Soltech Energy in brief

Soltech group is a total supplier of energy and solar cell solutions. With oversight over the entire value chain, from development to installation, we can transform all types of properties to more sustainable and self-sufficient energy producers.  By offering aesthetic solar cell solutions for roofs and façades — integrated into the building materials or mounted on the outside — we meet the needs of today’s customers and make a difference for future generations. Soltech Energy is listed on the Nasdaq First North Growth Market with 41,000 shareholders (Jan 2021).


Soltech in China

Soltech’s investment in China is carried out by Advanced Soltech Renewable Energy. The business model consists of having Advanced Soltech finance, install, own, and periodically service solar energy installations mounted on the roofs of customer-owned facilities.

Name: Freedom Solar Power
Description:
Freedom Solar Power is the leader in turnkey solar installations, providing high quality, cost-effective, reliable solar solutions for residential and commercial markets. Based in Austin since 2007, Freedom Solar has installed more than 281 megawatts of solar panels for tens of thousands of homeowners and hundreds of top companies such as Ford, Toyota, Whole Foods, Office Depot, Chevrolet, the University of Texas, and more. 

Every idea starts with a problem. Ours was simple: solar was too complicated. 

In 2007, the solar market was clouded by installers with aggressive sales tactics who were taking customers’ money but not with their best interests in mind. A solar installation requires 7+ steps, and most companies only cover 1 or 2, leaving the rest to the homeowner to figure out.

Our founders experienced this firsthand, as Bret was a homeowner who wanted solar for his home but couldn’t get any companies to return his call, and Adrian was a solar craftsman who was getting on roofs to fix solar installs left and right. These two idealists wondered, how could those companies who sell such a pure, important product for our future, do business in such a careless way? They partnered to build a truly full-service solar team that would put the customer in control, because ultimately, we give a damn! We hold ourselves accountable to your outcomes through a 25-year product, performance, and service warranty.

We staff in-house experts across sales, design, permitting, installation, and customer care. We hire people who are humble and hungry to leave the world a better place. We only install carefully curated high-quality solar technology, and we do so with an attention to detail, so you and your families can depend on the power.

Name: GreenGo Energy Group
Description:
Renewable energy solutions that accelerate the energy transformation
 
GreenGo Energy has worked since 2011 to accelerate the green transformation through a distinguished, innovative and scalable business model based on renewable energy.

We are a company built around technology, and we have a strong passion for leading the energy transformation on a grand scale. Our core business is developing state of the art renewable energy solutions based on large scale solar power, wind power, battery energy storage systems (BESS), and Power-to-X (PtX/P2X) energy plants in close partnership with RE investors, who wish to combine investing in the green transformation with strong returns.

Please visit our website for further information: www.greengoenergy.com

Name: Solaric Group
Description:
Solar Intercontinental (Solaric) Ltd. is a Singapore-based company and a recognized leader in Commercial & Industrial (C&I) rooftop solar in Bangladesh, with over 16 years of experience in the renewable energy sector.

With 135 MW installed under the EPC model and 20 MW through the RESCO/OpEx model, we currently have 300+ MW in the development pipeline. Our fully integrated, turnkey solutions cover everything from system design, engineering, and procurement to customs clearance, installation, and long-term maintenance - ensuring a seamless and reliable experience for plant owners and energy off-takers.

 A landmark achievement includes a 50 MWp rooftop solar project for Youngone Corporation - one of the largest of its kind globally. This system generates 75 GWh of clean energy annually and offsets over 57,000 metric tons of CO₂ emissions each year, showcasing our capability to deliver high-impact, utility-scale solar solutions.

To date, we’ve implemented 40+ rooftop projects across 200+ industrial facilities for leading organizations such as Unilever, BSRM, Ha-Meem Group, and Transcom Electronics. Our flexible CapEx and zero-investment OpEx models provide tailored energy solutions that support both ownership and pay-as-you-use options.

Name: WeLightAfrica
Description:
WeLight, founded in 2018 by Axian, Sagemcom, and Norfond, is a pioneering company dedicated to promoting energy inclusion in Sub-Saharan Africa. Active in Madagascar and Mali, with expansion underway in Nigeria and the DRC, WeLight operates 186 mini-grids that provide electricity to over 250,000 people. 

The company stands out for its innovative and sustainable business model, specifically designed to meet the energy and socio-economic needs of rural communities. By implementing tailored solutions, WeLight directly contributes to 12 of the 17 United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), fostering job creation, improving education, and empowering women.

This responsible and impactful approach has earned WeLight recognition as the first B Corp-certified company in Madagascar and the second B Corp-certified electrical operator in Africa, underscoring its positive social and environmental impact.

Driven by its mission to expand energy access, WeLight continues to grow across the African continent, striving to accelerate economic and social development in rural areas.

Name: SotySolar
Description:
La transición energética es un hecho y la misión SotySolar es acompañar a nuestros clientes en su paso hacia el autoconsumo para que sean dueños de su propia energía.

Somos muchos los que soñamos con un mundo mejor y ha llegado la hora de pasar a la acción.
Si tú también crees en un modelo energético más justo y sostenible, nosotros te ayudaremos a ser el dueño de #TuPropiaEnergía

Síguenos en Twitter: @sotysolar
Únete a nuestra comunidad en Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sotysolar/

Name: Rising Sun Chile
Description:
Rising Sun es la empresa N°1 en energía solar en Hawai'i, uno de los mercados más desarrollados de EE.UU y el mundo en materia de energía renovable. Desde 2004, Rising Sun ha impulsado el uso de la energía solar fotovoltaica con más de 40 MW instalados en seis islas.

Rising Sun Chile nace como una opción viable para la adopción y uso de la luz solar como fuente de energía limpia.

Nos dedicamos a evaluar, diseñar, financiar e implementar proyectos de energía solar que se ajustan a las necesidades de cada cliente ofreciendo también beneficios extras a nuestros clientes para entregar así un mejor servicio mas completo y que agregue valor.

Actualmente Rising Sun también se encuentra desarrollando proyectos PMGD  (Pequeños Medios de Generación Distribuida).

Name: Sunhero
Description: Sunhero's mission is to provide easy and affordable access to high quality rooftop solar for homes and businesses. Discover the potential of solar self-consumption!

Name: Senerji
Description: Senerji was established in 2000 in Istanbul. We operate in the electricity and energy market as a both wholesale and EPC company. The energy business focuses on renewable energy, sustainability and energy efficiency. We are one of the leading EPC companies in the solar energy market in Turkey. We have been mastering the rooftop solar since the day we started our solar energy department back in 2012. We have commissioned rooftop solar plants on over 100 buildings including factories, commercial buildings and residential buildings. We managed to experience installing solar plants on all kinds of roof materials. With our founders' engineering background, our ultimate goal is to provide the cutting edge solutions with reasonable prices. We are a group of engineers who are passionate to build a sustainable world, thus, we do what we love to do.

Name: LONGi Solar Pakistan
Description:
Founded in 2000, LONGi Green Energy Technology Co., Ltd. (LONGi) is committed to being the most valuable solar technology company in the world.
Under the mission of "To make the best of solar energy to build a green world" with a brand positioning of "The most trusted, reliable solar company that blazes the trail for green technology,"LONGi is developing solutions for large-scale power plants, for different industries and households with its innovation-focused development. Eventually, we will also supply "Green Power + Green Hydrogen" solutions for global zero-carbon development.

Name: Mitarsh Energy Pvt Ltd
Description: Powering the future with sustainable energy solutions. No.1 Solar O&M provider in India. Join us on our mission to create a better tomorrow!

Name: Solar DQD
Description:
Empresa de energía renovable con presencia en Argentina, Chile y Uruguay.
Nos especializamos en la instalación  de parques fotovoltaicos de mediana y gran escala.
Nuestros recursos y experiencia nos permite cumplir con los plazos y especificaciones de nuestros clientes.

Name: Intermepro
Description:
We develop and integrate energy solutions with the leading brands in the world

We provide complete solutions in sustainability and energy efficiency
Schneider Electric and LG Solar Energy Solutions exclusive representatives in Argentina

We are a company that develop business in B2B and B2G integrated and sustainable energy solutions for our Partners, with technological support and guarantees.
We represent exclusively in Argentina to world leading companies such as SCHNEIDER in the solar industry (inverters and solutions) and LG sustainable energy (PV and Air Conditioning), developing the market for these companies in Ad- Hoc solutions.
We offer a comprehensive solution for businesses in the area of sustainability comprising power generation and for distributed energy projects. End to End.
We generate complementarity and synergy between the products of different companies.
We act as a liaison with our portfolio of local investors interested in the energy business.

Name: Enerpower powered by Greenvolt
Description:
Enerpower powered by Greenvolt are Ireland’s leading provider of renewable energy solutions through innovation, pushing the boundaries in sustainable self-sufficiency for commercial and industrial sectors, benefitting future generations.  

Why Chose Enerpower?

Expertise 

Founded in 2005, with over 18 years industry experience, our team of engineers and professionals are well-versed in renewable energy technologies and energy efficient solutions. We leverage our expertise and deliver reliable, high quality systems that meet our client requirements 

Customized Solutions

We understand that each business is unique and has it’s own individual energy requirements. That is why we offer tailored solutions, customizing our renewable energy systems and energy efficient solutions to meet our clients, objectives, budgets and site conditions. 

Quality and Reliability

Enerpower are committed to delivering the highest quality products and services. We ensure that our systems are built to last and perform optimally.

Sustainability

We are passionate above sustainability and believe in the transformative power of renewable energy . By choosing Enerpower, you contribute to a greener future, reducing carbon emission and environmental impact while benefiting from long term energy savings.

Every day we help businesses make significant cost savings by reducing energy costs by up to 50%. This is achieved through either reducing energy usage on site or through our renewable energy technologies.  While at the same time, businesses get the added bonus of reducing their carbon footprint. 

To Join our team visit www.enerpower.ie/careers

Name: HDT
Description:
HDT, o agente transformador, com foco em soluções de alto valor para o mercado de Tecnologia Verde.

A HDT, representante exclusiva Huawei no Brasil no segmento solar, e principal regional da companhia chinesa no continente Americano, reconhecida e premiada por seus resultados na região, atua no segmento B2B com o fornecimento de produtos e serviços de alta performance, segurança e produtividade de geração, provenientes dos maiores fabricantes do mundo -  Huawei e Risen.

Está em sua missão promover o crescimento de seus distribuidores, favorecendo um círculo virtuoso, onde a HDT avança junto ao seu Ecossistema por meio do fortalecimento das  parcerias estratégicas estabelecidas, da constante geração de oportunidades de trabalho no setor, assim como na especialização de seus colaboradores diretos e indiretos. 

HDT. A Energia do Futuro Hoje.

Name: ALEC Energy
Description: ALEC Energy (est. 2015) is a business division of ALEC Engineering and Contracting L.L.C, offering a complete turnkey solution for on-grid and off-grid, ground mounted, rooftop and hybrid solar PV plants. ALEC Energy offers a complete spectrum of services from concept to commissioning and even operations and maintenance of Solar PV Projects in the UAE.

Name: Greenskies Clean Focus
Description:
Greenskies Clean Focus offers a full suite of renewable energy solutions to commercial, public sector, and utility energy users throughout the US. Our vertical integration delivers the most cost-competitive solar, battery storage, and low carbon solutions. From beginning to end, our customers work with a single delivery team. Greenskies originates, develops, constructs, and operates, while Clean Focus finances and owns the systems.

Founded in 2009, Greenskies Clean Focus has constructed and operates over 320+ MW of solar projects across more than 600+ sites in 19 states. Greenskies is the partner of choice for large corporations, municipalities, and real estate owners seeking to take an organizational – or portfolio-wide approach to solar energy adoption. Greenskies ranks as the number one commercial solar developer in the US by Solar Power World, based on cumulative kW of installations.

Name: SolarMente
Description:
Somos una cleantech española que tiene como objetivo liderar la transición energética en España y democratizar el acceso a la energía limpia. Nuestra amplia oferta de métodos de pago, entre los que se encuentra la suscripción o renting, permite la instalación de paneles solares sin coste inicial. De este modo, junto con nuestro propio software, agilizamos y simplificamos el proceso de instalación de paneles solares y optimizamos la experiencia del cliente. Queremos hacer que la energía solar sea accesible a todo el mundo y conseguir el máximo ahorro energético a los hogares españoles. Hazlo SolarMente
@solarmente.es

Name: GDSUN
Description:
Atuamos em todo o processo de desenvolvimento e geração de energia de plantas solares com foco em Geração Distribuída. Neste modelo, a energia gerada nos parques é comercializada diretamente com médios e grandes consumidores empresariais, de setores diversos, por meio de contratos de longo prazo.

Iniciamos nossa operação no segundo semestre de 2019, mas já nascemos com a experiência e conhecimento no setor de nossos investidores, que têm um longo histórico de atuação no segmento de energia. Em menos de um ano, ampliamos nossa participação na geração solar distribuída com o anúncio de investimentos na construção de novos parques solares.

A Geração Distribuída, além de fomentar a diversificação da matriz energética brasileira, em linha com os interesses crescentes da sociedade pela migração para uma economia de baixa emissão de carbono e preservação do meio ambiente, proporciona ganhos econômicos para as empresas que aderem a esse tipo de contrato e promove a geração próxima de onde estão os consumidores, com menor uso do sistema de transmissão de energia.

Name: BayWa r.e. Solar Distribution / ES
Description:
Electricidad y sol: lo que nos representa. Con la energía fotovoltaica tenemos una tecnología a nuestra disposición que puede suministrar energía ilimitada en el futuro. Por eso, hemos estado confiando en el sol durante casi 10 años.

Desde 2018 empezamos una nueva aventura en España y Portugal bajo el nombre de BayWa r.e., como parte de un grupo financieramente sólido e internacional. Ofrecemos a nuestros socios soluciones globales junto con una experiencia local.

Nuestra empresa está activa en los mercados de España y Portugal. Tenemos nuestras oficinas en Barcelona con representantes por toda España y Portugal. Además, contamos con las mejores marcas del mercado: Huawei Fusionsolar, LONGi, Trina Solar, JA Solar, Jinko Solar, Hyundai, Fronius, SolarEdge, SMA, GoodWe, Kostal, Enphase, BYD, LG Energy Solution, GAVE, Wallbox, Charge Amps y Autel. También tenemos nuestro propio sistema de montaje novotegra.

Name: EletroBidu Energia Solar
Description:
Atuamos no setor fotovoltaico desde 2014, sendo a maior empresa no estado de São Paulo, com unidades em Mogi das Cruzes, Indaiatuba, São Carlos e Belo Horizonte, atendendo mais de 300 cidades.
Somos integradores 5 estrelas WEG, a maior empresa de tecnologia e engenharia do Brasil, tendo mais de 8.000 projetos com solução completa e chave na mão, onde estamos presentes de ponta a ponta, desde a implantação até o acompanhamento pós-venda.
Contamos com uma equipe de mais de 30 engenheiros treinados internamente em elaboração de projetos, documentação e outros demais processos. Visamos a capacitação de nossos colaboradores para nos tornarmos a maior empresa do setor.

HAALA Energy is a solar installer, developer, and O&M service provider, combining deep local market understanding with a rigorous and analytical approach to project development.

Specialising in distributed commercial-scale PV, HAALA develops peak-shaving and hybrid solutions to help commercial, industrial and agricultural clients reduce energy costs and mitigate fuel price risk.

HAALA Energy was founded in 2016 and is based in Jeddah. HAALA incorporates employee ownership into its business model.

Description: At UGE we're working to make renewable energy accessible and affordable for all. We develop, own, and operate community and commercial solar & battery storage projects, bringing cheaper, cleaner, and more reliable energy to communities around the country. Visit us at www.ugei.com.
