Description:
CHIRON è una delle principali piattaforme indipendenti di sviluppo, investimento e gestione nel settore delle energie rinnovabili in Italia.

Il gruppo CHIRON è un produttore indipendente di energia rinnovabile che sviluppa, realizza e gestisce impianti ed infrastrutture energetiche di ultima generazione a bassissimo impatto ambientale. Le società del gruppo sono fortemente impegnate contro il cambiamento climatico attraverso progetti di decarbonizzazione in settori economici strategici quali la produzione, lo stoccaggio e la distribuzione di energia da fonte rinnovabile. 
Focalizzato nel mercato italiano e con importanti prospettive nel mercato europeo, il gruppo CHIRON vuole contribuire attivamente alla transizione energetica.

Name: Evosolar Energia Solar
Description:
A empresa desenvolve projetos de engenharia, integrando e instalando sistemas solares fotovoltaicos para geração distribuída no Brasil.

A Evosolar é uma das principais redes de franquias de energia solar do Brasil. Reconhecida nacionalmente pela qualidade e excelência em serviços de engenharia. 

A Evosolar possui em seu corpo de colaboradores engenheiros e técnicos de diferentes áreas que se complementam: elétrica, mecânica, civil, ambiental e produção. Isso traz maior segurança e qualidade aos projetos de usinas fotovoltaicas.

Nossa missão é democratizar o acesso a energia solar no Brasil, levando à milhares de pessoas de diferentes classes sociais.

O movimento de expansão da fonte solar no Brasil está sendo muito forte e a Evosolar é uma frente muito ativa nesse movimento. 

Somos apaixonados por pessoas e a felicidade no rosto daqueles que estão a nossa volta é a nossa satisfação.

A empresa desenvolve projetos de engenharia, integrando e instalando sistemas solares fotovoltaicos para geração distribuída no Brasil.

Name: Hild Energy
Description:
Hild Energy, a division of the esteemed Eagle Press Group, is a distinguished player in the renewable energy sector. As part of a well-established South Indian business conglomerate with a legacy spanning 60 years, the group has diversified interests in diary printing, security printing, software solutions, smartphone technologies, realty business, and now renewable energy.

Specializing in comprehensive "turnkey solutions" for solar projects, Hild Energy caters to a wide range of applications encompassing industrial, commercial, and domestic sectors, with project capacities ranging from kilowatts to megawatts. The company offers an array of services within the solar industry, including Engineering, Procurement and Purchasing, Project Management, Construction, Commissioning, and O&M Services (Operations and Maintenance).

With a steadfast focus on delivering excellence, Hild Energy leverages its in-house expertise and value engineering practices throughout every stage of a project, from conceptualization to commissioning and ongoing O&M services. This meticulous approach has resulted in the successful implementation of solar projects with unparalleled performance levels, garnering high levels of customer satisfaction.

Since its establishment in 2012, Hild Energy has demonstrated its prowess by securing and executing Solar PV projects for prestigious clientele spanning various regions of India, reflecting its unwavering dedication to a customer-centric approach.

Name: Oorja Development Solutions Limited
Description:
Oorja is a Farming-as-a-Service company working at the intersection between clean energy and sustainable agriculture. It acts as a multi-utility providing affordable solar-powered irrigation, milling and cooling services to smallholder farmers on a Pay-Per-Use (PPU) basis, in weak-grid areas of northern India. 

We are proud to have pioneered the inclusive and customer-centric PPU model for productive use appliances in agriculture to eliminate the upfront technology acquisition cost barrier for last-mile BoP farmers, with less than 2 acres landholding and incomes of around INR 60,000 per year. Oorja finances, installs, operates and maintains decentralised solar assets at/near the farm and through its three services reduces energy costs, increases productivity and income and mitigates CO2e emissions, building climate resilience for farmers.

Our mission is empower 1 million farmers globally by 2030 with the agricultural services they need to sustainably increase their income and quality of life.

For more than a decade, we have been delivering turnkey solar energy solutions, photovoltaic EPC projects and decarbonization iniciatives, managing every phase, from development and construction to operation and maintenance, ensuring optimal performance, energy savings and environmental protection.

Essa é a nossa forma de impulsionar a mudança que queremos ver no mundo.

Name: OnPoint Solar Panel Cleaning San Diego
Description: Do you have solar panels at your home or business? If so, you’ve probably noticed how dirty they can get. Particles such as pollen and dust often build up on your panels over time, decreasing their effectiveness. This build up can affect how much sunlight converts to energy and can reduce your energy output by as much as 30%, resulting in hundreds of dollars of lost energy expenses each year. Keeping your panels clean is the best way to ensure you are maintaining optimal energy production and getting the most out of your investment. Call us today for a FREE solar cleaning estimate! Name: Distributed Power Partners Holding Chile
Description:
Distributed Power Partners LLC.– Is a United States distributed power development company with extensive experience in renewable energy and large international infrastructure development. Distributed Power Partners LLC, is committed to develop distributed solar power projects globally. Distributed Power Partners LLC, is financed and governed by an experienced and capable Board of Directors and led by an Executive Management Team with extensive knowledge of renewable energy, and building large-scale energy and infrastructure businesses on a global basis.

DPP has developed more than 350MW of renewable energy destined to supply the national electrical system of Chile (SEN). Mainly, these projects have been located in the regions of Antofagasta and Coquimbo, and there are also projects in the regions of Tarapacá, Atacama and the Metropolitan region.

The company participates in the entire value chain of this type of project, including the search for land, community outreach, plant design, obtaining permits, financing, construction and project operation.

One of the main characteristics of DPP is its flexibility to seek collaboration formulas for the financing and construction of projects. In this way, DPP has built relationships with investment funds and electricity market players that have allowed these projects to be carried out successfully.

One of the characteristics of PMGDs consists of its limited and environmentally friendly scale, not requiring extensive and large-scale transmission lines for its connection. On the contrary, by supplying energy from places close to electricity consumption, these projects only require medium-voltage connection lines, equivalent to public lighting networks in urban areas of the country. This avoids the construction of high-voltage towers, also bringing benefits to distribution networks, since their installation makes it possible to reinforce the existing infrastructure of electricity distributors.

Name: Hardy Barth GmbH
Description:
Hardy Barth GmbH – Ihr Familienunternehmen aus der Oberpfalz

Nachhaltigkeit aus Tradition

Seit 1997 steht Hardy Barth GmbH für innovative Energie- und Elektrotechniklösungen mit einem klaren Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit. Als regional verwurzeltes Familienunternehmen aus Schwend haben wir uns darauf spezialisiert, Strom sichtbar zu machen und erneuerbare Energien effizient und zukunftsorientiert einzusetzen.

Unsere Historie zeigt unser Engagement:

Bereits im Jahr 2002 haben wir unsere erste Photovoltaikanlage installiert und damit den Grundstein für unseren Beitrag zur Energiewende gelegt.
2012 erweiterten wir unser Portfolio mit der Gründung von eCharge Hardy Barth und präsentierten 2014 unsere ersten eigenen Ladestationen.
Im Jahr 2023 setzten wir einen weiteren Meilenstein mit dem Bezug unserer energieautarken Produktionshalle, die unseren Anspruch an nachhaltiges Wirtschaften unterstreicht.
Ganzheitliche Lösungen aus einer Hand

Von der Planung und Installation von Photovoltaikanlagen, über Batteriespeichersysteme und Ladeinfrastruktur bis hin zu intelligenten EDV- und Elektrolösungen – wir bieten alles aus einer Quelle. Unser Ziel ist es, höchste Effizienz, Qualität und Nachhaltigkeit für unsere Kunden zu gewährleisten.

Unsere Werte

Nachhaltigkeit: Wir handeln ressourcenschonend und schaffen energieautarke Lösungen.

Regionalität: Als Familienunternehmen aus der Region legen wir Wert auf lokale Partnerschaften und kurze Wege.

Innovation: Unsere eigenen Produkte, wie AC-Ladestationen und maßgeschneiderte Energiesysteme, zeigen unsere Stärke in Forschung und Entwicklung.

Ihr Partner für die Energiewende

Hardy Barth GmbH begleitet Sie auf dem Weg in eine nachhaltige Zukunft – mit intelligenten, individuellen und ökologischen Energielösungen, die bereits heute die Anforderungen von morgen erfüllen.

„Wir machen Strom sichtbar.“

Name: DWATTS
Description:
DWATTS est un Opérateur énergétique territorial en Biovallée.

L’objectif principal est de réaliser une transition énergétique citoyenne dans le Diois et la Vallée de la Drôme. Pour se faire, DWATTS développe un mix de production d’énergies renouvelables suffisant pour répondre aux besoins énergétiques locaux dans une optique de :
- développement économique local
- transition énergétique en lien avec la lutte contre le réchauffement climatique
- amélioration de la résilience du territoire, notamment vis-à-vis du pétrole.

Les actions portées :
- développer des projets de production d’énergies renouvelables à l’échelle locale
- favoriser l’émergence d’une dynamique locale citoyenne autour des questions énergétiques et favoriser les échanges entre élus, citoyens, associations, entreprises, et administrations sur ces mêmes questions
- mettre en place des actions de formation et d’éducation sur la maîtrise des consommations, la production d’énergies renouvelables ou tout autre thème entrant dans le cadre de son objet général
- jouer un rôle de conseil et d’informations auprès des élus, citoyens, associations et entreprises sur les questions énergétiques
- valoriser et mobiliser les compétences des acteurs économiques locaux
- favoriser l’émergence d’initiatives citoyennes similaires
- lutter contre la précarité énergétique

DWATTS est membre du réseau Énergie Partagée.

The design of our products, based on the logic of the continuous 360o sun cover, ensures the maximum performance of Sun Yield's autonomous LED lighting systems and their full power autonomy. At the same time, their modern appearance, their ability of full adaptation to existing infrastructures, the flexibility in the design of each system, their easy installation and their intelligent remote management, make our products the most technologically advanced in the field of autonomous lighting. Our main vision is the gradual transition from a costly and inefficient energy model of street lighting, to a new modern one, through our revolutionary green technology. Our main objectives are the annihilation of electricity consumption costs, the reduction of CO2 emissions, the excellent aesthetic appearance of autonomous lighting systems and the provision of adequate electric lighting, even in areas where there is no access to grid.

Stale się rozwijamy wychodząc naprzeciw zmieniającym się warunkom gospodarczym i potrzebom Klientów rozszerzając ofertę o magazyny energii oraz systemy grzewcze takie jak kotły elektryczne czy pompy ciepła. Współpracujemy tylko z najlepszymi producentami i dostawcami komponentów fotowoltaicznych najwyższej jakości, co przekłada się na długie lata pracy naszych systemów.

Do każdego Klienta podchodzimy indywidualnie, dzięki czemu jesteśmy w stanie dobrać idealne rozwiązanie dla każdego oraz zoptymalizować koszty, proces dostarczenia i montażu naszych instalacji.

Jako firma cenimy sobie wysoką jakość oraz bezpieczeństwo na każdym etapie współpracy. Właśnie dlatego oferujemy najwyższej klasy komponenty oraz 25 lat gwarancji. Korzystając z naszych instalacji możesz nie tylko zmniejszyć swoje rachunki do zera, ale także mogą one  stać się źródłem dochodów.  

ECO4PLANET to zespół wysokiej klasy specjalistów i wspaniałych ludzi, którzy codziennie pracują nad tym aby każdy nasz Klient mógł cieszyć się niskimi rachunkami za prąd.

Name: Jupisol Power India Private Limited
Description:
•	Intro
Today, being in the top 10% EPC service providers in Gujarat and having done projects PAN India, makes our company JUPISOL POWER INDIA Pvt. Ltd. stand out for its exceptional quality and service.


•	Jupisol’s Journey:
What started as a proprietorship firm under the name of ‘DSP Solar Technologies’, providing Turnkey EPC (Engineering, Procurement and Construction) solutions for solar projects 2017; has now turned into a public limited company.


In the initial two years of our launch from 2017 to 2019, while working as a sub-contractor, we executed number of Commercial & Industrial solar projects PAN India.

2020 marked a milestone; we became an authorized channel partner of TATA POWER SOLAR and gained an experience of installing huge number of residential Solar projects under Gujarat subsidy policy.

Furthermore, in 2021, we commissioned 3 Industrial Solar projects of around 1MWp each as independent EPC Contractor.

In May 2022 our company witnessed an expansion and re-branding. From being a proprietorship firm to a Private Limited company we became JUPISOL POWER INDIA Pvt. Ltd.

Our company stands strong with a larger team size in 2024. Regular professional trainings and field-work has empowered us with pride when it comes to quality and result oriented service. 

We deliver what we promise, during installation process, and maintenance.


•	Vision: To emerge as a leading and globally recognized solar EPC service provider, setting new standards in the field of industrial solar solution Pan India.


•	Mission: 
We live the mission of liberating our customers from the burden of heavy electricity bills while making a positive impact on the environment. 

We are persistently committed to empowering our clients on the path of cost-effective and eco-friendly energy solution.


For further information on achieving a zero-electricity bill through solar energy solutions, please contact us at 9879284007 or reach out via email at dhvani@jupisolpower.com.

Gestart wordt met een inventarisatie van het dak (ligging, staat van onderhoud, type pan) en vervolgens wordt de elektrische installatie beoordeeld op geschiktheid door onze hoofdmonteur. Blijkt deze ongeschikt te zijn kunnen onze gecertificeerde monteurs deze vooraf aanpassen zodat deze wel geschikt is voor PV systemen.
Na oplevering van een installatie verzorgen wij desgewenst de stappen die noodzakelijk zijn (BTW teruggaaf, aanmelden belastingdienst) 
Doordat Tandem Solar Projects B.V. contracten heeft afgesloten met een aantal importeurs en groothandelaren kunnen wij vrijwel altijd de meest concurrerende aanbieding maken. Wij leveren en monteren uitsluitend A merk producten en onze montageteams zijn uitgerust met de modernste apparatuur en veiligheidsmiddelen.

Name: Flex Parabolic
Description:
Flex Parabolic Ltd. is a pioneering company in the renewable energy sector, focused on advancing solar technology through innovative design and engineering. Our mission is to make solar energy more efficient, cost-effective, and environmentally friendly.

At the heart of our work is the Flexible Parabolic Trough Collector. This groundbreaking technology enhances traditional solar collector designs, providing significant advantages in construction costs, efficiency, and land usage. By rethinking and optimizing the structure and functionality of solar collectors, we aim to make solar power more accessible and sustainable.

We envision a world where clean, renewable energy is the norm. Our innovations are designed not just to meet today's energy needs but to create a sustainable future for generations to come. Through continuous research, development, and collaboration, we strive to lead the way in solar energy solutions.

Key Advantages of Our Technology:
Cost Efficiency: Reduced construction and operational costs through innovative design.
Enhanced Performance: Increased efficiency with fewer absorber tubes and less heat waste.
Environmental Responsibility: Reduced land use and minimal environmental impact.

Since our inception, we have been committed to excellence in solar technology. From leasing our first workshop and acquiring essential equipment to refining our designs and securing patents, our journey is marked by a relentless pursuit of innovation and quality.

Feel free to reach out to us for more information, partnership opportunities, or to learn more about our innovative solutions in solar energy. Together, we can harness the power of the sun to create a brighter, cleaner future.

Name: Big Solar Co-op
Description:
We just think big rooftops should have solar.

We got tired of waiting for the likes of the Government or big businesses to ramp up solar installations on large commercial rooftops that are perfect for it. So we decided to just do it ourselves.

We’re a not-for-profit cooperative 100% owned by our members, who want the UK to have cleaner energy, and lower emissions, fast. We’re not just another big energy company funnelling profits to faceless hedge funds. 

Anybody can join us. If you have £100 or more, you can buy shares and get a fair return on your investment.

There are already more than 500 of us (and counting!) from all over the UK. Together, we own 6 large solar rooftops, and we’ve got a further 40 projects ready to roll out. All we need is your support.

We’d love you to join us.

Name: Envinova Smartech
Description:
Envinova Smartech is an innovative startup focused on promoting sustainability and tackling the global climate change. 

We design and build unique ‘Smart Solar Huts’. 

Envinova’s Solar Hut is a groundbreaking solution that addresses the growing need for sustainable, eco-friendly outdoor spaces where individuals can work, relax, and connect. 

Designed to bridge the gap between modern conveniences and environmental responsibility, our Solar Hut is powered entirely by solar energy and offers essential services like mobile and laptop charging, Wi-Fi, comfortable seating, and safety features. By integrating these amenities into a standalone, off-grid system, the Solar Hut enhances public spaces, making them accessible, functional, and environmentally friendly.

Achievements:
1. Winners of International Solar Alliance (ISA) SolarX Startup Challenge 2024: India
2. We showcased our Solar Hut to the Hon’ble Prime Minister of India, Sh Narendra Modi at Re-Invest in September’24
3. Honoured with the ‘Bharat Entrepreneur Award’ by Entrepreneur Association of India (EAI)
4. Awarded with ‘Solar Urban Innovation’ by Eletes Media and DLF in August’24.
5. Named as one of the ‘Top 75 startups in India’ by Startup India for a product showcase at Vigyan Bhawan in August 2022
6. Rising Startup of Bharat’ award by CT University in November 2023
7. Selected as 1 of 8 startups by the Austrian and Indian Embassy for a Startup Delegation to Austria in September 2022


Our theory of change is rooted in the belief that accessible, sustainable public infrastructure can significantly enhance the quality of life, promote inclusivity, and support environmental sustainability. By providing Solar Huts in both urban and rural areas, we create spaces that offer essential services—charging, Wi-Fi, safe seating, and shelter—powered entirely by solar energy and also foster social cohesion by bringing together diverse communities.

Both JT and Instyle Solar are passionate about helping people eliminate those dreaded electricity bills and realise their financial goals.

Instyle Solar’s growth has also come with recognition, with CEO and Co-founder Karl Brown being awarded Brisbane Young Entrepreneur of the Year Award (Retail and Services) for three consecutive years in a row – 2017, 2018 and 2019. Karl also took home the National Young Entrepreneur of the Year Award in 2018, and in 2019 he won the accolade for National Young Entrepreneur ‘Trailblazer’ of the Year. It was no surprise when Karl became is a finalist in the 2021 CEO of the Year awards following these notable achievements.

Instyle Solar was also ranked third in the Australian Financial Review’s ‘Fast 100’ list for 2020 with a 128% growth rate. 

This can be credited to our team who are committed to providing only the best products in the market and an exceptional customer experience.

Shine Solar Perú es una extensión de la empresa de energía solar Shine Solar, con sede en Lima y brindando apoyo remoto a la compañía principal en los Estados Unidos desde el 2023. Fundada por los hermanos Caleb y Nick Gorden en 2016, Shine Solar ofrece servicios a clientes en diversos estados del sur de Estados Unidos, proporcionando soluciones solares personalizadas. Con más de 6,000 clientes atendidos, hasta la fecha, sumando más cada día.

Shine Solar ha sido reconocida como uno de los principales contratistas solares desde 2018. Esto se debe a nuestro enfoque único hacia la energía solar. Nuestro equipo de especialistas crea propuestas personalizada para satisfacer las necesidades únicas de los clientes. Siendo así una de las empresas de energía solar residencial más relevantes de Estados Unidos. Hemos logrado esto gracias a un crecimiento orgánico excepcional, la creación de una buena cultura laboral y brindando la mejor experiencia al cliente posible.

El objetivo de Shine Solar Perú es lograr la máxima satisfacción del cliente, respaldando la misión de Shine Solar en los Estados Unidos. Desde paneles solares hasta soluciones de eficiencia energética para el hogar, incluyendo climatizadores (HVAC), aislamiento térmico y más. Para propiedades residenciales y comerciales, colaboramos para ofrecer una solución integral para todos. 

Nuestro equipo dedicado, ubicado en Perú, se centra en apoyar de manera remota y eficiente para llevar energía solar limpia y asequible a miles de hogares y negocios en los Estados Unidos. Entregar felicidad es lo que hacemos, porque creemos que un planeta feliz conlleva a una billetera feliz y un tú más feliz.

HMD'nin Roll Form hatlarında GES konstrüksiyon profillerinin yanı sıra C, Z, U ve Ω özel kesit profilleri de üretilmektedir.  
HMD Çelik Konstrüksiyon her projeye özgün mühendislik tasarımlarımız ile en zor şartlara sahip GES sahalarında en uygun çözümleri müşterilere sunmayı kendisine görev edinmiştir. Firmamız Yurtiçi ve Yurt dışı toplam 1 GW’ lık deneyime sahiptir.

HMD sürdürülebilir kalite, yüksek ve hızlı üretim kapasitesi ile Müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman sağlamış olmanın gururu içerisinde çalışmalarına devam etmektedir.


HMD Steel Construction is one of the leading construction companies in Turkey since 2011.

HMD, designs Steel-Steel and Steel-Aluminum Constructions with its own patents used in Solar Power Plants and manufactures these structural components in its 6000 m² factory with its experienced staffHMD Solar Construction has a UTILITY MODEL CERTIFICATE in our products, which consist of unique design patterns.  In addition to GES construction profiles, C, Z, U and Ω open section profiles can also be produced in own Roll Form lines.

HMD Solar Construction has taken it upon itself to offer the most suitable solutions to its customers in the most difficult conditions, with our unique engineering designs for each project. HMD Steel Construction has approximately 1 GW of experience in Turkiye and Foreign Countries.

HMD Solar Construction continues to work with the pride of always providing customer satisfaction with its high production capacity, sustainable quality and fast production.

Name: Smart Energy_ltd
Description:
Tvrtka je osnovana 2011. godine i u cijelosti je u vlasništvu matične tvrtke KING ICT d.o.o..

Osnovna djelatnost tvrtke je pružanje sveobuhvatne usluge pripreme, projektiranja, izgradnje i održavanja energetskih sustava  i postrojenja.
Izvodimo integrirana rješenja prema specifičnim potrebama korisnika.

Razvijamo rješenja u bliskoj suradnji s našim klijentima pažljivim planiranjem i računalnim simulacijama, uz multidisciplinarni pristup i optimizaciju. Rezultat takvog integriranog timskog pristupa svakom projektu je izvrstan omjer cijene i kvalitete ponuđenog rješenja.

Moduli u našoj ponudi obuhvaćaju  rješenja vezana uz postizanje energetske neovisnosti uvođenjem fotonaponskih (solarnih) elektrana uz centralni nadzor neovisno o lokaciji. Pored toga nudimo klimatizacijska rješenja i LED rasvjetu vlastite proizvodnje, što također bitno utječe na smanjenje troškova poslovanja.
 
Dio proizvoda i usluga koje nudimo:
 
-	Fotonaponske elektrane i elektro-punionice
-	Upravljanje energijom
-	Klimatizacijska rješenja (dizalice topline, hlađenje prostora, ovlaživanje hala….)
-	Javna i industrijska LED rasvjeta s centralnim upravljanjem (vlastita proizvodnja)
 
Svi moduli obuhvaćaju sve projektne aspekte: 

-	savjetovanje i projektiranje, inženjering, izgradnju, upravljanje i održavanje. 

GOSPODARSKA DJELATNOST
Tvrtka nudi dvije glavne usluge:
a) usluge vođenja procesa izgradnje - projektiranje, građenje i upravljanje građenjem 
b) integrirani model upravljanja energijom uz ugovaranja proizvodnje energije ili rješenja bazirana na energetskoj učinkovitosti

ORGANIZACIJA 
Tvrtka je ustrojena kroz odjele koji mogu provesti sve operacije u procesu razvoja projekta od projektiranja do izvođenja i održavanja. U svim odjelima rade ovlašten projektanti i voditelji radova:
•	automatike i energijske tehnologije 
•	elektrotehničkih sustava 
•	građevinarstva
•	strojarskih sustava

Tvrtka ima certificirane sustave ISO 9001, 14001, 45000, 29000 i 3834:2.

Think smart. Think sustainable.

Name: ECO PRODUKT
Description:
Sme ECO PRODUKT- tím špecialistov na solárnu energiu zo Slovenska (Prievidza). Zaoberáme sa predajom komplexných riešení v oblasti fotovoltických systémov na chaty, domy, firmy a iné aplikácie.

Už od roku 2010 sa pohybujeme vo svete inovatívnych technológii, ktoré riešia problém elektrického pripojenia mimo elektrickej siete - off grid.

Od roku 2010 rozvíjame našu víziu pomáhať našim zákazníkom šetriť čas aj peniaze prostredníctvom využívania solárnej energie. Naše produktové portfólio obsahujúce solárne svietidlá, solárne baterky, panely či nabíjačky sa rozšírilo o v súčasnosti náš core business, ktorým sú celé fotovoltické zostavy pre vašu domácnosť, firmu, ale dokonca aj auto, loď alebo karavan.

Z online shopu sme sa rozšírili aj do offlinu. Naši kolegovia navštevujú vaše domácnosti, aby vám nainštalovali a spojazdnili solárne systémy, ďalší kolegovia sa starajú o administratívnu a legalizačnú časť celého procesu.

Na našom LinkedIn profile by sme s vami chceli zdieľať nielen naše projekty a realizácie, ale aj technologické novinky z oblasti fotovoltiky, ktorými žijeme a zavádzame do praxe. Zároveň chceme zdieľať aj príbehy našich kolegov a kolegýň, dianie z našej spoločnosti. 
Ak chcete sledovať aktuálne novinky z tejto oblasti a diania vo firme - nezabudnite nám dať follow.

Name: Easydura
Description:
Welkom bij Easydura Solar Industry, dé pionier op het gebied van duurzame oplossingen voor zowel particulieren als het MKB.

Met meer dan een decennium aan ervaring heeft ons toegewijde team een onbetwistbare reputatie opgebouwd in Nederland. We hebben een bewezen staat van dienst als het gaat om het implementeren van duurzame oplossingen, afgestemd op de unieke behoeften en doelstellingen van onze klanten.

In de komende jaren staan we klaar om een cruciale rol te spelen in de transitie naar een duurzame gebouwde omgeving. Onze missie is duidelijk: we willen de meest effectieve en duurzame oplossingen bieden die bijdragen aan een groenere toekomst tegen een marktconform tarief.

Vanuit onze thuisbasis in Venlo opereren we door het hele land, waarbij we zowel de particuliere als zakelijke markt bedienen. Of het nu gaat om grootschalige projecten of kleine initiatieven, bij Easydura vindt iedereen met een duurzaamheidsvraagstuk een passende oplossing.

Wij treden op als adviseur, leverancier en installateur op diverse gebieden, waaronder zonnepanelen, laadpalen, isolatiesystemen, energieopslag, smart energy, en verwarmings- en koelsystemen.

Onze deskundige adviseurs en installatieteams zijn dagelijks door het hele land actief, om onze klanten te adviseren en projecten succesvol af te ronden. Bij Easydura staat klanttevredenheid voorop, en streven we ernaar om onze klanten te helpen bij het realiseren van hun duurzaamheidsdoelstellingen.

Kies voor Easydura Solar Industry en laat ons uw partner zijn in de transitie naar een groenere en duurzamere toekomst.

Name: Nova Scotians Going Solar
Description:
Nova Scotians Going Solar, based in Nova Scotia, is an avant-garde sales company focusing exclusively on solar power systems. We champion sustainable energy and help homeowners transition towards a carbon-neutral future.

Unlike typical solar companies, our mission revolves around the sale of solar systems rather than their installation. We're committed to providing our customers with detailed product information and personalized guidance, empowering them to make informed decisions about their energy needs.

Our sales force is contracted through a separate entity, providing the expertise and enthusiasm crucial for our operations. Our General Manager, Dylan, navigates our company towards its strategic goals, ensuring cohesive operations and robust growth.

As part of our expansion strategy, we employ a direct control model in Atlantic provinces, allowing us to stay connected with our original market. For our national expansion, we're considering a franchise model, ensuring local insight while fostering rapid growth.

We have an active online presence on platforms like Facebook and Instagram. Our social media engagement informs the public about the benefits of solar energy, spurring conversations about sustainable living.

Our sales representatives enjoy a comprehensive benefits package and incentive program. These are designed to boost performance, encourage excellence, and create an inspiring work environment.

In short, Nova Scotians Going Solar isn't merely a sales company. We are part of a greener revolution. With us, investing in a solar system is an impactful step towards a sustainable future.

Name: Solar Power Store Canada
Description:
Simple and easy solar power solutions for homeowners, commercial businesses, and more. Comprehensive sales and installation services for all types of solar power applications. Simple, easy, solar.

Solar Power Store has rapidly grown to become a preferred source for reliable and flexible solar power equipment, and a leading innovator in off-grid, grid-tied, and hybrid solar power solutions. We’ve grown to expand our offering to include the best brands in solar power technology and the most comprehensive range of solar power products in Canada. We stock top-quality solar panels, solar inverters, ESS batteries, solar panel mounts, and all the accessories, wiring, connectors, and hardware needed to complete a powerful and flexible solar energy system.

We don’t stop there, though. Here at Solar Power Store, it’s not just about the products and technology, but also how solar power systems are configured, installed, and certified. Our solar power experts work to deliver complete turn-key solar systems for homeowners, commercial businesses, agricultural applications, and all others in need of flexible, powerful, and efficient power solutions. We provide a full suite of services to help our customers build the perfect solar system for their needs, obtain the required permits, install the system properly, and ensure that all the applicable certifications, approvals, and inspections are completed. Whatever you need us to take care of, you can be confident that it will be done right.

As a proudly Canadian-owned and operated business, Solar Power Store is committed to providing our customers with the best customer service and technical support. Our team is based right here in Barrie, Ontario, and we have a nationwide network of trusted installation and service partners to support customers from coast to coast. We’re here to back you up with answers to any questions or concerns you may have and to help ensure that your solar power system is operating at peak efficiency.

Name: Brasseurs d'Energies
Description:
Les Brasseurs d’Energie, c’est une société créée le 26 novembre 2020 par un groupe de 11 habitants de l’Eurométropole de Strasbourg pour développer les énergies renouvelables sur ce territoire. Rejoignez-nous !

Cette société, ouverte à toutes et à tous, vise à permettre aux citoyens de se réapproprier la question énergétique au sein de leur territoire. Elle propose à chacun de devenir acteur de la transition. En mutualisant les investissements, les risques et les bénéfices à travers une gouvernance à majorité citoyenne, elle soutient un projet destiné à être  pérenne et collectif.

Ses principaux objectifs sont les suivants : créer et gérer des projets d’énergie renouvelable au niveau local, développer des synergies entre les différents acteurs et les différentes structures engagés pour la transition énergétique sur le territoire de l’Eurométropole de Strasbourg, créer du lien social et permettre un investissement responsable basé sur des valeurs humanistes et écologiques plutôt que sur un critère purement financier.

Name: WIRTHGRUPPE
Description:
Kernkompetenzen – Basis für eine erfolgreiche Partnerschaft

Die WIRTH GRUPPE wurde im Jahr 1997, von dem Unternehmer Hans Wirth und seinen beiden Söhnen Markus und Andreas Wirth, zur Bündelung aller erlangten Kompetenzen und Erfahrungen auf Basis von unterschiedlichen Tätigkeitsfeldern gegründet.

Hierdurch wurden optimale Voraussetzungen geschaffen, das Know-How und die Erfahrungen aus über 30 Jahren Geschäftstätigkeit in unterschiedlichen Branchen weiterzugeben.

Die WIRTH Gruppe setzt Ihre Investitionsschwerpunkte auf Immobilienportfolios, Erneuerbare Energien und strategische Investitionen.

Sie ist erfolgreich vertreten in unterschiedlichen nationalen und internationalen Sparten und Branchen. Als Eigentümer und Teilhaber von über 150 Gesellschaften (Kapital- und Personengesellschaften) sowie Firmenbeteiligungen in unterschiedlichsten Branchen in Europa und den USA, liegt ihr Fokus auf der Portfolio-Diversifizierung und Optimierung sowie der Streuung der Risikoklassen bereits getätigter und zukünftiger Investments.

Schlanke Strukturen, kurze Wege und direkte Ansprechpartner sind das Erfolgsgeheimnis bei der Umsetzung von Projekten aller Größenordnungen. Denn dies gibt der WIRTH GRUPPE die Flexibilität, detailgetreu die Anforderungen und Aufgabenstellungen ihrer Kunden zu erfüllen.

Mit zielgerichtetem Outsourcing wurde sukzessive ein Netzwerk von erstklassigen Partnern, welches in die Entwicklung, Planung, Finanzierung, Umsetzung, Verwaltung und Kontrolle der Investments eingebunden ist, geschaffen.

Die Verantwortungsbereiche wurden mit diesem Schritt auf hoch qualifizierte Experten übertragen, welche der Garant für langfristig überdurchschnittliche Ergebnisse sind.

Erfolgreich gewachsene Partnerschaften mit Kunden, Partnern und Dienstleistern bilden das Grundgerüst, um jedes Projekt zielgerichtet zum Erfolg zu führen.

- Réalisation des études

- Installation des panneaux solaires
- SAV et maintenance de l'installation

La philosophie d'ALSUN, s’articule autour de 4 valeurs fondatrices : Proximité́, Professionnalisme, Intégrité́ et Agilité́.

Notre expérience, nous permet de répondre à toutes les problématiques des particuliers et professionnels : Autoconsommation, revente ...

By choosing Dascon Contracting LLC, you'll benefit from:

Reduced energy costs: Solar power can significantly lower your electricity bills, putting money back in your pocket.

Join us in building a brighter, more sustainable future for Dubai. Contact Dascon Contracting LLC today for a free consultation!

Name: FRES Uganda
Description:
FRES Uganda provides energy for domestic use, small business enterprises, and institutions. We have various energy options that can be tailored to specific client needs starting at 300 watts a day. Our clients benefit from low upfront costs, reliable energy supply, timely fault handling, free component replacements, system insurance, upgrades, and downgrades including transfer of the system anywhere in our area of operation at the request of our client. All the client does is pay a small connection fee and a monthly energy access fee while he is using our system. In instances where the client no longer needs our service, the system is withdrawn, refurbished, and leased to a new client.
Our 10 years of service have shown that clients prefer our service, to buying their own systems outright because we guarantee energy access and we offer free and timely fault handling which is not the case when they own their systems. We have served over 10,000 households, 500 schools, 200 worship centers, 50 clinics, and 3000 small businesses. 
Currently, we are exploring opportunities in energy for productive use to support efforts in agricultural value addition and medium-scale enterprises. We are also working on a mini-grid model suitable for rural conditions in Uganda by leveraging our 20 years plus experience in operating mini-grids in West Africa (Mali & Guinea Bissau).

RDS cuenta como principal activo a un equipo humano, con gran capacidad de trabajo y esfuerzo, consciente de la importancia de todos y cada uno de los detalles a la hora de ejecutar un proyecto, realiza una continua autoevaluación en cada una de las fases de trabajo, teniendo en cuenta todos los pormenores del proceso para realizar una eficaz ejecución y puesta en marcha de la instalación.

Además contamos con el apoyo de las primeras marcas del sector. Todo ello nos hace estar a la vanguardia en realización de instalaciones de energía solar fotovoltaica. RDS desarrolla principalmente los trabajos:

-Fabricación y comercialización de soluciones estructurales para el desarrollo de proyectos de energía solar, tanto fotovoltaica como térmica.

-Montaje integral de sistemas de fijación y colocación de módulos fotovoltaicos.

-Ejecución de obra civil derivada de las mismas (acondicionamiento de terreno, canalizaciones, vallado, accesos, pavimentaciones, etc...).

-Montaje completo de sistemas y equipos eléctricos, desde la conexión de módulos hasta la conexión a red.

-Comercialización de módulos fotovoltaicos y componentes relacionados (trabajamos con primeras marcas del sector).

-Realización de instalaciones de energía solar fotovoltaica "llave en mano".

Name: ENPLA GmbH
Description:
Durch die Investition in eine Photovoltaikanlage von ENPLA sichern Sie sich als Unternehmer zahlreiche Vorteile. Die Eigenproduktion von Solarstrom reduziert Ihre Energiekosten erheblich und trägt gleichzeitig dazu bei, Ihren CO₂-Fußabdruck erheblich zu verkleinern. So unterstützen Sie aktiv die Energiewende – ein entscheidender Schritt in Richtung einer nachhaltigeren Zukunft.

Zusätzlich stärkt eine Photovoltaikanlage das Umweltbewusstsein Ihres Unternehmens in der Öffentlichkeit. Der von Ihnen erzeugte Solarstrom kann flexibel genutzt werden – sei es durch Eigenverbrauch, Speicherung oder Einspeisung ins öffentliche Netz.

Mit einem Batteriespeicher steigern Sie den Eigenverbrauch und können Lastspitzen effizient abfangen. Außerdem verbessert ein Stromspeicher die Netzqualität und hilft bei der Regelung der Blindleistung.

Das Ergebnis: Ihre Photovoltaikanlage von ENPLA bietet Ihnen langfristige Stabilität bei den Stromkosten, mehr Planungssicherheit und stärkt die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit Ihres Unternehmens.

Name: Solar Mason
Description:
Welcome to Solar Mason, a leader in the photovoltaic solar energy sector. Specializing in engineering, procurement, and construction, we bring innovative solar solutions to life. Our projects, ranging from modest 10 kW systems to extensive 10 MW installations, demonstrate our versatility and commitment to renewable energy.

At the core of Solar Mason’s operations is a holistic approach. We’re not just about installing solar panels; we’re about creating a sustainable future. Our process encompasses everything from the initial design and engineering to the final stages of construction. This end-to-end service model ensures that each project is tailored to meet our clients’ unique energy needs while adhering to the highest standards of quality and efficiency.

Our growth in the solar industry has been both rapid and robust. Currently, we’re excited to announce our expansion into 22 states. This move marks a significant step in our mission to spread renewable energy solutions nationwide, reducing carbon footprints and fostering sustainable communities.

The driving force behind our success is our team. That’s why we’re always looking for passionate individuals to join us. Whether you’re a seasoned solar industry expert or someone eager to dive into the world of renewable energy, Solar Mason offers a dynamic and innovative environment for career growth. We believe in nurturing talent, encouraging innovation, and building a team that shares our vision for a cleaner, greener future.

As we continue to expand and make a difference in the renewable energy landscape, we invite you to be part of this exciting journey. If you’re motivated by the challenge of advancing solar technology and passionate about making a positive environmental impact, Solar Mason is the place for you.

Join us as we harness solar power to light up the world. Discover more about our mission, values, and career opportunities by visiting our website.

Name: Jackson Solar, LLC
Description:
"An ethical solution at an ethical price"
Jackson Solar LLC, located in Jackson, MO, is owned an operated by Southeast Missouri State University Graduate Jacob Long, who graduated with a Bachelor's of Science in Sustainable Energy Systems as it relates to solar energy. The belief of our company is that providing environmentally ethical solar energy generation systems, should come at a fair, honest, and ethical price, and that communities, no matter how big or small should work together to provide a cleaner earth for our generation and generations to come. For us it is so much more than running a business. Many fly-by-night solar companies, and door-to-door solar sales companies are jumping from city to city, unethically overcharging those unfamiliar with the solar industry, in many cases falsely educating them, and in turn created a poor reputation for going solar. Name: CST4ALL
Description:
CST4ALL - Support to the Activities of the Concentrated Solar Thermal Technology Area of the SET Plan, is a project funded by Horizon Europe. CST4ALL aims to catalyze an array of hybridization and cooperation initiatives at the interface between Concentrated Solar Thermal (CST) and other renewable energy technologies.

The main hurdle the Concentrated Solar Thermal Technologies (CST) sector has been facing over the last decade in Europe is the assumed level of the costs of CSP power plants with a too narrow perception of its use as flexibility provider to the sole electricity systems.

To mitigate this, the CST4ALL project identifies an array of hybridisation and cooperation initiatives at the interface between CST and other technologies for applications relevant to the 3 sectors (electricity, heat and fuels) incorporating the work products of various ETIPs.

The core deliverable of CST4ALL consists of an intertwined set of workshops with respective industry and R&I focus. Both the research and the industry perspectives are first analysed aiming primarily at supporting and enlarging the network of active stakeholders in the CSP Implementation Working Group in the SET Plan and to raise the general awareness about the role CST can play in a future sustainable energy mix.

The workshops finally result in specific proposals at EU-level from a cross-sector perspective to foster public/private funding for R&I and create the necessary political/regulatory framework conditions for the execution of the new CSP Implementation Plan.

This project has received funding from the European Union's Horizon Europe research and innovation programme under grant agreement No 101075408. Views and opinions expressed are those of the authors only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

Ironically, Tor shares true solar news stories every day on Twitter and to the media. But... they’re mostly boring. Name: 1KOMMA5° Gold Coast
Description:
We believe everyone should strive to power their lives with environmentally responsible solutions, so that collectively we can repair the world around us.

Who are we? 
We are a passionate solar energy company based on the Gold Coast. We want our customers to have access to safe and reliable energy that help them save money and our environment. 

What do we do?
At Arkana, we’re all about positive energy.
We’re here to bring more positive energy into the world, pure and simple. It’s why we love solar so much – it reduces your power bills while helping repair the planet. So much positivity! But we don’t just do it through our products; we do it through our people too. 

We’re one big, happy family.
We’re a family run, family owned business. In fact, we named Arkana after a farm that’s been in the family since the 1930s. Why name a modern business after an old farm? Because that farm symbolised what we wanted our business to be: a happy place built on fairness, integrity and hard work. It may sound a little corny, but these values still run through the company today. You certainly won’t find any dishonest cowboys at Arkana – we can smell ‘em coming a mile away.

We’re in the Top 5 solar installers in Australia.
While we might be a family business, we’re no country bumpkins. In fact, we’ve also been recognised as one of Australia’s largest installers of solar by Sunwiz. So, you get the integrity and personal attention you’d expect from a family business, with all the benefits and economies of scale that come from a big business. Win win.

We know our stuff.
Did you know some solar companies are just sales and marketing teams who subcontract the actual solar installation work? Not us. We’re solar-obsessed electricians and engineers who know solar inside and out. It’s just one of the reasons more than 5000 customers love our work (and leave such glowing reviews). Then again, maybe it’s just our positive energy rubbing off on them?

Name: Gobel Power Energy(Shenzhen) Co., Ltd.
Description:
Gobel Power is a leading manufacturer and supplier of high-quality lithium-ion and lithium iron phosphate batteries, specializing in residential and commercial solar storage, RV, and marine applications. With a firm commitment to innovation, safety, and reliability, Gobel Power designs and manufactures battery solutions that meet the unique needs of each customer.

"Safe, Reliable, and High-Performance Energy Storage Solutions, Backed by Unparalleled Quality Control and Innovative Technology"

What set us apart from others is:
 
1. New cells only: We use only new cells in our battery packs, ensuring maximum lifespan and performance.
2. Innovative cell matching method: Our proprietary cell matching method ensures optimal cell consistency and performance.
3. Rigorous quality assurance process: Our comprehensive quality control process includes visual inspection, electrical testing, safety testing, and cycle life testing to guarantee the safety and reliability of our battery packs.
4. Transparent testing data and traceable quality control: We provide detailed testing data and quality control records, giving clients complete confidence in the performance and safety of their battery packs.
5. Active Balancing Optimization: Our batteries are integrated with stable intelligent BMS and Bluetooth active balancers, ensuring good consistency even after long-term use and optimizing the performance and lifespan of our batteries.
6. One-stop solution: We provide a one-stop battery solution from battery cells to BMS, as well as pre-installed batteries, making it easy for clients to get everything they need from a single supplier.

Gobel Power offers a unique value proposition that sets us apart from other battery manufacturers and provides our clients with safe, reliable, and high-performance energy storage solutions.

Name: Solaris Vita
Description:
En un mundo donde la demanda de alimentos crece rápidamente, los invernaderos tecnificados ofrecen una solución eficiente, pero su elevado consumo energético sigue siendo un gran desafío.

Nuestra tecnología integra células solares orgánicas directamente en los invernaderos. Estas células permiten que las plantas reciban la luz necesaria para crecer mientras generan electricidad con el resto del espectro solar. Así, transformamos los invernaderos en espacios autosuficientes y sostenibles.

Somos más que una solución tecnológica; somos un compromiso con el futuro de la agricultura y la energía limpia. Creemos que cada invernadero puede ser un motor de cambio, generando energía sin sacrificar la productividad agrícola.

Únete a Solaris Vita y sé parte de una comunidad que apuesta por un mundo donde la agricultura y la energía trabajan juntas por un planeta más sostenible.

Name: ICSS Engineering
Description:
ICSS Engineering is a solar energy automation company that specializes in providing SCADA and control solutions for integration of grid-tied solar PV. With ~170+ installations and 3,67,000+ man hours of experience we at ICSS help Solar EPC’s up-scale and up-sell solar projects with following flagship products:

PV SCADA MAX: (SCADA for everything Energy)
An on-site SCADA software platform focused on assisting operation & maintenance of grid-tied solar installation. It keeps track of point of failures, energy mix, weather & Load. Ensures maximum productivity of your renewable Investment SCADA MAX
1.	Realtime dashboards
2.	Inverter level & string level monitoring
3.	Visibility of energy mix among sources i.e. generators, grid and solar)
4.	Load monitoring & profiling
5.	Weather data & trending
6.	Alarms & events
7.	Automated and on-demand reporting
8.	Historical data for root cause analysis

EnergyPK PPC PV Genset controller (Power Plant Controller):
EnergyPK Hybrid solar-diesel controller provides superior coordination to deliver the highest amount of PV power for hybrid PV diesel applications. This solution works with the grid and diesel/gas generators to form a complete grid management solution. A power plant controller that ensures smooth and safe operation of your grid-tied solar systems with generators & grid. It ensures optimal and cost-effective power dispatch to your load, ensuring maximum benefit of solar renewable energy by saving on fuel in case of grid blackout.
1.	Multiple grid connections
2.	Multiple generators
3.	Zero export or limited export to grid
4.	Minimum genset loading setpoint
5.	Active power & reactive power control

Name: focusEnergie GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
focusEnergie GmbH & Co. KG ist ein stark expandierendes Unternehmen aus Freiburg und befasst sich mit der Umsetzung effizienter Energiekonzepte zur Strom-, Wärme- und Kälteversorgung. Der Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Planung und Installation von klimafreundlichen Photovoltaikanlagen in Kombination mit intelligenten Speicherlösungen und E-Mobilität. Als Generalunternehmer umfasst unser Angebot von Planung bis Wartung alle Leistungen aus einer Hand inklusive Nebengewerke wie Tiefbau, Sanierungen sowie Audits und Förderwesen.

Neben den klassischen Solardachanlagen bietet focusEnergie auch Solarparkplätze, Agri-PV, Floating-PV, Freiland-Photovoltaikanlagen, Solargründach, Fassaden-PV. Darüber hinaus bieten wir die professionelle Analyse, Planung und Umsetzung von Mieterstrom-Projekten an.
focusEnergie blickt auf über 30 Jahre Erfahrung im Bereich der erneuerbaren Energien zurück. Mit mehr als 30 Gigawatt erzeugtem Strom und der Einsparung von 20.000 Tonnen CO₂ haben wir nicht nur einen positiven Beitrag für die Umwelt geleistet, sondern auch unseren Kunden über 10 Millionen Euro an Stromkosten erspart.
 
Unsere Stärke liegt in der Kombination verschiedener Energietechnologien, die zu einem intelligenten Gesamtkonzept zusammengeführt werden.  focusEnergie entwickelt individuelle Energielösungen, die genau auf die Bedürfnisse der Kunden abgestimmt sind. Dabei werden Faktoren wie spezifische Anforderungen, der Stromverbrauch und die baulichen Gegebenheiten jedes Gebäudes berücksichtigt.
Mit eigener Software führen wir diesbezügliche Vergleichsrechnungen durch und erstellen entsprechende Wirtschaftlichkeitsbetrachtungen. Dabei beachten wir auf Wunsch gerne auch alle baubiologischen Aspekte durch eigens dafür ausgebildete Ingenieure.

Name: Solar Operation Solutions
Description: As part of our name’s sake, we work to craft solutions structured for utility scale solar installation. We do this in various ways while keeping the fundamentals of Lean company as our foundation. From Estimating to Substantial Completion most if not all projects face obstacles that deviate them from their intended course. The top five issues that projects face are caused by Weather, Staffing, Material Damage, Execution and Re-Work. There is no known method to eliminate these issues within the pre-planning phase of a project; industry standard is to calculate a reasonable amount of float needed to weather a storm while relying on its site team to mitigate overall impact to budget and schedule. Our solutions provide you and your teams the best resources and tools to not only reduce over all impact, but in most scenarios, eliminate adverse effects these obstacles have on your project’s health. We understand the need in this growing industry to remain competitive while safely delivering a quality product on time. S.O.S. can assist you to effectively reach your goals with our specialized equipment, tooling, and consulting services.

A R4 Energias Renováveis é uma empresa dedicada a entrega de soluções, investimentos, inovação e gestão de soluções energéticas, com foco em usinas fotovoltaicas.

Atuamos no fornecimento e instalação de projetos de usinas solares (EPC, BOT, Turn-key, O&M). Também atuamos na venda de serviço de Crédito de Energia através de Geração Distribuída. E por fim, na migração e gestão de agentes consumidores no Mercado Livre e Varejista.

No serviço de Crédito de Energia, sua unidade consumidora usufrui de descontos sobre a energia injetada por usinas solares, sem a necessidade de investimentos. Através de investimentos em Geração Distribuída, somos proprietários de 08 Usinas Solares e mais 06 novas usinas que estarão prontas em 2024, o que garante a entrega de Energia Elétrica sem a dependência de terceiros. 

A empresa possui Centro de Operação e Monitoramento Remota para unidades geradoras de fonte solar, com mais de 500 unidades (geradoras e consumidoras) sob gestão e monitoramento.

Também fomos responsáveis pela ativação de mais de 330 projetos de usinas entregues de energia solar de médio e grande porte.

Com mais de 14 anos de atuação no mercado de energia, a R4 Energia Renováveis é uma empresa 100% brasileira, com sede em Timbó/SC. Os sócios fundadores contam com mais de 30 anos de experiência no setor, sendo protagonistas nas maiores obras e eventos do setor no Brasil.

Acreditamos no modelo verticalizada de empresa, onde atuamos em todos os processos necessários da cadeia produtiva, e somos reconhecidos pela excelência no contato de pós venda e na busca pela excelência contínua de nossos processos internos.

Description:

WINDPOWER steht für zukunftsfähige Energielösungen im Bereich der Erneuerbaren Energien. Unser Ziel: Die Energie für Morgen. Jetzt!

Die Vision, die uns antreibt, ist ein Leben in Balance mit natürlichen Ressourcen und eine CO2-neutrale Wirtschaft, in der jeder Mensch ausschließlich Energie aus erneuerbaren Ressourcen nutzt. Unseren Auftrag sehen wir darin, die Energiewende effektiv und für alle gewinnbringend voranzutreiben.

Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 1995 haben wir über 40 regenerative Wind- und mehr als 20 Solar-Projekte mit insgesamt rund 110 MW Nennleistung realisiert. Neben der Strukturierung von regionalen Bürgergesellschaften liegt unser Fokus auf der Schaffung von maßgeschneiderten Betreibermodellen – um unsere Projekte möglichst bürgernah zu verankern und eine dezentrale Energieversorgung auf den Weg zu bringen.

Ein Schwerpunkt unseres Unternehmens liegt in der Projektentwicklung, der Realisierung und dem Betrieb von Photovoltaikanlagen – sowohl auf der Freifläche als auch auf Dächern. Vorwiegend konzentrieren wir uns bei PV-Dachanlagen auf Dächer im gewerblichen und industriellen Bereich. Unsere Expertise reicht dabei von der statischen Prüfung des Daches über die bauliche Umsetzung bis hin zur Inbetriebnahme und dem langjährigen Betrieb. Dabei kümmern wir uns sowohl um die kaufmännische als auch um die technische Betriebsführung. Wir sind Ihr Partner für Photovoltaik in Regensburg.

Daarnaast hebben we de afgelopen jaren mooie samenwerkingen opgebouwd met grote installatiebedrijven in de regio, waarmee we samen grote (nieuwbouw)projecten voorzien van zonnepanelen. 

Waar het ooit begon met drie vrienden vanuit een garage zijn we inmiddels uitgegroeid tot een bedrijf dat met 25 medewerkers een serieuze speler is in de wereld van verduurzamen in Noord-Nederland. Om bedrijven en de mensen thuis nog beter te kunnen helpen met het verduurzamen van hun bedrijfspand of huis hebben we er een paar jaar geleden voor gekozen om naast zonnepanelen ook een stap te maken naar het adviseren over en leveren en installeren van laadinfra voor elektrische auto’s en accuopslag. Zo kunnen we onze zakelijke en particuliere klanten helpen met het maken van de juiste keuzes en niet alleen op het gebied van het opwekken, maar ook het opslaan en verbruiken van zonne-energie. 

De vriendenmentaliteit binnen het bedrijf is altijd gebleven. We komen graag samen met klanten en partners tot de beste oplossing en als het even niet gaat zoals het moet dan staan we er ook.

Zapewniamy kompleksową obsługę instalacji elektrycznych pod klucz. 
Nasze 12-letnie doświadczenie pozwala nam posługiwać się tytułem EKSPERTA!

Zajmujemy się nawet najbardziej wymagającymi projektami.
Chętnie stworzymy dla Państwa rozwiązanie szyte na miarę potrzeb energetycznych dla firmy, dla domu, dla gospodarstwa rolnego czy dla całej gminy.

W Polsce coraz więcej inwestorów decyduje się na założenie własnej elektrowni słonecznej, spowodowane jest to rosnącą świadomością społeczeństwa i przekonaniem, że jest to pewna i zarazem bezpieczna inwestycja, dzięki której uzyskujemy również niezależność energetyczną. Przy tak poważnej inwestycji warto postawić na współpracę ze sprawdzonym partnerem, który oprócz długich gwarancji produktowych, daje także poczucie bezpieczeństwa.

Fotowoltaika, pompy ciepła, magazyny energii, zielony wodór, generatory wodoru, magazyny wodorowe, inżyniera przemysłowa, rozdzielnie elektryczne, carporty, stacje ładowania samochodów elektrycznych, ładowarki EV, diagnostyka, serwis, systemy zabezpieczeń, układy pomiarowe, detekcja wodoru i wiele innych.

Description:
POLYSHINE: Yenilikçi Güneş Enerjisi Sistemleri ve Daha Fazlası

POLYSHINE olarak, güneş enerjisi sistemleri üretimi ve kurulumunda öncü bir rol oynuyoruz. Ancak amacımız sadece güneş enerjisiyle sınırlı değil; bu, büyük bir dönüşümün sadece başlangıcıdır.

Firmamızın ana hedefi, teknolojiyi insanın yararına kullanmak ve bu çerçevede her türlü alanda çözümler sunmaktır. Güneş enerjisi sistemleri, sadece enerji ihtiyacını karşılamak için değil, aynı zamanda çevresel sürdürülebilirlik ve teknolojinin günlük yaşamımızdaki etkilerini en üst düzeye çıkarmak için bir araç olarak görülmelidir.

POLYSHINE olarak vizyonumuz, teknolojiyi insanlığın hizmetine sunarak yaşam kalitesini artırmak ve çevreye duyarlı çözümlerle sürdürülebilir bir gelecek inşa etmektir. Güneş enerjisi sistemlerindeki liderliğimiz, gelecekte geliştireceğimiz yeni teknolojiler ve çözümlerle genişleyecektir.

Biz POLYSHINE olarak, inovasyon, kalite ve çevresel sorumluluk ilkeleriyle hareket ederek, teknolojinin getirdiği fırsatları en iyi şekilde değerlendiriyoruz. Gelecekte daha fazla alanda etkili olacak çözümler geliştirme taahhüdümüzü sürdürüyoruz. POLYSHINE ile teknoloji, insanlığın ve gezegenimizin geleceği için daha sürdürülebilir, verimli ve yenilikçi bir şekilde kullanılıyor.

Name: mo energy systems GmbH
Description:
mo energy systems liefert das europaweit erste für Fassaden
optimierte Photovoltaik-System, um aus jedem Gebäude ein
Solarkraftwerk zu machen. Einfach zu montieren, als Komplettsystem
zertifiziert und 100% made in Europe.

Der weltweite Umstieg auf eine nachhaltige Energieversorgung aus
erneuerbaren Ressourcen ist die große Herausforderung, die unsere
Generation als gemeinsame Aufgabe bewältigen muss. Das Plug & Play
PV-Fassadensystem von mo energy systems gibt jedem Solateur,
Fassadenbauer und Bauträger die Chance, Teil der Lösung zu sein, sein
Portfolio durch ein zukunftsweisendes Produkt zu erweitern und aus fast
jedem Gebäude ein Kraftwerk zu machen: Einfach. Komplett. Nachhaltig.

mo energy systems ist das erste standardisierte System, das speziell für die
Photovoltaik-Anwendung in der Fassade - gerade auch für den Bestand und auch einfachste Montage bei Neubau und Sanierung optimiert ist. 

Das Potenzial ist enorm. Nullenergiegebäude und der Einsatz von
Photovoltaik bei Neubauten sind in vielen Ländern der EU bereits
gesetzlich vorgeschrieben, aber auch bei Sanierungen werden nachhaltige
Systeme stark gefördert. Das Plug & Play PV-Fassadensystem von mo
energy systems ist für beide Anwendungen perfekt geeignet und kann
ohne große Vorkenntnisse montiert werden. Jede Fassade liefert 30 Jahre
lang nachhaltigen Ertrag und spart im Durchschnitt 1,5 Tonnen CO2
jährlich ein.

mo energy systems geht auf diesem Weg mit Leidenschaft voran, denn
jede Fassade kann mehr sein als nur Fassade und kann als mo facade zum Umwelt- und Klimaschutz beitragen.
mo ist Systemlieferant und spricht Fassadenbauer, Solateure, Elektriker, Bauträger direkt an. Aktuell bieten wir eine kostenlose Machbarkeitsanalyse und freuen uns über Anfragen von Privatpersonen mit Einfamilienhaus, über Investoren mit Wohnanlagen oder auch Unternehmer die ihr Gebäudenfassade optimieren wollen.

Name: Sustainable Site Power Ltd
Description:
SSP manufactures the highly acclaimed SSP Microgrid solar-hybrid generator. The SSP Microgrid is the UK’s only autonomous solar-powered off-grid generator that combines all the elements needed for reliable onsite power in one unit. SSP Microgrid has a proven track record across the Rail, Civil Engineering and Construction Sectors. 

SSP is the only UK company that manufactures and hires its hybrid generators.  Its solutions make it easier for contractors to use renewable energy on site to reduce their fuel costs, noise, NOx, PM and carbon emissions.

SSP Microgrid delivers up to 30kW of reliable, on-demand, off-grid power. Modelled on a standard 20ft shipping container, the SSP Microgrid's array of photovoltaic (PV) solar panels harvests the power of the sun and stores it in on-board batteries. Coupled with a diesel generator to provide energy security, fuel usage can be reduced by 80% when compared to a conventional diesel generator.

Name: S-POWER
Description:
Jsme odborníci na zdroje obnovitelné energie pro rodinné domy, bytové domy a komerční budovy. 
Od roku 2016 jsme po celé České republice úspěšně nainstalovali přes 11 000 střešních fotovoltaik a tepelných čerpadel. To z nás dělá jednu z nejsilnějších a nejdůvěryhodnějších firem v oboru. 
Zakládáme si na profesionalitě, kvalitě odvedené práce a individuálním přístupu ke každému zákazníkovi. S ohledem na konkrétní potřeby jednotlivých klientů vždy doporučíme nejvhodnější řešení a férově vysvětlíme i to, když něco smysl nedává.

Své klienty provázíme zakázkami od A do Z. To znamená, že nabízíme full-service služby. Zajistíme nejen projektovou přípravu a instalaci technologií, ale vyřídíme i dotaci a postaráme se o veškerý záruční i pozáruční servis.

Co všechno umíme?
Specializujeme se na fotovoltaické systémy, s akumulačními bateriemi i bez. Zajišťujeme i veškeré související technologie – od kvalitních střídačů až po nabíjecí wallboxy pro elektromobily.

Fotovoltaiku umíme efektivně zkombinovat i s tepelným čerpadlem – tak aby se obnovitelná energie dala užívat celoročně a úspora byla nejvyšší možná.
Veškeré technologie odebíráme od prověřených dodavatelů a v otázkách kvality neděláme kompromisy.

Kdo se na nás může obrátit?
•	Developeři
•	Firmy
•	Majitelé rodinných domů
•	SVJ a bytová družstva 
•	Vlastníci a provozovatelé komerčních budov
•	Zástupci měst a obcí

Realizace pro bytové domy
Od roku 2023 se ve velkém soustředíme i na bytové domy. Díky úpravě legislativy je sdílení solární energie mezi jednotlivé byty podstatně jednodušší než dřív. Fotovoltaikám pro bytová družstva a SVJ navíc nahrává i štědrá legislativa.

Spolupráce s developery
Ať už stavíte rodinné domy nebo velké bytové komplexy, rádi navrhneme optimální řešení, ušité na míru vašemu projektu. Postaráme se o kompletní přípravu i realizaci. Vy si ušetříte starosti a budete mít jistotu, že spolupracujete s profesionály, na které je spoleh.

Name: EarthSpark International
Description:
EarthSpark International is a non-profit incubator for strategies to deliver high-quality energy services to under-served communities.

EarthSpark pioneered solar microgrid and smart metering and controls for energy access communities. EarthSpark is now again disrupting widespread beliefs about microgrids by committing to 100% solar+storage grids with high service levels and high reliability. EarthSpark’s dynamic combination of “high-tech” solutions like smart-metering, demand-side management, electric cooking, and distributed energy resources and “no-tech” solutions like participatory governance, targeted energy literacy, and feminist electrification is a key differentiator that supports long-term sustainability and community collaboration. Further, EarthSpark being a non-profit that launches businesses is unique in the sector. The structure enables deep research and iteration to drive vetted solutions to scale.

To date EarthSpark has spun-off SparkMeter Inc., a venture-backed smart meter technology company, and Enèji Pwòp S.A., a Haitian clean energy retailer and microgrid operator. SparkMeter now serves electric utilities across 30 countries, and Enèji Pwòp is an established microgrid operator in Haiti. EarthSpark has also built Haiti’s first town-sized, solar-powered smart grid, launched a second in 2019, and secured $9.9M in support from Green Climate Fund for the launch of the next 22 grids.

Now also supporting work in Puerto Rico and South Sudan, EarthSpark is a true partner for communities seeking better energy.

Name: Essential Solar
Description:
Essential Solar is a 100% Australian owned and operated company established in 2012. We install solar panels to homes and businesses throughout Australia and have an impeccable track record when it comes to customer satisfaction.

Essential Solar is a high quality retailer, designer & installer of both residential and commercial solar PV rooftop systems.  We are committed to providing the right solution to each and every customer by tailoring our systems to their individual needs.

At Essential Solar we regard each customer as an important part of our business.  We pride ourselves in providing advice, support and service where and when it’s needed.  Most importantly the installation quality of our Solar PV products is managed by experienced electrical technicians and engineers.

As well as the environmental benefits of solar power, we understand that an important driver for choosing to install solar PV is to save money. The design team at Essential Solar will analyse our customers’ electricity bills and electricity usage profile ensuring the system provides the best financial return.

Of course, purchasing a solar PV system is a long-term commitment so the reliability of the components and the entire system is critically important.  For that reason, at Essential Solar, we choose to only use Tier One products such as Yingli Solar Panels and Fronius Inverters.

At the heart of the solar system is the inverter which converts the solar-generated power from the panels into useful and controlled electricity that can power your house.  As Essential Solar is an accredited Fronius Service Partner our service technicians are highly trained by Fronius Australia to provide you with the the levels of service and on-going reliability expected in this industry.

Name: Efecte Fotovoltaic
Description:
Efecte fotovoltaic s’ha procurat la màxima experiència professional amb persones provinents del sector de l’energia solar fotovoltaica, oferint així una expertesa contrastada de mes de 20 anys. L’Equip humà està format per els millors professionals, tant enginyers experts en projectes com tècnics en instal·lació, en legalització, tramitació i posada en marxa.

El nostre objectiu es promoure i donar a conèixer els beneficis de l’energia solar fotovoltaica. Fer pedagogia de la possibilitat, plenament legal, d’invertir en un futur més renovable.

L’energia solar te moltes aplicacions, des de alimentar satèl·lits, boies al mar, instal·lacions aïllades on no arriba la xarxa elèctrica, autoconsum, bombeig solar per regadiu, com grans plantes fotovoltaiques de producció d’energia.

Actualment, el sector de l’energia, és un dels sectors estratègics claus de qualsevol país. L’actualitat esta marcada per la introducció de sistemes de transport individual elèctric, mes eficients i ecològics. L’energia elèctrica agafa més pes en el nostre dia a dia. Així que la gestió de l’energia cada dia serà més important pels usuaris, en tots els aspectes de les seves vides.

Fins fa molt poc, el sector ha estat alentit a causa de unes condicions legals desfavorables, tot i així, el sector ha sigut capaç d’oferir un producte atractiu: l’autoconsum. L’auto generació d’energia elèctrica mitjançant plaques solars.

Avui en dia, és més econòmic, generar la teva pròpia energia, que adquirir-la de la companyia distribuïdora. El preu dels mòduls fotovoltaics s’ha reduït significativament, això ha fet molt atractives les instal·lacions d’autoconsum tant per habitatges com per indústries.

Nosso principal compromisso é oferecer serviços que de fato sejam soluções para nossos clientes, serviços que mudem a maneira como eles pensem o uso de energia. A personalização do que ofertamos, é o nosso selo de comprometimento. Para nós, não existe receita de bolo. Ouvimos o nosso cliente, identificamos seu ponto de dor, diagnosticamos cada um dos problemas, e desenvolvemos solução única. Pautada em economia financeira e energética, eficiência e sustentabilidade, qualidade e know-how, e valor agregado para ambas as partes. O sucesso constante do cliente é o que nos move.

Description:

És per aquest motiu que oferim una alternativa ecològica, sostenible i autosuficient per eliminar la dependència dels subministraments de xarxa minimitzant els seus costos al màxim i reduint l’impacte mediambiental pel bé de les persones i del nostre planeta.

El nostre equip està format per professionals amb una dilatada experiència en el camp de l’eficiència energètica i les energies renovables. Persones formades que han treballat i participat activament durant anys per donar servei a qui vol contribuir a reduir els efectes del canvi climàtic i alhora disminuir la seva factura de consum elèctric.

Cerquem sempre la confiança dels nostres clients oferint innovació tecnològica i millora continuada per a l'optimització dels components del seu muntatge, complint sempre amb tots els requisits legals, certificacions i normatives.

Name: SRM Solar
Description:
SRM Solar is owned and managed by the team that founded the building energy and sustainability specialists, Stroma Group, over twenty years ago.  In 2010 they set up their solar PV subsidiary Stroma Energy,  which grew rapidly in line with the UK market overall, completing hundreds of domestic and commercial PV installations across the UK.

In 2014, the founders sold a controlling stake in Stroma to LDC, and as part of this transaction, carved out and retained the solar PV assets and business.  At this juncture, SRM Solar was incorporated to take their solar PV interests forward.  

Based in West Yorkshire, and part of the Mysing Group, SRM Solar is staffed by experienced renewables experts offering design, supply, installation, and servicing of Solar PV and Battery Energy Storage Systems. The Team has been installing large PV systems on commercial buildings, such as offices, factories, and warehouses, using Grade A products from Tier 1 manufacturers for over a decade.

Furthermore, we have significant experience with regulatory compliance practices and can help navigate third-party involvement, often involving consultants, finance providers, DNO, and local authorities.

Description:
Switch has come to champion the future of energy generation in Africa by developing clean and accessible technologies with rock solid business models linked to the needs of the customer. As an enterprise with deep expertise in technology and finance, we target to set new standards for home improvement.

Our vision is to displace centralized power plants by 2025, and enable cost-effective decentralized energy supply for all of Africa's 1 Billion people by 2100. To achieve this ambitious mission, we are building an integrated platform that combines real-time metering of energy use, price difference calculation between different energy sources, software that enables households and businesses to choose an electricity supplier based on their carbon footprint preferences.

Name: Senkronist
Description:
Senkronist, güneş enerjisi sektöründe lider bir çözüm sağlayıcısı olarak, sürdürülebilir enerji dönüşümüne öncülük etmeyi amaçlamaktadır. Misyonumuz, yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarını kullanarak müşterilerimize en yüksek kalitede çevre dostu enerji çözümleri sunmak ve böylece hem çevresel etkileri azaltmak hem de enerji maliyetlerini optimize etmek için çalışmaktadır.  

Güneş enerjisi sistemleri tasarımı, kurulumu ve bakımı konusunda uzmanlaşmış bir firmadır. Müşterilerimize özel çözümler sunarak, her ihtiyaca uygun güneş enerjisi projelerini hayata geçirmektedir. Hem endüstriyel hem de konut segmentinde hizmet vermekte olup, müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutmaktayız.

Sektördeki en son teknoloji ve en güncel güneş enerjisi çözümlerini takip ederek, müşterilerine en verimli ve sürdürülebilir enerji sistemlerini sunmayı hedeflemektedir. Sürekli olarak AR-GE çalışmalarına önem veriyor ve sektöre yenilikçi çözümler katkıda bulunuyoruz.
Güneş enerjisi sistemlerinde uzmanlaşmış sürdürülebilir bir enerji geleceği için çalışmaya devam ediyor ve müşterilerine güvenilir, verimli ve çevre dostu enerji çözümleri sunma taahhüdünü sürdürüyoruz. 

Powering A Green Future!

Name: Pró-Energia Engenharia elétrica
Description:
A empresa Pró-Energia Engenharia Elétrica é uma empresa de engenharia elétrica da cidade de Uberlândia – MG que oferece serviços de projetos elétricos residenciais, comerciais e industriais com foco na qualidade de atendimento das necessidades do cliente e de seu empreendimento. Para isso a empresa conta com corpo de engenheiros eletricistas, desenhistas e assistentes. A empresa atua na área de projetos em Mina Gerais, São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Goiás e Distrito Federal.

Dentro do portfólio de serviços da empresa estão projetos elétricos de baixa e média tensão, cabeamento estruturado, telefonia, CFTV, automação, SPDA, aterramento elétrico e sistemas fotovoltaicos de geração distribuída. Grande destaque para sistema de geração fotovoltaica, a empresa elabora projetos e faz acompanhamento de obras de sistemas solares a quase 3 anos e já conquistou grande know hall na área.

A empresa atua também na área de elaboração de laudos técnicos e consultorias relacionadas a problemas referentes à instalações elétricas, sistemas de proteção contra descargas atmosféricas, aterramento, NR-10, eficiência energética. Além disso, a empresa também atua no acompanhamento de obras de instalações elétricas, principalmente no ramo comercial e industrial.

A Pró-Energia Engenharia Elétrica elabora seus projetos baseados nas normas técnicas mais recentes, nas boas práticas e experiências de execução de obras, com o objetivo de satisfazer o cliente e suas necessidades principais, seja do ponto de vista econômico-financeiro seja pautado pela confiabilidade e disponibilidade de energia elétrica. O objetivo é sempre ter o melhor custo-benefício e menor manutenção e custo recorrente para o prédio e para o cliente. Além disso, a Pró-Energia procura sempre trabalhar nos maiores princípios éticos que a profissão de engenheiro exige tanto com o cliente quanto com seus funcionários e parceiros.

Name: Voltier
Description:
Voltier is gedreven door de overtuiging dat duurzame energieoplossingen de sleutel zijn voor bedrijven en particulieren die vastlopen en verder willen gaan. Ons doel is om transparante en haalbare doelen te stellen, waar we met toewijding aan werken. Wij onderscheiden ons door te streven naar kwaliteit en expertise in onze dienstverlening. Onze totaaloplossingen voor zakelijke panden en particuliere woningen worden gekenmerkt door maatwerk en een langetermijnvisie. Voltier integreert duurzaamheid in al zijn activiteiten door klanten oplossingen te bieden voor besparing en het aanpakken van maatschappelijke problemen, zoals netcongestie, door middel van innovatieve oplossingen zoals batterijopslag.

Voltier is gespecialiseerd in het leveren van totaaloplossingen voor duurzaamheid in Nederland. Ze nemen alle aspecten van verduurzaming op zich, waaronder zonnepanelen, airco's, laadpalen, warmtepompen, energieopslag en slimme sturing. Dit betekent dat klanten een betrouwbare partner hebben voor de lange termijn, die samen met hen werkt aan het verwezenlijken van hun duurzame doelen. Voltier streeft naar transparante doelstellingen en maakt gebruik van expertise om deze te realiseren.
