Name: Tribal Solar Accelerator Fund
Description:
The Tribal Solar Accelerator Fund (TSAF) works in partnership with tribes to bring technical, financial, and cultural resources to support their projects and address their unique challenges and opportunities.

At its core, TSAF is about mobilizing and developing tribal solar projects and integrating workforce development and training, nation-building, and strengthening the energy resilience of tribal communities with visions for a clean energy outlook for generations to come. The TSAF supports tribes in asserting control over their energy resources and focuses on making solar implementation feasible by leveraging state and federal programs, philanthropic dollars, and partnerships with other tribes across Indian County.

The TSAF remains one of the only grantmaking programs specifically designated for tribal solar projects and cultivating the next generation of tribal energy leaders. Through our grants, fellowships, and scholarships, we are strengthening the capacity of Indian Country to lead the way to a renewable energy future.

Name: Green Integrations Inc.

Who We Are:
We’re a team of professionals passionate about sustainability and the possibilities of clean technology. More than just experts, we’re people who care deeply about creating a future where innovation serves everyone—businesses, communities, and the planet.

Let’s create a greener, smarter future—together.

Solar power systems derive clean, pure energy from the sun. Installing solar panels on your home, industry, commercial complex or institute helps combat greenhouse gas emissions and reduces our collective dependence on fossil fuels. Traditional electricity is sourced from coal they are fossil fuels and finite resources it’s bad for the environment. Limited availability creates a volatile market in which energy prices can skyrocket in a short period of time. Unlike the fossil fuels that still provide the bulk of India’s power supply, solar panels generate electricity with no air or carbon pollution, no ash or other waste products, and no inputs other than sunlight.
Our integrated, cross-functional project teams provide an all-inclusive approach to developing and managing large-scale solar projects. We take care of it all—from proposal development to predesign to liasoning  to design to engineering and construction to pre-commissioning, commissioning, final inspection, and interconnection. We offer integrated project development, EPC, financing, and O&M services without involving multiple third-party services. This approach has allowed us to generate efficiencies of scale that further drive down system costs.
As an EPC contractor, Seven solar energy help its customers from concept design to commissioning of the plant that considers time, cost, and quality parameters. The unique combination of highly skilled project management, highly qualified resources, engineering capabilities, and a reputation as a quality builder has enabled our firm to compete in numerous utility scales.

At the core of their mission is a commitment to fostering environmental stewardship and building a more sustainable future for generations to come.

At Sentient Labs, we acknowledge that the future of water body management lies in addressing the tragedy of the commons, a phenomenon where shared resources are overused and depleted due to individual self-interest. As urban populations expand, the efficient management of water resources becomes a critical aspect of urban planning and requires adoption of collaborative, smart, and sustainable solutions for management of the water bodies.

Conventional water management methods, which depend on manned boats for cleaning and sample collection, are no longer sufficient in the face of the tragedy of the commons. These outdated, labor-intensive, and costly approaches fail to consider the collective impact of individual actions on water resources. Furthermore, the lack of automation and predictive data modeling makes it challenging to identify emerging issues and take timely, cooperative action to address them.

Pleco by Sentient Labs is a comprehensive solution that combines expertly designed USVs with a data-focused platform to deliver real-time, accurate and predictive insights into the quality and health of sheltered water bodies.

Embrace the future of water management with Pleco, and witness a transformative impact that ripples across communities and ecosystems alike. 

Join us in our mission and reach out at pleco@sentientlabs.ae

Holocene most recently completed a portfolio of behind-the-meter projects designed and executed for two distribution cooperatives in Virginia. 

Our projects deliver bottom-line value to local distribution companies and benefits to the communities hosting our generation facilities. Our scalable solar distributed generation project portfolios increase grid reliability and improve efficiency of power delivery.

Holocene is currently using our deep experience with distributed generation to deliver a solution based on non-retail behind-the-meter generation (NRBTMG) rules and interconnected with LDCs, including electric cooperatives and municipalities in throughout the PJM territory. 

Going forward, Holocene is expanding this strategy into several other PJM markets, with the objective of continuing to take advantage of the opportunity presented in the PJM market and beyond. Holocene’s expansion will create an additional 200 mw portfolio for the next business planning cycle.

Name: PowerWells
Description:
PowerWells address the dual global problems of electronic waste and energy poverty by repurposing lithium-ion batteries from e-waste into home solar systems with lights which are deployed to regions without access to electricity.  

Within Australia, li-ion battery waste grows at over 20% p.a. but only 2% is recycled - CSIRO.

Globally, roughly 800 million people don’t have access to electricity - World Bank.

PowerWells recovers lithium-ion batteries from old electronics in e-waste, and uses them to build home solar-energy systems, which are deployed to countries and communities that do not have access to electricity and non-polluting lighting.

PowerWells also run workshops with Corporates and Schools that give participants hands on experience with building the home solar units and power-banks with lights while learning about sustainably recycling  e-waste and repurposing batteries to help address energy poverty.

PowerWells Foundation is an ACNC registered charity with DGR 1 status from the ATO meaning all donations over $2 are tax deductible.

Ekibimizi oluştururken de bizlerle aynı vizyon, hedef ve hevesi paylaşan arkadaşlarla birlikte çalışıyoruz. 

Solarline Enerji’de "ben" değil, "biz" varız ve hep birlikte hedefimize hızla ulaşmak için çalışıyoruz.

Nossos parceiros tecnológicos são referências mundiais nas suas respectivas áreas de atuação. Nossos parceiros de instalação são qualificados continuamente para atender os mais severos níveis de exigência técnica e de qualidade.

Os resultados são imediatos: redução dos custos operacionais, redução da pegada de carbono, independência e segurança energética.

Our clear and transparent approach to business partnerships certifies that all parties are comfortable that the best outcomes, return on investment and yields are achieved. 
 
Operation & Maintenance

Our strategy is to partner with our clients and take them on a green energy journey to ultimately become independent from Eskom.

Name: Ecolife Technologies
Description:
¿Te imaginas reducir tus costos operativos mientras aumentas la eficiencia de tu empresa?

Desde 2009, en Ecolife hemos trabajado con empresas de diversos sectores que se enfrentaban a facturas eléctricas elevadas, falta de control sobre su consumo energético y al impacto ambiental de su operación. Gracias a nuestras soluciones personalizadas, estas empresas lograron hacerse más competitivas y sostenibles al transformar su energía en un activo estratégico. Así, dejaron atrás desafíos como:

* Costos energéticos impredecibles que afectan la rentabilidad.
* Dependencia de la red eléctrica, que genera vulnerabilidad ante fallos o incrementos tarifarios.
* Desperdicio de calor residual en procesos industriales.
* Presión para cumplir con normativas ambientales cada vez más estrictas.

En Ecolife, diseñamos e implementamos soluciones integrales que transforman la energía en un motor de crecimiento rentable y sostenible:
- Sistemas fotovoltaicos (paneles solares)
- Cogeneración
- Energía térmica solar
- Almacenamiento de energía 
- Iluminación solar

Resultados que obtienen nuestros clientes:
* Ahorro de hasta un 99% en el consumo eléctrico.
* Mayor independencia energética y menor exposición a tarifas variables.
* Cumplimiento con normativas ambientales y reducción de la huella de carbono.
* Optimización operativa con una inversión estratégica y rentable.

Empresas como La Huerta, Tropper, Cementos Cruz azul, Procell, FrigoLagos, entre otras, ya han logrado reducir significativamente su consumo energético con nuestros proyectos llave en mano.

Agenda una asesoría gratuita con nuestros expertos e inicia la transición energética de tu empresa.

Name: Prezon BV
Description:
Waarom kiezen voor Prezon?
Omdat wij er alles aan willen doen om u zo goed mogelijk van dienst te kunnen zijn. Daarvoor lopen wij het vuur uit de sloffen, zorgen we dat u fiscaal niets mist, hebben we korte lijntjes zodat u snel geholpen kunt worden, denken we graag met u mee zodat u de beste aanbieding kunt krijgen en doen wij er alles aan om te zorgen dat u blij bent met onze service.

Maatwerk
Wij verkopen geen zonnepanelen! Bij ons krijgt u maatwerk. Wij geven onze klanten een duidelijk en eerlijk advies op maat. Wij willen u graag datgene adviseren wat wij zelf zouden toepassen in uw situatie.

Lijken wensen onmogelijk? 
Wij denken out of the box en denken met u mee. Voor al uw wensen zijn passende mogelijkheden en alternatieve oplossingen.

Onze producten
Een echt duurzaam product gaat langer mee. Naarmate een product langer meegaat, zal het meer voor u doen. En hoe meer het voor u doet, des te duurzamer is het product. Onze producten zijn duurzaam!

Prezon BV uit Dordrecht (dichtbij Barendrecht, Hardinxveld, Ridderkerk , Spijkenisse en omgeving) werkt uitsluitend met hoogwaardige kwalitatief goede duurzame producten. Onze producten hebben een langere levensduur dan gemiddeld.

Kennis, ervaring en service
Al onze medewerkers zitten met regelmaat in de schoolbanken om hun kennis op peil te houden. Hierdoor zijn wij in staat u het beste te bieden op gebied van advies, installatie, service en onderhoud.

Als bedrijf investeren we continu in het opleiden van onze mensen. en werken we uitsluitend met vakbekwame installatie-teams.

De adviesafdeling
Om u snel en vakkundig van dienst te kunnen zijn beschikken wij over 3 adviesteams:

– Team voor particuliere klanten
– Team voor MKB- en overheidsklanten
– Team voor technische ondersteuning

Name: Dabun Private Limited
Description:
Dabun was incepted in March-2020 with an aim to further accelerate the ongoing “Solar Revolution” in the country. Dabun intends to join forces with organizations already doing fantastic work in the field while striving to contribute to the ecosystem in its own way. 

At Dabun, we strive to bring cutting edge technology to the grassroot. It has been a great source of inspiration to see small hamlets in most remote areas go solar. We believe technology should not be limited to the Crème de la crème; it needs to trickle down to the last person in the system. At Dabun, we are working tirelessly towards that goal

Innovation has always been a key interest area for the company. 100% indigenous batteryless hybrid Solar PCU was introduced to the Indian market for the first time by Dabun. This was followed by launch of Lithium batteries for solar sets – espcially higher kVAs which turned out to be a hard nut to crack for Indian companies. 

Dabun brought Sun tracker technology to solar rooftops for the first time in India. This technology was limited to utility scale solar power plants thus far. 

Dabun is perhaps one of the few companies in India that provides it’s own solar panels, PCUs, batteries, structure, installation etc instead of assembling plant with material from different manufacturers. This helps the company take end-to-end responsibility of the plant and provide seamless unified warranty and support to the customer.

Through out the journey, the intent has always been to bring things to customers that they have never experienced before.

Name: BLASTING Energy
Description:
A Blasting Energy é uma empresa especializada em soluções de energia e climatização, desenvolve projetos únicos para habitações, edifícios, unidades hoteleiras, industriais e agrícolas. 

Com uma equipa experiente em energia, sustentabilidade, engenharia e projeto, a Blasting foca-se em entender adequadamente desafios específicos, uma vez que as soluções globais nem sempre são as mais apropriadas.

Trabalhamos individualmente ou em parceria com arquitetos, engenheiros e outros profissionais, pois os melhores resultados são normalmente alcançados em conjunto. Com uma equipa maioritariamente feminina, temos uma compreensão particular da importância dos detalhes.

Fundada em 2011 para atender à crescente procura por eficiência energética, a Blasting alcançou marcos importantes:

2014: Selecionada para integrar o Centro de Inovação da Faculdade de Ciências - Tec Labs devido ao seu método e resultados publicados.
2017: Convidada a fazer parte da rede Empresa Ciência.
2019: Obtém a certificação Passive House.
2020: Convidada a integrar a Incubadora da Universidade de Lisboa, onde se encontra atualmente.
2022: Projeta e instala o seu primeiro gerador solar fotovoltaico flutuante de 40 KW pico.

Até hoje, já realizou mais de meia centena de projetos de energia e climatização.

PASSIVE HOUSE
A Passive House é uma certificação de construção que tem como objetivo aumentar significativamente a eficiência energética no aquecimento e arrefecimento de espaços. 

A poupança de energia pode ser superior a 90% em comparação com os edifícios existentes e 75% relativamente a edifícios novos que não sigam os critérios Passive House.

Como empresa certificada Passive House, a Blasting Energy pode fornecer orientação a arquitectos, engenheiros, promotores e proprietários em como melhorar o desempenho energético na concepção, construção e/ou renovação de edifícios.

EQUIENERGIA supporta i suoi clienti in qualsiasi ambito relativo all'energia: progettazione, studi di fattibilità, consulenza (tecnica, autorizzativa, fiscale, gestionale), realizzazione di impianti di produzione di energia, di impianti elettrici e termici e gestione e manutenzione degli stessi.
 
Dal 2015, inoltre, EQUIENERGIA opera anche come ESCo (Energy Service Company), investendo in modo diretto nella realizzazione di interventi di miglioramento dell'efficienza energetica.

Engagement envers la durabilité

Au Burkina Faso, de nombreuses régions souffrent encore d'un accès limité à l'électricité, ce qui entrave le développement économique et social. Nous croyons fermement que l'énergie solaire peut jouer un rôle clé dans la résolution de ces défis.
L’un de nos principaux objectifs est de rendre l’énergie solaire accessible à tous. Name: Rushikesh Green Solar Power
Description:
We are specializes in the design, installation, and maintenance of solar power systems. We play a crucial role in the development of solar projects, whether they are small-scale or large-scale Residencial,Industrial & Commercial project.

☆Engineering: The engineering aspect involves assessing the site, conducting feasibility studies, and designing the solar power system. We analyze factors such as sunlight availability, shadow analysis, electrical load requirements, and structural considerations to ensure an optimal design for maximum energy production.

☆Procurement: Once the engineering phase is complete, we takes care of procuring all the necessary components for the solar project. This includes solar panels, inverters, mounting structures, electrical equipment, and other system components. We have established relationships with reputable suppliers, ensuring the use of high-quality materials.

☆Construction: The construction phase involves the actual installation of the solar power system. We have skilled staff and installers who handle the entire process, including panel mounting, electrical wiring, connection to the grid (if applicable), and any required civil work. They adhere to industry standards and safety regulations to ensure a safe and efficient installation.

☆Maintenance: After the solar power system is installed and commissioned, We often provide ongoing maintenance and monitoring services. Regular inspections,performance monitoring, and troubleshooting are carried out to ensure the system operates optimally and any issues are addressed promptly. This helps maximize the system's performance and lifespan.

Name: LBC Solar Energy
Description:
LBC Solar Enerji, yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarından güneş enerjisi alanında uzmanlaşmış mühendislik ekibiyle, güneş enerjisinden elektrik üretmek, fotovoltaik panel ekipmanları temini ve kurulumunu (EPC) gerçekleştirmek ve bu alanda her türlü danışmanlık hizmeti vermek maksadıyla 2018 yılında Ankara’da kurulmuş bir mühendislik ve danışmanlık firmasıdır. Türkiye ve Almanya’da faaliyet gösteren firmanın kurucu ortakları, 2019 yılında şirket faaliyetlerini güneşlenme süresinin daha yüksek olduğu Güneydoğu Anadolu Bölgesinde sürdürme kararı aldı ve merkez ofisi Şanlıurfa’ya taşıdı.

Sahip olduğu uluslararası iletişim ağı sayesinde sektördeki yenilikleri ve gelişmeleri yakından takip eden LBC Solar, oluşturduğu profesyonel ekibi ile çok kısa bir sürede oldukça başarılı projelere imza attı. LBC Solar, EPC danışmanlık ve güneş enerjisi saha kurulumu alanında bölgede uyguladığı bu başarılı projeler ile müşterilerine güven vermekte ve oldukça emin adımlarla büyümesini sürdürmektedir.

Günümüzde kullanılan diğer konvansiyonel yakıtlara göre çok daha zengin ve temiz bir enerji kaynağı olan güneş, dünyamızın artan enerji ihtiyacını karşılayan en saf ve masrafsız enerji kaynağıdır. LBC Solar ailesi olarak bu yolda en büyük motivasyonumuz, Türkiye’nin coğrafi konumundan kaynaklı yüksek güneşlenme süresini ülkemiz açısından, düşük maliyetlerle daha yüksek enerji verimliliği sağlayarak, katma değere çevirmektir.

Description:

Direct bonding to synthetic membrane, PVC, bitumen and metal surfaces
No substructure needed - short installation time - easy handling due to low weight (only 3.3 kg/m2)

Name: OZASAN Gestión Global de Renovables
Description:
En OZASAN Gestión Global de Renovables realizamos proyectos dirigidos al ahorro en la factura energética de nuestros clientes, mediante la implantación de sistemas de energía alternativas como la solar fotovoltaica y los puntos de recarga de coche eléctrico (electrolineras).

Somos especialistas en energía solar fotovoltaica para autoconsumo y contamos con amplia experiencia en construcción, instalación, promoción, explotación y mantenimiento de instalaciones de energías alternativas. Además, nos ocupamos de que los equipos cumplan con las normativas vigentes, proponiendo la alternativa más ventajosa para nuestros clientes.

En OZASAN apoyamos el uso de estas fuentes de energía y colaboramos contigo en la consecución de un objetivo común. Utilizar fuentes de energía limpias, como son las renovables, aplicadas en calefacción o en electricidad consumida aportan un alto ahorro económico en la factura energética.

Trabajamos activamente para construir modelos alternativos de vida, basados en el respeto, y la colaboración para conseguir un desarrollo sostenible que asegure una vida digna para todos.

Name: M SOLAIRE ENERGIE
Description:
Chez M Solaire Énergie, notre mission est de rendre l'énergie solaire accessible à tous, tout en contribuant à la transition énergétique et à la protection de notre environnement. 

Grâce à notre expertise en installation de panneaux solaires mais aussi en climatisation et bornes de recharge électrique à Nice et dans les Alpes-Maritimes, nous aidons nos clients à réduire leurs factures d'électricité et à produire leur propre énergie renouvelable.

 Notre expertise repose sur des solutions certifiées et sur mesure adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client. Que vous soyez un particulier en maison ou une entreprise cherchant à optimiser sa consommation énergétique, nous avons les compétences nécessaires pour vous accompagner tout au long du projet. Nos installations sont conçues pour maximiser l'efficacité énergétique, permettant à nos clients de réduire leur facture d'énergie jusqu'à 85 %.

 4,9/5 sur Google : nous sommes engagés à fournir un service client exceptionnel, de l’étude de vos besoins énergétiques à la proposition personnalisée.

 L'énergie solaire est une source d'énergie propre et renouvelable. En produisant votre propre électricité, vous participez activement à la lutte contre le changement climatique tout en bénéficiant d'économies sur le long terme. Et chaque installation de panneaux solaires, climatisations et bornes est un pas vers un avenir plus durable. Gérez votre propre batterie virtuelle !

Nous sommes plus qu'un simple installateur. Nous sommes votre expert énergies.

A Weedda oferece um serviço completo e personalizado, desde o orçamento, projeto, instalação até o pós-venda, sempre com uma equipe altamente qualificada. Parceira das renomadas marcas BYD e WEG, a Weedda garante o uso das melhores tecnologias do mercado global.

Name: iGreen Energy Power
Description:
Green energy is important for the environment as it replaces the negative effects of fossil fuels with more environmentally-friendly alternatives. Derived from natural resources, green energy is also often renewable and clean, meaning that they emit no or few greenhouse gases and are often readily available.

Even when the full life cycle of a green energy source is taken into consideration, they release far less greenhouse gases than fossil fuels, as well as few or low levels of air pollutants. This is not just good for the planet but is also better for the health of people and animals that have to breathe the air.
Biomass. Wood and wood waste. Municipal solid waste. Landfill gas and biogas. Biofuels.
Hydropower.
Geothermal.
Wind.
Solar.
Clean. Green energy, which includes green electricity, is clean energy. This means it is produced with little-to-no environmental impact and does not dispense greenhouse gases into the air that contribute to global warming, the way fossil fuels do.

Varied.Green energy sources include wind, geo-thermal, hydro, and solar energy. Wind and hydro sources generate energy through the movement of air and water, while geo-thermal and solar sources generate energy through heat. All, however, provide reliable energy and protect the environment.

Renewable. As stated above, green energy sources eliminate the emission of greenhouse gases into the air. These sources are also renewable energy sources - meaning they are not created from finite materials like fossil fuels.

Stable. Green energy's varied forms mean more locations across the planet have the potential to harvest this renewable energy. This means more energy can be collected right here in the United States, making the country less dependent on energy from foreign countries.

Inexpensive. As the demand for green energy continues to grow, the price continues to drop thanks to economics of scale.

Name: 1 Vision Solar
Description:
1 Vision Solar specialises in supplying and installing solar PV panels to create electricity. If you are considering saving or earning money by installing photovoltaic cells on your property, contact us now for clear advice.

We have installed solar PV cells on homes, offices, warehouses, shops, schools and public buildings. Our expertise covers surveying your property, advising on the appropriate layout and fitting of photovoltaic panels, and carrying out the installation. We work with residential developers, private householders, housing associations and commercial property owners and developers, who all see the value of earning from your building roof.

Not only will a solar PV installation reduce your electricity bill and save you money, you will also be doing your bit for the environment. By installing a renewable energy solar power system, you will help reduce greenhouse gas emissions from power plants in the UK.
 
We can also clearly explain to you how electricity generation from your property works, and how you will benefit. We have experience in how the Government's Feed In Tariffs (FIT) work, and circumstances in which you may receive other financial support or subsidies for making installations.
 
Many solar PV installations pay for themselves handsomely, generating very attractive financial returns from the investment made. We will provide you with guidance on the likely energy savings and financial income generated from your new installation - but the actual figures always depend on how much the sun shines!
 
We have built our reputation by focusing on this specialist area, getting to understand the dynamics of the key components of any system - the solar photovoltaic cells and roof attachment systems, the power inverter and smart meters. We are also fully familiar with the Government's Feed In Tariff, which gives homeowners a guaranteed, 25 years, index linked payment for the energy they produce.
 
In a sector where technology is developing fast, we continue to keep abreast of the latest developments and changes in costs, to ensure that every installation we plan is using the most reliable and efficient components possible.
Based in South Wales, 1 Vision Solar works across the UK, and has completed numerous solar PV installations in London and the south east as well as near the company's Welsh base.

1 Vision Solar is based in South Wales and works on sites around the UK. We are an approved installer and work with the most reliable suppliers of solar PV equipment, so you can rely on us.

Name: Christophe Aracil | Installations photovoltaïques 64 & 40
Description:
Vous souhaitez réduire vos dépenses énergétiques ?

Je comprends pourquoi, le coût de l'électricité ne cesse d'augmenter !

Mais, vous êtes certainement effrayés à la vue et l'écoute de toutes ces publicités et annonces alléchantes qui inondent internet et les divers réseaux sociaux ! Cela ne m'étonne pas.

Alors comment faire ?

Je vous propose les services d'une société locale innovante de confiance qui ne fait pas appel à la sous-traitance.

AFA SOLAR

Renseignez vos coordonnées dans la rubrique "Demande de devis" de mon site et je m'engage à vous recontacter dans les plus brefs délais pour convenir d'un rendez-vous sur le lieu de votre projet photovoltaïque.

La revente totale ou partielle de votre production électrique solaire vous rapporte un revenu supplémentaire.

Encore mieux !

Le stockage physique ou virtuel de votre surplus d’électricité produit vous permet de le consommer quand vous en avez besoin (la nuit ou les jours de mauvais temps par exemple).

Ainsi, vous consommez la totalité de votre propre production d'électricité au lieu de l'acheter à votre fournisseur d'énergie !
Vous  tendez vers l'autonomie énergétique !

Je vous propose de partager mon expérience, de vous informer, conseiller et vous guider vers la solution technique qui correspondra exactement à votre besoin.

Alors, n'attendez plus, contactez-moi pour votre future installation au meilleur rapport qualité/prix.

Vous aurez ainsi toutes les cartes en mains pour faire votre choix éclairé en toute sérénité.

Votre contact local AFA Solar.

Name: GreenAkku
Description:
2022 hat GreenAkku über 100.000 Mini-PV-Anlagen ausgeliefert. In den 9 Jahren zuvor waren es rund 220.000 Anlagen, die bei GreenAkku gekauft und von den Kunden installiert wurden. Insgesamt liefern die 320.000 Solaranlagen jedes Jahr mindestens 128 Millionen kWh dezentralen Sonnenstrom, geht man von einem durchschnittlichen Jahresertrag von 400 kWh aus, den bereits ein kleines Balkonkraftwerk im Durchschnitt im Jahr produziert.

Schnell baut GreenAkku sein Angebot aus und wird Europas führender Anbieter für mobile Solaranlagen und Komponenten. Immer mehr Produkte zur nachhaltigen Energiegewinnung und -verarbeitung werden vom Fachhandel und den Endkunden bestellt. Das Unternehmen ist mit der Konzeption und dem Absatz autarker und netzparalleler Energiesysteme zur Eigenstromversorgung befasst: vom Minisolarkraftwerk bis zur Photovoltaik-Großanlage. GreenAkku verkauft nicht nur Produkte, sondern entwickelt neue, nachhaltige mobile und stationäre Energiesysteme. Das Credo von GreenAkku liegt in der Nachhaltigkeit und Umweltverträglichkeit der angebotenen Lösungen. Dazu zählen innovative Solarmodule inklusive unterschiedlicher Montage-Produkte, Wechselrichter, Batterien und Ladegeräte. GreenAkku gehört zur Unternehmensgruppe Bosswerk, zu der auch der nachhaltige Batterie-Hersteller LIONTRON und die für steckerfertige Balkon-Solaranlagen stehende Marke selfPV zählen. LIONTRON, selfPV und GreenAkku sind Marktführer in ihren jeweiligen Segmenten. Bosswerk sitzt im niederrheinischen Kaldenkirchen und beschäftigt 180 Mitarbeiter*innen. Der Unternehmensverbund hat europaweit über 1.000 Vertriebspartner.

Name: Energiehof AG
Description:
Auch ohne Dach: Nun können alle von der Solarenergie profitieren.

Pachten Sie jetzt ein Solarpanel auf bisher brachliegenden Dachflächen
Ernten Sie solare Erträgnisse und ermöglichen Sie dadurch mehr nachhaltigen und einheimischen Solarstrom. 

Mit Dach: Bauen Sie eine Solaranlage nach dem Prinzip «Energiehof».

Kostenlose Solaranlage:  Sie erhalten von der Energiehof AG als Generalunternehmerin eine Solaranlage auf Ihrem Dach ohne dass für Sie Kosten entstehen.

Wertvolle Leistungen: Sie erhalten kostenlosen oder kostengünstigen Solarstrom, eine fixe Vergütung oder einen Anteil des Solarertrags – was Ihnen am meisten dient. Dafür stellen Sie Ihr Dach  für die Solaranlage zur Verfügung.

Solaranlage übernehmen: Sie vermieten Ihr Dach so lange wie Sie möchten – bereits nach wenigen Jahren können Sie die Solaranlage zum Vorzugspreis übernehmen und bis zu 40 weitere Jahre weiter betreiben.

Name: DT Energi
Description:
DT energi
Vi jobbar för att bidra till utveckling av miljövänliga energikällor genom att leverera nyckelfärdiga solcellsanläggningar, batterier och laddboxar till privatpersoner och företag. partner till checkwatt.

Dotterbolag till Dalaträhus AB
DT Energi (DalaTrähus Energi) är ett dotterbolag till DalaTrähus AB, som säljer och bygger prefabricerade hus på västkusten med omnejd. Företaget grundades redan 1967 och omfattar nu ett femtontal säljare, konstruktörer och administratörer. När DalaTrähus bygger styckehus, lägenhets- eller husområden kan solceller installeras från start genom DT Energi, vilket gör processen både enklare och tryggare.

Expertkunskap
Tillsammans med våra leverantörer har vi expertkunskap gällande vilka solceller som passar bäst för just ditt tak, vilken växelriktare som ger mest effekt och hur solpanelerna hålls effektiva. Eftersom vi skräddarsyr din anläggning blir effekten större än om du köper ett färdigt solcellspaket från någon av våra konkurrenter.

Paneloptimering
Vi använder oss av en optimerare kopplad till varje solcellspanel, vilket är den senaste och mest avancerade tekniken inom solceller. Detta ger både högre effekt på solcellerna och säkrare tak. Läs mer om detta här.

Generösa garantier
Vi arbetar tillsammans med några av de ledande tillverkarna i världen av solceller, monteringssystem och växelriktare. Tack vare generösa garantier som sträcker sig ända tillbaka till tillverkaren får du ett långsiktigt och bekymmersfritt ägande.

Trygghet och trovärdighet
Vi använder vi samma slags solceller på våra egna tak som vi erbjuder dig som kund. För oss handlar det om trygghet och att vi tror på det vi gör. Kom gärna och titta!

Name: DİNÇER ENERJİ ELEKTRİK
Description:
Dinçer Enerji Elektrik fabrika, villa, konut, alışveriş merkezi, hastane, otel, mağaza ve benzeri yapılardaki tüm elektrik ve zayıf akım sistemleri ihtiyaçlarınıza yeni nesil çözümler sunarak ve sunduğu çözümlerde sürekli en son teknolojileri uygulayarak, sistem projeleri çizimi ve sahada uygulamasını gerçekleştiren bir firmadır.

    Sektördeki deneyimi, müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışı ve tecrübeli kadrosu ile Güneş enerjisinden elektrik üretimi (fotovoltaik enerji) sektörünün öncü ve en güçlü kuruluşlarındandır.

    Ürün ve hizmetlerinin uluslararası yetkinlik, kalite ve standartta karşılayacak düzeyde olmasına önem veren Dinçer Enerji, üstün nitelikli insan kaynağı, teknolojiyi çok yakından takip etme ve uygulama becerileri ile seçkinleşmektedir.

    Projelendirmeden, TEDAŞ kabul hizmetlerine, altyapı inşaat ve montajından, elektrikasyona kadar tüm anahtar teslim santral kurulum işlemlerini yetkin teknik ekipleriyle kendi bünyesinde gerçekleştirmektedir. Özel ihtiyaç ve uygulamalara yönelik profesyonel Proje Geliştirme, Sistem-Tasarım, Uygulama, Eğitim-Bilgilendirme, Ar-Ge desteği de sağlanmaktadır.
   
    Dinçer Enerji Güneş Enerjisi ile ilgili bütün projelerinizde (şebeke destekli sistemler, şebekeden bağımsız sistemler ve solar sulama sistemleri) sizlere her türlü ürün desteğinide sağlamaktadır.

    Dinçer, Enerji söktöründe 15 yılı aşkın tecrübeye sahip ekibi güneş enerji santrallerinin en yüksek kalitede kurulum ve danışmanlığını sağlamaktadır. Yenilenebilir Enerji Teknolojilerini yaygınlaştırmayı amaçlayan doğa dostu bir markadır.

    Yaşam döngüsünün tamamı boyunca evler, binalar, veri merkezleri, altyapılar ve sektörler için dünyanın önde gelen işlem ve enerji teknolojileri entegrasyonları, ürünleri uç noktadan buluta bağlama, denetleme, yazılımlar ve hizmetler aracılığıyla entegre şirket yönetimi sağlayarak dijital dönüşümü destekliyoruz.

Name: Suichoku Solar Co. Ltd.
Description:
Suichoku Solar, a member of the Next2Sun group, a pioneer in vertical photovoltaics in Germany, is exploring new possibilities. The essence of Next2Sun's technology lies in the concept of vertical installation of special solar modules that utilize the sun's rays on both sides.

These modules are called "double-sided" modules and are ideally installed facing east-west. As a result, electricity generation takes place primarily in the early morning, afternoon, and early evening.

Vertically mounted double-sided photovoltaic systems can generate more valuable power than conventional south-facing photovoltaic systems while minimizing the impact on agricultural land, parking lots, and other land already in use.

Suichoku Solar（スイチョク・ソーラー）は、ドイの垂直設置型太陽光発電の先駆けであるNext2Sunのグループ企業として、新たな可能性を追求しています。Next2Sunの技術の真骨頂は、太陽の光を前後両面で活用する特別なソーラーモジュールを垂直に設置するという考え方にあります。

これらのモジュールは「両面発電」モジュールと呼ばれ、理想的には東西に向けて設置します。その結果、電力生成は主に早朝と午後、初夕に行われます。

垂直設置型の両面発電太陽光発電システムは、農地、駐車場等のすでに利用されている土地への影響を最小限に抑えつつ、従来の南向きの太陽光発電システムに比べて価値の高い電力を発電することが可能です。

In order for it to be a stand-alone system, we would have to have a battery, which makes the whole system more expensive. We currently have this system as patent pending that we call “Gismo Power”, an acronym for “Garage/Interior Storable Modular Photovoltaic On Wheels w/ Ev-charger Rack”. Since one full system has been completed, our goal for the project is to create a more powerful version of the Gismo Power system for New College of Florida. Name: EVERPV

EVERPV is a three-year Horizon Europe funded project, which will develop sustainable solutions for handling end-of-life solar panels in the EU. The project aims to optimise delamination processes for solar panel recycling; separate and recover high-purity silver, polymers and glass; demonstrate the reusability of the recovered materials in the solar value chain; and reduce the solar industry's environmental impact.
 
EVERPV has gathered a consortium of 16 partners from across the entire solar industry value chain.
 
This project has received funding from the European Union's Horizon Europe research and innovation programme under Grant Agreement No 101122208.

2| Developing urban, infill community solar projects located in lower-wealth communities in Baltimore, and

3| Advocating for clean energy policies that benefit lower-income and disadvantaged communities.

We believe that all households should have access to the benefits of solar power.  Our vision is that all Marylanders, regardless of level of wealth or income, will have equitable access to the social, economic, and environmental benefits of clean energy through discounted solar electricity, shared ownership of solar projects, and job participation.

- Zonnepanelen

Verduurzamen is goed voor ons en onze wereld. Alleen, hoe ga je hier praktisch mee om? Misschien wil je zelf duurzame energie opwekken, energie opslaan of gewoon slimmer omgaan met je energiegebruik. Wat je pad ook is, stappen zetten in duurzaamheid begint hier.
Samen maken we duurzaamheid de norm. Jij bepaalt de vorm!

Wil je weten wat je zelf het beste kunt doen? We helpen je graag!

Name: RESOLAR PV Recycling
Description:
RESOLAR, the largest PV recycling enterprise in China, is the world’s first enterprise capable of recovering 6N (99.9999%）silicon materials from end-of-life PV modules and regenerating 6N silicon materials into new solar cells. RESOLAR  has been featured as case in the IEA Photovoltaic Power Systems Programme (PVPS).

 RESOLAR has 15 years of experience in photovoltaic recycling and has developed the innovative GST green separation technology, which can convert end-of-life PV modules into recycled glass, recycled metal, and regenerated 6N (99.9999%) silicon materials with the world-leading 99.9% separation rate of the glass and solar cells and recovery rate of 99% for high value components.  

As the first photovoltaic recycling company in China to receive venture capital,RESOLAR has advanced technology and rich industry experience. RESOLAR has built the first 10,000-ton photovoltaic recycling production line in China in Fengyang, Anhui, with the capacity to process 900 tons of decommissioned PV modules per month, producing recycled glass, aluminum, 6N-grade silicon materials and silver, and has achieved significant economic benefits. In addition, RESOLAR cooperated with Trina Solar and Flat Group to successfully manufacture the world's first fully recycled photovoltaic module, demonstrating the commercial prospects of fully recycled modules.
RESOLAR was recognized as one of the top ten brands in China's photovoltaic module recycling industry by "China PV Module Recycling Industry Development Depth Analysis and Investment Prospect Research Report (2024-2031)".
RESOLAR was awarded the "2024 Innovative Enterprises in Renewable Energy Award" together with GCL and JA Solar.

The UK directors all work pro bono with our team in Kenya managing the day to day solar light programme.   Students with our lights can study past the hours of daylight, into the night, to help them achieve their academic potential.  Their families are also able to take advantage of the light to cook.  Having access to a Mwezi light saves money and improves health as families don't have to pay for, and use, kerosene lights, on the nights their children have borrowed a light.

AAU ENERJİ  ŞİRKETİ kimdir?

AAU ENERJİ şirketi 2019 yılında ALPEREN UÇAR tarafından kurulmuş olan SOLUTIONENGINEER firmasının bir markasıdır. SOLUTIONENGINEER firması İnşaat, Elektrik,Enerji, Makine, İmalat, Sanayi ve Ticaret alanında hizmet veren bir grup şirket üst kuruluşudur.


     Neden AAU ENERJİ ŞİRKETİ?

AAU ENERJİ Güneş Enerjisi Santrali ( küçük ve büyük olmak üzere şebekeye entegre veya şebekeden bağımsız güneş enerjisi santrali tesisleri ) kurulumu alanında uzmanlaşmış, iş ortaklığı yaptığı tüzel kişi ve şahısların güvenini ve memnuniyetini kazanmış bir firma olarak tüm Türkiye ve Tüm Dünya’ya hizmet veren bir kuruluştur. 


     AAU ENERJİ hangi faaliyet alanlarında çalışmalarını sürdürmektedir?

AAU ENERJİ Güneş Paneli, Inverter, Konstrüksiyon, kablo, kablo kanalı, sürücü, pompa ve güneş enerjisi santrali kurulumuna gerek olan tüm malzemeleri uygun fiyata sizlere tedarik eder. Mikro ve makro ölçekte şebekeye entegre yada şebekeden bağımsız olmak üzere Güneş Enerjisi santrallerinin anahtar teslim işçilik hizmetini sizlere sunar. Güneş enerjisi santrallerinin projelendirilmesi, idari süreç yönetimi konusunda sizlere danışmanlık hizmeti verir. Güneş enerjisi santralleri anahtar teslim kurulum hizmeti verir. Güneş enerjisi santrallerinin işletme bakım onarım faaliyetlerini yürütür.  İlaveten, Enerjiyi verimli kullanmak amacıyla tüm enerji verimliliği uygulamalarına ilişkin hizmetler sunar. AAU ENERJİ sizlerin çözüm ortağıdır.

У міру прискорення темпів глобального енергетичного переходу Dyness прагне сприяти сталому розвитку в глобальному масштабі через комерційне поглиблення. Name: SwissWatt One AG
Description:
Bedingt durch die geographische Lage der Schweiz und die hohen Qualitätsansprüche der Schweizer an sich, war es nur eine Frage der Zeit bis irgendwann ein hochalpines Schweizer Modul auf den Markt gebracht werden musste.

Die Nachfrage nach einem leistungsstarken und robusten Modul in der Schweiz stieg in den Jahren 2016 / 2017 immer weiter an und entwickelte sich somit die Idee für ein eigenes Modul - von der Schweiz für die Schweiz.

Basierend auf der damals noch jungen, aber vielversprechenden TopCon Technologie gepaart mit einem speziellen Rahmen war die Ausgangslage für das DAVOS Modul geboren.

Die Produktion dieses Moduls war ausschließlich einem kleinen Kreis an Installateuren vorbehalten, welche dieses Modul unter eigenem Namen vermarktet und verbaut haben.

Als das Interesse an diesen Schweizer Solarpanelen auch außerhalb der Schweiz zunahm, wurden die Weichen für eine großflächige Vermarktung gestellt. Das war die Geburtsstunde der SwissWatt One AG im Jahr 2022.

Die steigende Nachfrage verlangt dann eine Verlagerung der Produktion nach China unter Einhaltung der Schweizer Produkt- und Qualitätsansprüche.

Somit erreicht die SWO zwei Dinge:

Eine günstige Produktion mit fairen Preisen

Eine Sicherstellung der Schweizer Qualitätsansprüche durch Einbeziehung der renommiertesten Schweizer Testzentren: SUPSI und OST.

Name: RES FruitDelta Rivierenland
Description:

dynamiek, het dijkenlandschap beschermt ons, de vruchtbare grond voedt ons. Al het goede van ons
gebied willen we ook doorgeven aan onze kinderen. Door de veranderingen in ons klimaat is dat niet
vanzelfsprekend. In Rivierenland buigen we deze uitdaging stap voor stap om naar kansen. Werken
met wind, water, zon en aarde zit in ons DNA. Net als aanpakken. We doen veel zelf, we doen veel
samen. 
Met de inventieve spirit van bedrijven en inwoners van Rivierenland maken we de energietransitie hier tot een succes! Het is al begonnen. De eerste stappen zijn gezet. De regionale ambitie is vastgelegd in de RES 1.0, er verschijnen steeds meer zonnepanelen en er draaien al volop windmolens. Ook blijven we leren en experimenteren. Over warmte winning uit zon en water. Over opslag van energie en (financiële) participatie. We blijven inventief en werken samen. Zo realiseren we een mooie en duurzame toekomst voor ons allemaal. Een energiek Rivierenland, vroeger, nu en in de toekomst!

Name: Aztec Renewable Energy, Inc.
Description:

Aztec Renewable Energy, Inc. Discovered Home Wind Turbines through the U.S. Department of Energy in 1999.

In 2006 Aztec pioneered the Texas and Oklahoma Renewable Energy market for Solar Photovoltaic(PV) Systems and Small Wind Turbines. In 2012 Aztec was transformed into the largest solar power company with free design, engineering,  installations and provides the best site performance available in Texas. Aztec Renewable Energy created the Texas and Oklahoma renewable energy market by purchasing in volume, passing the savings on to the consumer. We have transformed every power company and work every day with cities to create ordinances that allow Renewable Energy Installations.

By speaking to thousands of interested prospects we have installed hundreds of renewable energy projects. Aztec Renewable Energy, Inc. is a licensed electrical contractor as required by the state of Texas for advertising, contracting, installing solar panels or solar Photovoltiac(PV) systems, installing wind turbines and electrical equipment. All work is performed by certified, licensed professionals,  with years of expert experience for high quality and high energy output performance.

After our market launch, we have found start-up companies confusing buyers with phony web page templates, claiming experience with claims of projects done other bigger companies installation photos.  They provide an incomplete picture of actual energy production, peak Kilowatt usage and Cost Per Peak Kilowatt usage. If you are investigating renewable energy, talk to the experts with REAL experience. We offer the best price, performance and warranty in the market.

Name: Adame Enerji
Description:
Uzun yıllar elektrik ve enerjinin farklı alanlarında kazandığı tecrübeyle, yeniliğin hep bir adım önünde giderek sadece Türkiye’nin değil Asya ve Avrupa’nın da en büyük elektrik taahhüt ve güneş enerjisi firmalarından biri haline gelmek için emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir.

Tüm faaliyetlerinde uluslararası standartlara uyum, uzman kadro ve satış sonrası servis ile kurumsal yönetim amacını gözeten “ADAME’’ ülkesinde yakaladığı başarıyı yurtdışında da yakalama hedefine adım adım ilerleyen bir dünya oyuncusudur.

ADAME olarak temel hedefimiz, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını ve beklentilerini karşılayacak üstün kalitede GES projeleri üretmek, bu doğrultuda ürün tedariki, projelendirme, mühendislik ve anahtar teslim taahhüt hizmetleri sunarak sürekliliği sağlamaktır.

Şirket yönetimi ve çalışanları olarak; tüm kararlarımız ve faaliyetlerimizde öğrenmeyi ve sürekli gelişimi, takım çalışmasını, bireysel ve kurumsal büyümeyi, müşterilerimiz ve tedarikçilerimiz ile iş birliği ruhunu geliştirmeyi, sürdürülebilir refah ve yaşam kalitesi için doğal çevreyi korumayı ve zenginleştirmeyi temel değerlerimiz ve kurumsal ilkelerimiz olarak benimsemekteyiz.

Tüm çalışanlarımız, müşteri odaklı kalite anlayışı ve “yaptığımız her işte mükemmel olma” tutkusu ve heyecanı ile bu politikanın sürekli uygulayıcısı ve savunucusuyuz.

Ürün kalitesi ve dayanıklılığı, teknolojisi, fiyatı, satış sonrası hizmetleri ile müşteri memnuniyetini sağlayarak Türkiye ve dünya pazarında tercih edilen marka olmaktır.

Name: Energía Solar Helius
Description:

En Helius, entendemos que cada cliente tiene necesidades únicas, por lo que ofrecemos servicios personalizados que van desde la evaluación inicial y el diseño del sistema hasta la instalación y el mantenimiento posventa. Nos distinguimos en el mercado por nuestro compromiso con la excelencia y la innovación. Cada proyecto es un paso hacia la reducción de la huella de carbono, la reducción de costos, o incluso, el aumento de la independencia energética para nuestros clientes. 
Al elegir Helius, nuestros clientes invierten en su futuro mientras contribuyen activamente a la preservación del medio ambiente.

Conçues et construites sur-mesure, les centrales électriques en autoconsommation ou en injection sur le réseau s’appuient sur une expérience significative, des méthodes de travail éprouvées et des outils numériques pointus et collaboratifs pour une adaptation optimale aux spécificités du contexte local. 

Afin de se prémunir de toute nouvelle artificialisation, nous intervenons principalement sur les toitures (neuves et en rénovation) et sur les ombrières (parking et stockage) à partir de 600 m² pour des centrales d'une puissance de 100 kWc à 1 MWc. Le schéma de valorisation de l’électricité le plus pertinent est privilégié, soutenu par un suivi des performances durant l'exploitation.

L'expertise apportée couvrant tous les aspects technique, économique et administratif d'une centrale solaire, Eliosfair propose des solutions adaptées à tous les besoins des consommateurs d'électricité soucieux de maîtriser leurs charges et d'apporter une contribution à l’essor des énergies renouvelables dans les territoires.

Name: Clean Plus Care
Description:
Clean Plus Care is a cutting-edge solar panel cleaning service dedicated to maximizing the efficiency and longevity of your solar energy investment. Founded in August 2025, we understand the critical role that clean panels play in a thriving solar system. Our mission is to provide meticulous, safe, and environmentally friendly cleaning solutions that ensure your panels perform at their peak, helping you save money and contribute to a cleaner planet.

Our Services
We specialize in a comprehensive range of services for both residential and commercial clients, including:
 * Professional Solar Panel Cleaning: Using industry-approved techniques and eco-friendly products, we remove dirt, dust, pollen, and other debris that can significantly reduce solar panel output.
 * System Inspection and Maintenance: Our services go beyond cleaning. We conduct thorough inspections to identify potential issues with your wiring, mounts, and overall system health, providing preventative maintenance recommendations to avoid costly repairs.
 * Customized Cleaning Plans: We offer flexible and affordable service packages tailored to your specific needs and the unique environmental conditions of your location.
Why Choose Clean Plus Care?
 * Expertise: Our team consists of highly trained and experienced technicians who are passionate about solar energy and committed to delivering exceptional results.
 * Efficiency: We help you unlock the full potential of your solar panels, boosting energy production and ensuring a faster return on your investment.
 * Eco-Friendly: We use green cleaning technology and methods that are safe for your panels, your property, and the environment.
 * Customer-Focused: Your satisfaction is our top priority.

Name: Skapa Energi Nordic AB
Description:
Dom allra flesta tar det för givet och det är inte så konstigt, den dyker upp varje morgon, precis i rätt tid och har gjort det i snart fem miljarder år. På en timma producerar den tillräckligt mycket energi för att tillgodose behovet för alla människor på hela vår planet under ett helt år. Den ger oss inte bara precis det vi behöver utan mycket mer än vårt behov och det vi får är ren förnybar energi, som aldrig tar slut.  Solens energi är idag lättare än någonsin att ta vara på och den är dessutom tillförlitligt och hållbar. 

Fler tar idag vara på denna energi och tekniken har snabbt gått framåt vilket gjort den mer tillgänglig än någonsin, men det finns fortfarande mycket energi kvar att ta vara på, varje dag.  Under den tid det tog dig att läsa denna text har solen producerat tillräckligt med energi för att tillgodose hela Hallands elenergiförbrukning under många år framöver.

Vi kan leva med det.

Name: Maysun Solar Deutschland
Description:
Gegründet im Jahr 2008, spezialisiert sich Maysun Solar auf die Herstellung hochwertiger Photovoltaikmodule, die sich durch ihre herausragende Leistung und ihr modernes Design auszeichnen und nahtlos in verschiedene architektonische Stile integrieren lassen. Wir entwickeln maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, die auf die einzigartigen geografischen und klimatischen Bedingungen Europas zugeschnitten sind. Unsere hochtemperaturbeständigen IBC-, HJT- und TOPCon-Solarmodule sowie innovative Balkon-Kraftwerke für kleine Haushalte werden von unseren Kunden sehr geschätzt.

Mit über 16 Jahren Branchenerfahrung und zahlreichen autoritativen Zertifizierungen wie TUV und CE liefert Maysun Solar erstklassige Photovoltaikprodukte mit einer jährlichen Produktionskapazität von 2 GW und garantiert somit eine stabile Versorgung. Wir verfügen über 7 Tochtergesellschaften und 21 lokale Lager in 7 Ländern, darunter Deutschland, Frankreich und Italien, sowie über ein Vertriebsnetz, das mehr als 60 Länder abdeckt. Dies ermöglicht uns, effiziente, lokalisierte Dienstleistungen und umfassende technische Unterstützung zu bieten.

Maysun Solar ist bestrebt, den Nutzen für unsere Kunden zu maximieren, indem wir umfassende Unterstützung vor und nach dem Verkauf anbieten, die auf Ihre individuellen Bedürfnisse abgestimmt ist. Wir treiben die Innovation in der Photovoltaik-Technologie voran und unterstützen aktiv die nachhaltige Entwicklung der globalen sauberen Energie. Wir sind davon überzeugt, dass nachhaltige Strategien der Schlüssel zu einer helleren Zukunft für den Planeten und alle Beteiligten sind.

Für aktuelle Modulangebote oder bei Fragen rund um Photovoltaik können Sie uns gerne kontaktieren. Wir freuen uns darauf, Ihnen weiterzuhelfen. Erfahren Sie mehr unter https://www.maysunsolar.de/.

Name: COPPEN GmbH
Description:
Coppen ist ein Unternehmen, das sich auf die Planung, Montage und den Kundenservice von Photovoltaikanlagen spezialisiert hat. Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2023 (Ausgründung aus bestehenden Unternehmen Manz Sonnenschutz GmbH) geben wir täglich alles um unseren Kunden die bestmöglichste Beratung zu liefern. 

Einer unserer Schlüsselfaktoren, der uns von anderen Anbietern unterscheidet, ist die Tatsache, dass wir alle Aspekte der Anlageninstallation aus einer Hand anbieten. Dies bedeutet, dass wir für die Planung, Montage und den Kundenservice verantwortlich sind und somit eine glattere und reibungslosere Erfahrung für unsere Kunden gewährleisten können.

Ein weiterer Faktor, der uns auszeichnet, ist die Tatsache, dass wir hochmoderne Photovoltaikmodule verwenden, die eine Leistung von 415 Watt und eine beeindruckende Effizienz von 21,3% bieten. Diese Module werden aus hochwertigen Materialien hergestellt und gewährleisten somit eine lange Lebensdauer und zuverlässige Stromerzeugung.

Unser Wechselrichter ist ebenfalls ein wichtiger Bestandteil jeder Photovoltaik-Anlage und ermöglicht die Umwandlung des erzeugten Gleichstroms in Wechselstrom. Besonders hervorzuheben ist, dass unser Wechselrichter die Ersatzstromfähigkeit auf 3 Phasen beherrscht, was eine hohe Flexibilität und Effizienz gewährleistet.

Unsere hochmodernen LiFePo4 Batterien ermöglichen es unseren Kunden, den tagsüber erzeugten Strom auch nachts zu verbrauchen. Mit einer Nennspannung von 48V und einer hohen Leistungsfähigkeit sind sie die perfekte Ergänzung für jede Photovoltaik-Anlage. Durch die Verwendung von Lithium-Eisen-Phosphat-Technologie sind sie besonders langlebig und sicher im Betrieb.

Name: NRG ISLAND
Description:
Innovation, Efficiency, and Sustainability on Water.

For over 15 years, we have been designing and building floating photovoltaic systems to maximize solar energy production without land consumption. Our NRG ISLAND system is the result of years of research and development: a robust and durable solution with maximum stability, designed to withstand the most extreme environmental conditions.

 Higher Efficiency: Natural water cooling enhances the efficiency of photovoltaic panels, increasing energy production.
 Reduced Evaporation: By covering water surfaces, our systems help reduce evaporation, contributing to the conservation of this valuable resource.
 Zero Land Consumption: Floating photovoltaics are the ideal solution for those seeking renewable energy without occupying agricultural or buildable land.

Thanks to advanced engineering, NRG ISLAND is designed to withstand:
 Strong winds and heavy loads
 Severe impacts and accidental collisions
 Corrosion and UV degradation

Our technology is flexible, scalable, and adaptable to various water surfaces, from industrial reservoirs to artificial lakes. We collaborate with public and private entities to develop tailor-made solutions, ensuring maximum efficiency and sustainability.

 Clean energy, wherever there is water. Contact us to discover how floating photovoltaics can revolutionize your energy strategy.

Name: Inty Power
Description:
At Inty Power, we’re not just installing solar panels—we’re rewiring Arizona’s future.

Arizona is blessed with abundant sunshine, yet many families feel trapped in an energy crisis of rising costs and unreliable grids. That’s the problem we solve: turning sunlight into savings, resilience, and freedom.

With a 4.91 BBB rating backed by more than 330 reviews, our reputation is built on more than promises—it’s built on proof. Customers trust us because we deliver more than kilowatts; we deliver confidence.

From rooftop solar to Tesla Powerwall integration, we create energy solutions that outshine short-term fixes.
Whether it’s a first-time homeowner or a growing business, we design systems that turn high bills into long-term value.
We believe power shouldn’t come with a price tag of stress—and we’re here to change that.

Our wordplay is simple:
We don’t just sell power—we empower.
We don’t just harness the sun—we give you back your days.
We don’t just fight the energy crisis—we make energy make sense.

At the end of the day, Inty Power is about integrity in every watt. We’re proud to be Arizona’s trusted partner in turning a problem into possibility.

Daarom gaan wij verder dan het leveren van standaardoplossingen. Wij luisteren naar uw wensen en behoeften, en ontwerpen vervolgens een oplossing op maat die perfect aansluit bij uw unieke situatie.

Miroslav Mikeš se od stejného roku věnuje oblasti dotací a úspor energií za společnost Zaveza consulting s.r.o.

Postupem času se oba jednatelé začali realizovat v oblasti obnovitelných zdrojů energie. Josef Zíka v rámci projekční a revizní činnosti pro FVE a Miroslav Mikeš v rámci dotací pro firemní a státní sektor, tak i pro rodinné domy zejména v programu Nová Zelená Úsporám (NZÚ).

Name: Smartline PV
Description:
Smartline PV is at the forefront of advancing thin film photovoltaics by improving the efficiency and stability of tin halide perovskite solar cells, a promising alternative to toxic lead-based systems. Our project focuses on overcoming key challenges with a fast, robust, and scalable plasma-assisted crystallization technology, which ensures high-quality tin perovskite films through precise control of nucleation and growth. This innovative process benefits from high speed, low temperatures, and tailored precursor chemistry.

Additionally, Smartline PV will implement tailored interlayers to further enhance solar cell efficiency and stability, along with novel device concepts for flexible, color-selectable tin perovskite solar cell modules. Our lead-free technology aims to achieve efficiencies of 22%, significantly reducing energy consumption and manufacturing costs compared to traditional high-temperature thin film processes.

For the Smartline PV consortium, these advancements will open new opportunities to strengthen the European photovoltaics industry, particularly in the building-integrated PV market. We are committed to incorporating ecodesign, circularity, and social acceptance throughout the development process, progressing tin perovskite solar cells to TRL 5, validated through the fabrication and real-life operation of BIPV demonstrators.

Name: Thinksolar
Description:
We are a Solar PV Panel Installer with experience Team Of Engineers And Technicians. 
We started our journey of entrepreneurship in 2013. Ours is a story of 'Khojis'. Searching for a career path in life, we traveled for around 10,000 km in India. During our journey, we visited and saw some of the best models in India in various fields including Education, Health, Energy, IT, Art, Sanitation, Social Services. We also met and interacted with great role models in these fields. It was during this journey that we identified one of the main problems that our country faces - the unavailability of power in rural India. We wanted to solve this problem as engineers. We selected the city of Nagpur as our working location since it is located in Central India. We chose to work on solar energy, which is the most efficient and cost-effective way of generating power. We started our journey in solar by designing and manufacturing solar lamps at an affordable cost.
We partnered with various NGOs of India to distribute Solar lamps in remote areas. We successfully distributed 4000 Solar lamps. Simultaneously we started working on products like solar operated home lighting systems and solar-powered streetlights. In 2015, we registered our company name as Thinksolar. During the same period, the Net Metering policy was introduced in Maharashtra. It was a really good and innovative model for urban areas. This policy is a boon for everyone from small scale to large scale to install their own solar panels on their rooftops or barren land and produce their own electricity. This was a cost-effective model for high electricity consumers, that is, for residential, commercial and industrial purposes. We studied this model and created awareness about it in urban areas. We started consultation, design, supply, and installation of Grid-Tie Solar PV power plants, solar Pumps, Solar Lighting Products, Solar Trainings and workshops with an experienced team of engineers and technicians.

En Volta, democratizamos el acceso a energías renovables para las PYMES, ofreciendo soluciones financieras y tecnológicas avanzadas, accesibles y a medida. 
Elegir Volta significa optar por un aliado que entiende tus necesidades y se compromete a maximizar tu inversión energética, minimizar tu huella de carbono y potenciar tu independencia energética.

Con nosotros, obtienes más que energía renovable: adquieres un compañero dedicado a facilitar tu transición hacia un futuro energético sostenible y eficiente. 
Nos esforzamos por ser los pioneros en llevar a las empresas hacia un futuro lleno de posibilidades, asegurando que el camino hacia la energía solar sea positivo y enriquecedor.

Name: Rānui Generation
Description:
RānuiGen was established to develop, build and operate a portfolio of mid-size solar projects in New Zealand. The country urgently needs new generating capacity to meet growing electricity demand; it has a good solar resource but solar supplies just 1% of grid power.  We believe solar is the best way to decarbonise the New Zealand energy system quickly.  

Working closely with our shareholder, we aim to fast-track the construction of four solar projects with total capacity 162 MWp. Our first 31 MWp project, on a 100 year leasehold site in Kaitaia in the Far North, began initial operation in Q4 2025. The next two projects, both on freehold sites in Taranaki, are scheduled to commence construction in 2026.  Consent was granted by the Overseas Investment Office for all of these land interests in 2023.  

RānuiGen is proud to be the manager of the AIP-approved Rānui Sunshine Fund, a New Zealand managed investment fund that will offer investors the opportunity to invest directly in the Rānui portfolio.   

As a solar project developer, RānuiGen is committed to early and continuous engagement with local communities and respecting the relationship and ancestral connection tangata whenua (people of the land) have with the whenua (land).

Name: HARSOL
Description:
HARS☉L: Innovative Protective Coating for Photovoltaic Panels .

HARS☉L is an advanced protective coating developed specifically for photovoltaic panels. It helps protect the installation from dirt while improving the performance and durability of the modules. Here's why you should learn more about this innovative technology:

Dirt Protection: The HARS☉L coating prevents contaminants such as smog, dust and bird droppings from sticking. It's key to maintaining maximum panel performance. 

Self-Cleaning Properties: Thanks to a super hydrophobic layer, the coating facilitates water runoff and dirt removal. The panels stay clean and ready for efficient solar energy conversion. 

Economy: the use of HARS☉L reduces the maintenance and upkeep costs of the installation. Removing dirt can generate additional costs, and the coating minimizes the need for frequent cleaning. 

#photovoltaics #renewableenergy #HARSOL #innovations .
_____________________________________________________________________________

HARS☉L: Innowacyjna Powłoka Ochronna dla Paneli Fotowoltaicznych 

HARS☉L to zaawansowana powłoka ochronna, stworzona specjalnie dla paneli fotowoltaicznych. Pozwala na zabezpieczenie instalacji przed zabrudzeniami, a jednocześnie poprawia wydajność i trwałość modułów. Oto, dlaczego warto poznać tę innowacyjną technologię:

Ochrona przed Zabrudzeniami: Powłoka HARS☉L zapobiega przywieraniu zanieczyszczeń, takich jak smog, kurz czy ptasie odchody. To kluczowe, aby zachować maksymalną wydajność paneli. 

Właściwości Samoczyszczące: Dzięki warstwie super hydrofobowej, powłoka ułatwia odpływ wody i usuwanie zabrudzeń. Panele pozostają czyste i gotowe do efektywnej konwersji energii słonecznej. 

Ekonomia: Zastosowanie HARS☉L obniża koszty konserwacji i utrzymania instalacji. Usunięcie zabrudzeń może generować dodatkowe koszty, a powłoka minimalizuje potrzebę częstego czyszczenia. 

#fotowoltaika #energiaodnawialna #HARSOL #innowacje

Name: Know Solar
Description: Solar power is simply usable energy generated from the sun in the form of electric or thermal energy. We offer residents of Arizona, California, Florida, New Mexico, Nevada, Texas, and Utah the access to solar energy and implementing it within their home or business.

There’s never been a better time to go solar. With energy costs on the rise, going solar now allows you to lock in a fixed, predictable electricity rate and protect your family's budget against future rate hikes. Name: Hod Energy
Description:
חוד אנרגיה היא חברה המתמחה בפרויקטים בתחום האנרגיה שחרטה על דגלה עמידה בכל אתגר.

לחברה ניסיון של 15 שנים בעולם האנרגיה, עם שימת דגש על יעוץ, תכנון, ניהול ואף ביצוע של מאות פרויקטים נבחרים ומוצלחים ברחבי הארץ.

החברה נוסדה על ידי מני קריכלי, מהנדס חשמל בעל ניסיון של 15 שנים בתחומי ניהול פרויקטים, פיתוח הנדסי ועסקי, שיווק, ניהול מוצר, מכירות וכן יזמות ואסטרטגיה עסקית.

החברה מעניקה שירותי יעוץ, הנדסה וניהול פרויקטים בתחום החשמל ומתקני יצור אנרגיה לרבות מערכות סולאריות, מערכות גנרציה/קו-גנרציה, מתקני אגירה ומערכות עצמאיות (Off Grid) ובכך מחזיקה ביכולת לתת מענה לכל משימה בתחומה. לחברה מגוון לקוחות גדול החל מיזמים, אנשי מקצוע, קבלנים וכן מחלקה יעודית ומותאמת המעניקה פתרונות ללקוחות המגזר הפרטי.

מעבר להיותה חברת הנדסה המספקת את השירותים ההיקפיים לפרויקט כגון אפיון, רכש, תיאום וניהול גורמי ההנדסה, לוגיסטיקה, בחירת קבלני הביצוע, ספקי הציוד ונותני השירותים השונים, חברת חוד אנרגיה מבינה היטב את הצרכים בשטח ושואפת לירידה לפרטים הקטנים על מנת לייצר סטנדרט ביצוע חדשני וכל זאת מתוך ניסיונה של החברה בביצוע פרויקטים מתוחכמים ומאתגרים במיוחד.

החברה ביססה יכולות שליטה רחבות הכוללות ניהול פרויקטים מבוזרים, ופועלת ללא מיקור חוץ בתחומי עיסוקה. באמצעות עיקרון זה החברה מבטיחה לקדם ולהוביל פרויקטים להצלחה טכנולוגית וברווחיות מקסימלית עבור לקוחותיה.


כחלק מפעילות החברה מוצע ללקוחות שירות ניהול ופיקוח, שם ניסיונה של החברה בפרויקטים שביצעה בפועל בא לידי ביטוי בשמירה על איכות המוצר וההתקנה, עמידה בתקני בטיחות מחמירים, שימוש במכשירים המתקדמים ביותר והטמעת הרכיבים האיכותיים ביותר שניתן למצוא, והכל בכפוף לתכנון המוקפד שאינו משאיר מקום לספקות בשטח.

חברת חוד אנרגיה מחזיקה בידע, ניסיון ואמצעי בקרה מתקדמים המבטיחים אינטגרציה (טכנית וכלכלית) מושלמת בין כלל המערכות השונות הקיימות באתר. בכך החברה מונעת טעויות המסכנות את הפרויקט, ההשקעה ומודל הרווחיות העתידי.

Name: NORDIC SYSTEMS Kft.
Description:
A Nordic Systems Kft-nél elkötelezettek vagyunk az innovatív és fenntartható energiarendszerek iránt. Napelemes rendszerekre specializálódtunk, és csúcsminőségű szolgáltatásokat nyújtunk a napelemek telepítésében, karbantartásában és energia menedzsmentben, mind lakossági, mind kereskedelmi ügyfelek számára.

Küldetésünk, hogy a vállalkozásokat és az otthonokat arra ösztönözzük, hogy megújuló energiát használjanak, csökkentsék szén-dioxid-kibocsátásukat és érjék el az energiafüggetlenséget. Hiszünk egy olyan jövőben, ahol a tiszta energia mindenki számára elérhető, és fáradhatatlanul dolgozunk azért, hogy ezt a víziót valósággá tegyük.

Mit kínálunk? 

- Átfogó napelemes megoldások: Az első konzultációtól és rendszertervezéstől kezdve a telepítésen át a folyamatos karbantartásig teljes körű szolgáltatásokat nyújtunk a napelemes rendszerek optimális teljesítménye és hatékonysága érdekében.
- Csúcstechnológia: A legújabb napelemes technológiát alkalmazzuk, hogy magas hatékonyságú, tartós és esztétikailag is vonzó napelemes megoldásokat kínáljunk.
- Szakértői csapat: Magasan képzett szakemberekből álló csapatunk elkötelezett amellett, hogy kivételes szolgáltatást és támogatást nyújtson, biztosítva, hogy minden projekt a legmagasabb színvonalon valósuljon meg.

Miért válasszon minket?
- Személyre szabott megoldások:Megértjük, hogy minden ügyfélnek egyedi igényei vannak. Egyedi megoldásainkat úgy terveztük, hogy megfeleljenek a specifikus energiaigényeknek és maximalizálják a megtakarításokat.
- Fenntarthatóság: Szenvedélyesen védjük a környezetet. A Nordic Systems Kft. választásával hozzájárul egy zöldebb, fenntarthatóbb jövőhöz.
- Ügyfél elégedettség: Ügyfeleink a legfontosabbak számunkra. Arra törekszünk, hogy hosszú távú kapcsolatokat építsünk ki, amelyek alapja a bizalom, átláthatóság és kölcsönös siker.
Napelem, Inverter, Légkondicionáló, Napelem akkumulátor, Smartflower, Hőszivattyú

Name: Bliss Solar, LLC
Description:
Bliss Solar LLC develops and delivers commercial solar PV and battery storage projects that reduce operating costs, improve asset value, and maximize available tax incentives.

We work with commercial property owners, manufacturers, distributors, logistics companies, food processing and storage facilities, retail corporations, property management firms, and commercial real estate professionals. • Energy and financial feasibility analysis

• Utility interconnection and compliance
• Ongoing performance monitoring and support

Name: Carbon Neutral Energy

Navnet Carbon Neutral Energy betyder, at vi skaber balance mellem CO2-udslippet og absorberingen af CO2 fra atmosfæren. Vores mission er at gøre din virksomheds energiforbrug CO2-neutralt eller måske endda klimapositiv gennem at reducere CO2-udslippet og kompensere for de udledninger, der ikke kan reduceres, gennem effektive CO2-kompensationsprojekter. Det kan være skovrejsningsprojekter eller internationale udviklingsprojekter, som reducerer udledningen i andre lande og overfører reduktionerne til din egen virksomheds CO2-regnskab.

Name: Spectrum Energy Systems Ltd
Description:
We design, install, and maintain solar PV systems that deliver real returns for businesses and homeowners across the East Midlands.

Since 2011, we've connected over 10 MW of solar capacity, helping organisations reduce energy costs, improve resilience, and meet sustainability goals through properly engineered renewable energy solutions.

WHAT WE DO

We're MCS-accredited solar installers offering complete project delivery:

- Site surveys and feasibility assessments
- System design optimised for your usage patterns
- DNO applications and G98/G99 grid approvals
- Professional installation by NICEIC-certified electricians
- Commissioning, monitoring, and ongoing maintenance

Whether you need a 4kW domestic installation or a 500kW commercial array, we handle the technical complexity so you can focus on the benefits.

WHO WE SERVE

Commercial & Industrial: Warehouses, factories, offices, agriculture, logistics, retail, schools, and multi-site portfolios across Nottinghamshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire, and Lincolnshire.

Domestic: Homeowners seeking solar panels, battery storage, EV charging integration, and smart energy management.

OUR APPROACH

We're manufacturer-agnostic, which means we specify components based on your needs—not sales targets. Every system includes documented commissioning, performance monitoring setup, and transparent maintenance support.

Typical commercial clients see 4-7 year payback periods with 15-25% ROI, though actual returns depend on usage, tariffs, and system size.

WHY EXPERIENCE MATTERS

Solar installations require proper electrical design, structural assessment, grid compliance, and ongoing performance management. We've spent 14 years mastering these details across hundreds of projects.

Ready to explore solar for your property or portfolio?

Of het nu gaat om het ontwerpen en installeren van zonnepanelensystemen op grote bedrijfspanden, het implementeren van energieopslagsystemen voor optimale energiebeheer, of het leveren van efficiënte airco-oplossingen voor comfortabele werkomgevingen, Rasolar staat klaar om te helpen.

Onze klantgerichte aanpak en toewijding aan kwaliteit zorgen ervoor dat we altijd streven naar de hoogste tevredenheid van onze zakelijke klanten. We zorgen voor een naadloze uitvoering van projecten, waarbij we expertise combineren met innovatieve technologieën en hoogwaardige producten.

Sluit je aan bij Rasolar en zet vandaag de stap naar duurzame energie voor jouw bedrijf. Neem contact met ons op om te ontdekken hoe we jouw onderneming kunnen transformeren met onze uitgebreide dienstverlening en installatie-expertise.

W działania naszej spółki wpisana jest także dzierżawa działek i gruntów użytkowych z przeznaczeniem na budowę farm fotowoltaicznych.

Wykonujemy inwestycje PV w oparciu o moduły i komponenty własnej produkcji naszej spółki-siostry, Bruk-Bet Fotowoltaika. Na nasze moduły fotowoltaiczne obowiązuje 20 lat gwarancji na produkt i do 30 lat gwarancji na moc.

Specjalizacje:
- profesjonalne doradztwo - od doboru komponentów przez cały proces inwestycyjny;
- opieka posprzedażowa, serwisowa; 
- dzierżawa gruntów na budowę farm fotowoltaicznych.

Chętnie dzielimy się wiedzą w ramach Polskiej Akademii Fotowoltaicznej, mamy też duże doświadczenie w budowie farm fotowoltaicznych oraz obrocie energią.

We richten ons nu nog hoofdzakelijk op het verduurzamen van de energievoorziening, maar staan in de volle breedte achter verduurzamingsinitiatieven in de stad. We zijn in ontwikkeling naar een duurzaamheidscoöperatie.

Leden van onze coöperatie werken actief of inactief mee aan onze projecten. De één is vrijwilliger en helpt met planning, onderhoud en realisatie van de zonneprojecten, terwijl de ander enkel door zijn financiële participatie de coöperatie steunt en een duurzamer Enschede daarmee mede mogelijk maakt. Voor iedereen die verduurzaming belangrijk vindt is er plek bij ons. We vinden het belangrijk om de drempel zo laag mogelijk te houden zodat iedereen mee kan doen met de noodzakelijke energietransitie die we nu doormaken. We zijn meer dan een normale duurzame energiecoöperatie, want we organiseren ook leuke workshops en excursies over duurzaamheid. Je kan dus écht op allerlei manieren meedoen als je dat wil.

Je komt makkelijk in contact met ons. Loop eens binnen bij ons kantoor aan de Boulevard 1945 nummer 276. Dat is tussen Pizzeria La Candela en makelaar Thoma-Post. Natuurlijk kan mailen of bellen ook. info@enschede-energie.nl of tel. 053 - 20 30 427.

Name: GLSG Solar Australia Pty Ltd
Description:
GLSG Solar Australia Pty Ltd ("GLSG") is an experienced Solar PV and Energy storage project integrator, delivering high quality and affordable EPC and O&M services in the Australian market. GLSG is based in Brisbane, Queensland with capability to execute projects nationwide. The company was established in 2017 as a Joint Venture between the German EPC company GILDEMEISTER energy solutions GmbH (now STEAG SENS) and the Austrian EPC company LSG Group with a combined solar project experience of more than 1 GW worldwide.

The local team of talented multi-national and multi-skilled solar professionals has the ability to cover all project requirements including project development, electrical, mechanical and civil engineering, procurement and logistics, construction, project management, commissioning and testing as well as operation and maintenance.  

GLSG has successfully completed the construction of two solar farm projects in Queensland with a combined capacity of 55 MWp and is working on a project pipeline of close to 500 MW of solar projects all across Australia. 

Get in touch to find out how we can support you with your project:

E-Mail: hello@g-lsg.com

Name: Volting Energy Solutions
Description:
Een continu complexer wordend energielandschap vraagt steeds vaker om complexe oplossingen. Voor zakelijke klanten en VvE’s levert Volting Energy Solutions innovatieve oplossingen door verder te kijken dan de standaardopties. Omdat wij oplossingsgericht ingesteld zijn en ervaring hebben met complexe opdrachten, zijn wij in staat om bijvoorbeeld zonnestroominstallaties op zwakke daken te installeren om nog veel meer oppervlak te kunnen benutten voor energieopwekking. Volting helpt jouw organisatie verduurzamen met behoud van een goed rendement. 

We bieden een totaalaanpak. Van een scherpe analyse, advies en ontwerp tot de plaatsing en onderhoud van zonnepanelen. En Volting kijkt verder. Waar nodig helpen we je met het realiseren van een geïntegreerd energiesysteem met energieopwekking, -opslag en -management. Oók daar waar terugleveren niet mogelijk is, denkt Volting graag mee over een oplossing.   

Volting is onderdeel van Carefos. Binnen Carefos werken specialistische bedrijven in onderhoud en renovatie samen. Allemaal bedrijven met jarenlange ervaring in hun vakgebied. Samen pakken we de verduurzaming van de complete buitenschil van gebouwen aan, om zo de klus van de toekomst te klaren. Samen verduurzamen, samen doen!

Name: Maysun Solar Sweden
Description:
Grundat 2008, Maysun Solar är specialiserat på att producera högkvalitativa solcellsmoduler kända för sin enastående prestanda och moderna design, som sömlöst integreras med olika arkitektoniska stilar. Vi utvecklar skräddarsydda lösningar anpassade till Europas unika geografiska och klimatförhållanden. Våra högtemperaturbeständiga IBC-, HJT- och TOPCon-solcellsmoduler, tillsammans med innovativa balkongkraftstationer för små hushåll, är mycket uppskattade av våra kunder.

Med över 16 års branscherfarenhet och flera auktoritativa certifieringar som TUV och CE, levererar Maysun Solar premiumprodukter inom solenergi med en årlig produktionskapacitet på 2 GW, vilket säkerställer en stabil leverans. Vi har 7 dotterbolag och 21 lokala lager i 7 länder, inklusive Tyskland, Frankrike och Italien, med ett försäljningsnätverk som täcker över 60 länder, vilket ger effektiv lokaliserad service och omfattande tekniskt stöd.

Maysun Solar är dedikerat till att maximera kundnyttan genom att erbjuda omfattande support både före och efter försäljning, skräddarsydd efter dina unika behov. Vi driver innovation inom solcellsteknik och stödjer aktivt den hållbara utvecklingen av global ren energi. Vi tror att hållbara strategier är nyckeln till att skapa en ljusare framtid för planeten och alla intressenter.

För de senaste modulpriserna eller frågor relaterade till solenergi, tveka inte att kontakta oss. Vi ser fram emot att hjälpa dig. Läs mer på https://www.maysunsolar.se/

Domeniile noastre de expertiză:
- Dezvoltarea de proiecte de energie solară (pentru autoconsum și investiții)
- Servicii IAC (inginerie, achiziții publice, construcții)
- Furnizarea de echipamente durabile, de înaltă calitate, pentru centralele solare
