Name: SolarFloat
Description:
We are the experts in solar on water, providing cost efficient, low maintenance commercial solar solutions that promote biodiversity.

Our unique floating system allows PV panels to be installed on unused areas of water, converting unutilised areas into profitable generators of renewable energy. 

Our system was developed to provide a simple and easy to maintain solution that creates a surplus energy output, and in which the PV panels & the supporting structures are durable for at least 30 years with minimal maintenance. 

Our proprietary system is built using a concrete support structure, creating a low maintenance installation that allows 25.29% of daylight to pass through the structure, maintaining the health of the water and aquatic life below.

Our system has a uniquely low profile - 40cm high compared to the average floating system height of 1.5m. This low profile height allows for harmonious integration of supporting structures into nature.

This concrete support structure results in uniquely low maintenance costs; avoiding the maintenance costs of land-based solar systems and energy loss of ‘soiling’ as well as the manual annual cleaning required by floating systems that are made using plastic support structures. 

Floating PV systems have increased generating efficiency due to the natural cooling effect of the water below the solar cells.

We look forward hearing from you > visit www.solarfloat.com for more information.

Visi
Integrasi aksi mewujudkan akselerasi transisi energi

Misi
1. Menjalankan bisnis di bidang jasa pemasangan Pembangkit Listrik Tenaga Surya sesuai dengan standar yang berlaku.

pengembangan teknologi berbasis tenaga surya.

THE QUALITY HOME SERVICES STORY
In 1985, Mr. Bart Richey and Ms. Donna Holstein saw a need for safe, clean water in the central valley. With a total of three employees, they started their business under the name of B & D Quality Water as an affiliate of RainSoft Water Treatment.

With a passion for providing excellent customer service to their clients, they soon became one of the Nation’s top 10 dealers.

As a home services business, we strive to provide top quality, state of the art products for our customers. Our business expanded to offer water filters, air purification units, tankless water heaters, whole house standby generators and solar energy options.

For over thirty years, our business has operated on the simple principle of “do unto others as you would have them do unto you.”

As a second generation, family-owned and operated business, we are deeply invested providing our customers with environmentally responsible products that can improve their quality of life.

Today, with 3 locations and over 150 employees working under the name of Quality Home Services, our business is thriving. Donna’s children, Joe, and Jill have taken over the roles of President and Vice President and look forward to carrying on their family’s legacy as the business continues to grow.

Name: Energy Support Services d.o.o.
Description:
Energy Support Services d.o.o. - pioniri u oblasti održavanja solarnih elektrana u Srbiji. Kroz inovacije i posvećenost, postali smo prva i jedina kompanija koja primenjuje revolucionaran pristup održavanju solarnih panela. Naša prednost leži u uvođenju specijalizovanog robota koji osigurava visok nivo efikasnosti i bezbednosti, čime postavljamo nove standarde u industriji.

Jedinstvenost naše usluge ogleda se u specijalizovanom robotu koji smo prvi doneli u Srbiju. Ovaj robot eliminiše rizik od strujnog udara i pada sa krova osoblja zaduženog za održavanje solarne elektrane, čineći ovaj zadatak potpuno sigurnim čime zajedno postižemo garantovano i optimalno funkcionisanje elektrane, kao i njen dugotrajan rad sa minimalnim gubicima tokom eksploatacije.

Naša posvećenost efikasnosti ne poznaje kompromise. U uslovima bezbednosti koje omogućava naš specijalizovani robot, obezbeđujemo maksimalnu proizvodnju električne energije bez gubitaka. Dodatno, pridržavamo se strogih standarda proizvođača solarnih panela, čime garantujemo da će naše održavanje biti u potpunosti usklađeno s preporukama i zahtevima proizvođača, osiguravajući dugovečnost i optimalne performanse svake solarne elektrane koju održavamo.

Našu profesionalnost mogu da potvrde brojni klijenti sa kojima smo već sarađivali na prostoru jugoistočne Evrope. A uskoro ćete se možda na listi referenci naći i Vi!

Name: Renewables DC
Description:
Europe's energy sector is being reshaped. By 2050 EU is planing to achieve absolute climate neutrality and by 2030 at least 55% of the Co2 Emmisions shall be reduced. Thus, the renewable energy is the key into the succesfull completion of this goal. We believe that we can make your project happened by combining legal project management backgourd alongside technical expertiese. We believe that the smart choices are the correct ones. 

Our services are mainly: 

The Technical and legal Due Diligence focuses on the project related technical and legal issues related to the development of renewable energy project in Bulgaria. Under the scope of this survey falls evaluation of  the expected production of the renewable project, evaluation of the intended technical solution, the compliance of the electrical and grid connection design with the applicable legal framework, the needed authorisations and respective permits, the land rights of the plots. 

Legal Due Diligence targets the legal and compliance risks related to the project intention - from the real estate matters, troughout the corporate aspects relating to the project companies, financing, JV's and others up until the license and permit matrix for the project and their evaluation in respect to securing of the financing of the projects. 

The legal DD also suggests analysis of the full project permit matrix, including applicable environmental procedures which are from major importance in the project development.  Thiis part of the DD  coveres also the review of agreements  between the asset holding company (SPV) and a third parties, so that the risks of the investior in his relation with developers, EPC, OE or financing third parties are being properly analyzed. 

Real Estate Due Diligence is one of the most important parts of the Legal due diligence report. Here we review any contract concluded with the aim of securing the land on which the project will be located (purchase and sale of land, superficies etc).

Das Tenka Power Ecosystem bietet eine effiziente und innovative Lösung, die auf die Bedürfnisse der Kunden abgestimmt ist. Tenka Power Ecosystem 
- All from a single source!

The Tenka Ecosystem offers a harmonious blend of efficiency and innovation, tailored to meet customer needs. Its integrated approach ensures seamless compatibility across all components, from solar panels to energy storage. This synergy not only simplifies installation and maintenance but also optimizes energy production and usage. Customers benefit from a streamlined, high-performance system that maximizes renewable energy utilization, reducing both costs and environmental impact.

The system's smart energy management enables real-time monitoring and control, providing insights into energy consumption and production. This leads to enhanced energy efficiency and significant savings on utility bills. Additionally, the ecosystem’s scalability allows for futur expansion, adapting to evolving energy needs while maintaining ist commitment to sustainability and customer satisfaction.

Name: PYR Energy
Description:
PYR Energy drives the energy transition of companies in Mexico through integrated solar energy solutions, battery storage, and thermal energy systems, designed to reduce operating costs and emissions without compromising capital.

We are a Mexican company, founded by entrepreneurs with over 10 years of experience in the solar industry in Mexico, with more than 30 MW installed across industrial and commercial projects nationwide.

We design, finance, install, and operate industrial photovoltaic systems, energy storage solutions (BESS), and thermal energy systems for gas savings — including solar water heaters and solar collectors — under flexible schemes such as Zero-CapEx, Power Purchase Agreements (PPA), and EPC, tailored to each company’s needs.

Our approach combines specialized engineering, proven technology, and innovative financial models, enabling our clients to:

• Reduce energy costs
• Decarbonize their operations
• Achieve ESG targets
• Secure predictable long-term energy costs

We support each project end-to-end: technical and financial analysis, design, permitting, installation, operation, maintenance, and continuous monitoring, ensuring performance, reliability, and operational continuity.

 At PYR Energy, we don’t sell panels.
We build savings, energy resilience, and real decarbonization — without decapitalizing businesses.

Name: Eirsolar
Description:
Renewable Energy Company - Supply and Installation of Solar Systems in Domestic, Commercial and Agri settings. 

 Our journey began with a shared vision between two friends, Sean and Ian, who brought their unique skills together to create Eirsolar.

Sean, with his extensive background as an electrician working with electrical contractors here and on the continent, has 5 years hands-on experience in installing solar systems in domestic, commercial and agri settings. Sean has always been passionate about green energy and in addition to being a Safe Electric Registered Electrical Contractor he  has completed two QQI level 6 courses in solar installations. His commitment to renewable energy and dedication to providing top-notch installations laid the foundation for Eirsolar.

On the business front, Ian, a Chartered Accountant and Chartered Tax Advisor, has navigated the complexities of some of the world’s largest organisations. With a keen eye for detail and a strategic mindset, Ian recognised the immense potential for solar energy not only as an eco-friendly solution but also as a wise financial investment. His expertise ensures that our customers not only contribute to a sustainable planet but also enjoy the economic benefits of solar energy.

Together, Sean and Ian combined their skills, forming Eirsolar to offer a holistic approach to solar solutions. From meticulous installation processes to advising our customers through the grant process, our dynamic duo ensures that every customer receives a tailored, efficient, and cost-effective solar solution.

At Eirsolar, we believe in more than just providing solar panels; we are committed to empowering individuals and businesses to make a positive impact on the environment while reaping the financial rewards of sustainable energy. Join the fast growing community of green energy enthusiasts on our journey towards a brighter, cleaner future, where solar energy makes a significant contribution.

Name: Solar Rooftop Investment
Description:
Benefits of Investing in Solar Rooftop Energy for Your Factory
1. Significant Cost Savings: 
Reduced Energy Bills: Solar rooftop panels harness clean, renewable energy from the sun, decreasing your dependence on grid electricity and resulting in substantial cost savings over time.
Long-Term Investment: Solar systems have a long lifespan and require minimal maintenance, providing consistent savings for decades.
2. Environmental Responsibility:
Carbon Footprint Reduction: Solar energy is clean and green, reducing your factory's carbon footprint and helping combat climate change.
Environmental Compliance: Solar energy aligns with sustainability goals and demonstrates your factory's commitment to environmental responsibility.
3. Energy Independence:
Grid Stability: Solar power provides a reliable source of energy, reducing the vulnerability of your operations to grid outages or fluctuations.
Peak Load Management: Solar can be integrated with energy storage solutions to efficiently manage peak energy demands.
4. Brand Enhancement:
Corporate Image: Solar energy adoption enhances your company's image and attracts environmentally conscious customers and partners.
Marketing Opportunities: Solar investments can be highlighted in your marketing strategy, showcasing your dedication to sustainability.
5. Increased Property Value:
Property Appreciation: Solar installations increase the overall value of your property, making it more attractive to potential buyers or lessees.
Lease Revenue: If you lease your facility, offering on-site solar energy generation can create an additional revenue stream.
6. Regulatory Compliance:
Meeting Standards: Solar energy usage may help your factory meet renewable energy or environmental standards required by local authorities or clients.

Name: Everguard Solar Energy, LLC
Description:
Empowering Albuquerque with Renewable Energy
Solar energy has become increasingly affordable over the past few decades, and this trend is expected to continue in the coming years. One of the primary reasons for this trend is the falling cost of solar panels, which has made it a more viable option for both residential and commercial use. In fact, the cost of solar panels has dropped by around 90% since 2010, making it one of the most cost-effective forms of energy available today.

Additionally, advances in technology have also played a significant role in reducing the cost of solar power. For example, new manufacturing techniques have improved the efficiency of solar panels, allowing them to generate more energy from the same amount of sunlight. This has helped to drive down the cost of solar power, making it even more accessible to households and businesses around the world.

As the cost of solar energy continues to fall, it is likely that it will become an even more important part of the global energy mix. Not only is solar power clean and renewable, but it also has the potential to provide affordable energy to people in even the most remote areas of the world. This could help to drive economic growth and improve quality of life for millions of people around the world.

Name: Zonergy Global
Description:
Established in 2007, Zonergy Corporation (hereinafter as “Zonergy”) is a national level high-tech enterprise specialized in smart microgrid integrated solutions with a world reputation. Zonergy has been committed to providing global customers with first-class smart microgrid solutions covering R&D, production, sales and trade, project design and implementation, energy management and optimization of complementary utilization of energy in various forms as wind energy, solar energy, hydro-energy as well as energy storage, charging, etc. After years of development, Zonergy is well-equipped with technical expertise and project experience. With the first class R&D team, project implementation team and market exploration team, Zonergy is enabled to develop business in most parts of the home country, in overseas countries along “the Belt and Road”, and those in Europe through providing customers with premium quality microgrid solutions and services.

In recent years, the complete industrial chain, high-level R&D team and strong strategic alliance boosted its business scale of off-grid  solar power storage smart microgrid projects among the tops in the world. Zonergy, meanwhile, has developed a leading capacity for technical solutions and implementation in the industry. On this basis, it has its long term plan in solar power storage smart microgrid deployed through successive establishment of R&D and production base in Zigong,  Research Institutes in Shenzhen and Chegndu. Specifically, the R&D Institute in Shenzhen was established for the research of sodium ion battery cells and BMS. Among them, Zigong R&D and Production Base covers an area of about 140 mu. In 2020, it was awarded the “Engineering and Technology Research Centre for Smart Microgrid with Solar Power Storage, Sichuan” issued by Science and Technology Department of Sichuan Province. In 2021, the project was successfully selected as one of “Major Projects jointly-constructed by Sichuan and Chongqing”.

Name: Anesco Netherlands & Belgium
Description:
Anesco ontwikkelt grootschalige zonneparken en batterijopslag. Dit doen we samen met grondbezitters en investeerders. Grootschalige duurzame energieprojecten zijn complex, daarom nemen wij alle zorg uit handen. We zorgen voor de ontwikkeling, de bouw, het onderhoud en de optimalisatie. 
 
We maken al sinds 2010 de energietransitie mogelijk. Inmiddels hebben we 100 zonneparken en 30 batterij-opslagfaciliteiten ontwikkeld. De basis van ons werk ligt in het Verenigd Koninkrijk. Dit breiden we nu uit naar meerdere landen in Europa, waaronder Nederland.
 
We zijn actief op zoek naar grond voor de ontwikkeling van zonneparken en batterijlocaties. Als we grond van je huren, levert dit rendement op én draag je bij aan een robuust, duurzaam energiesysteem. Wij bieden een vaste, gegarandeerde grondvergoeding per kwartaal of jaar.
 
Graag maken wij op basis van een eerste quickscan een vrijblijvende prijsindicatie voor de jaarlijkse grondvergoeding. Vul dit formulier (link naar formulier op de website) in en we nemen binnen 1 werkdag contact met je op.
 
Samen maken we grootschalige duurzame energieopslag mogelijk. Doe je mee?

Transparent solar panels proposed by us will be cheaper and more effective as they are based on zinc oxide. Due to transparency, surfaces will be used as both sources of electricity and windows. Name: Groene-Woningen
Description:
YellowNRG is een onderneming die zich bezig houdt met duurzame energie concepten. Als groothandel en importeur haalt YellowNRG innovatieve concepten naar de Benelux die van toegevoegde waarde zijn om het energieverbruik van bedrijven en particulieren, inzichtelijk te maken en te verlagen. Duurzaamheid en beproefde kwaliteit met uitmuntende garanties staan daarbij voorop.

YellowNRG ontwikkelt concepten die een verschil kunnen maken en zorgt er voor dat duurzame energie steeds toegankelijker wordt voor iedereen. Door uitgekiende samenwerkingsverbanden met strategische partners lopen wij voorop in oplossingen voor de complexe vraagstukken en fiscaliteiten omtrent het verduurzamen van onze klanten. Zo worden kennis, kunde en de juiste producten voor ieder vraagstuk bij elkaar gebracht tot een duurzame en efficiënte oplossing.

Wij hebben in 2014 de Handelsnaam Groene-Woningen overgenomen. Deze Handelsnaam zal gebruikt worden om een installatie tak mee op te bouwen waar particulieren en het MKB kennis en kunde in kunnen kopen omtrent het verduurzamen van hun woning of bedrijf. Alles tussen het dak en de kruipruimte kent zijn eigen verduurzamingsmogelijkheden. Groene-Woningen helpt u met advies en uitstekende producten.

YellowNRG wordt gedreven vanuit de PPP filosofie (People, Planet, Profit). Van daaruit is zijn een van de mede oprichters van het platform WWW.20DUURZAAM20.NL

Door onze partnerships hebben we een breed dienstenpakket voor particulieren, bedrijven, verenigingen & stichtingen, VVE's, winkelcentra en de complexere financieringsprojecten voor o.a. ESCO's en Energie (inkoop) Coöperaties

Bent u geïnteresseerd om de producten en diensten van YellowNRG te verkopen, of zit u met een complexe fiscale structuur waarbinnen duurzaamheid neergezet moet worden, dan bent u bij ons op het juiste adres.

Name: MOB Engenharia
Description:
A MOB Engenharia é especializada em projetos elétricos e projetos de instalações elétricas em BIM, atuando em empreendimentos de médio e grande porte em todo o Brasil.

Nosso foco é o desenvolvimento de projeto elétrico completo, com modelagem em BIM, garantindo compatibilização entre disciplinas, redução de retrabalho em obra e maior previsibilidade de custos e prazos para construtoras, engenheiros e arquitetos.

Principais áreas de atuação:
• Projetos elétricos prediais, residenciais, comerciais e industriais
• Projetos de instalações elétricas em BIM
• SPDA – Sistemas de Proteção contra Descargas Atmosféricas
• Projetos de subestação aérea e abrigada
• Empreendimentos com Múltiplas Unidades Consumidoras (EMUC)
• Projetos de energia fotovoltaica
• Cabeamento estruturado e CFTV (quando desejar manter/incluir)
• Laudos e vistorias de instalações elétricas e de SPDA
• Laudo de qualidade de energia
• Estudos de viabilidade para instalação de pontos de recarga de veículos elétricos


A MOB Engenharia desenvolve projeto elétrico em BIM para:
• Obras privadas: edifícios residenciais, corporativos, comerciais, industriais e logísticos
• Obras públicas e licitações, incluindo:
  – Hospitais e edificações da área de saúde
  – Linhas de metrô e trem
  – Institutos federais, universidades e escolas técnicas
  – Prédios públicos, Tribunais de Justiça, Ministério Público e outras instituições


Atendemos principalmente construtoras, escritórios de arquitetura, engenheiros eletricistas, engenheiros civis e gestores de obras que buscam:
• Projeto elétrico em BIM com alto nível de detalhamento
• Compatibilização com arquitetura, estrutura e demais sistemas
• Conformidade com normas técnicas e exigências de órgãos públicos e concessionárias

Nosso compromisso é entregar projetos elétricos seguros, eficientes e aderentes às normas, utilizando BIM como ferramenta estratégica para planejamento, execução e gestão de obras.

Description:

With a focus on innovative technologies, exceptional customer service, and environmental stewardship, our company aims to make the transition to solar energy seamless and cost-effective for our customers.

Services:
Residential Solar Installations:
We offer customized solar solutions for homeowners, ensuring a smooth transition to solar energy. Our expert team assesses energy needs, designs tailored solar systems, handles installation, and provides post-installation support.

Commercial and Industrial Solar Solutions:
M&L Solar Systems specializes in large-scale solar installations for businesses and industries. We conduct comprehensive energy audits, design efficient solar systems, and manage installations, enabling businesses to reduce energy costs and enhance sustainability efforts.

Off-Grid and Hybrid Systems:
Our company provides off-grid and hybrid solar systems for remote locations or areas with unreliable grid access. These solutions incorporate battery storage and backup generators, ensuring a continuous power supply even in challenging environments.

Solar Maintenance:
We offer routine maintenance services to ensure the optimal performance of installed solar systems. Our technicians conduct regular inspections, clean solar panels, and address any issues promptly. 

Energy Storage Solutions:  
We offer advanced energy storage solutions, including battery systems and smart energy management technologies. These systems store excess energy generated during the day for use during periods of low sunlight, maximizing energy utilization and cost savings.

Our commitment extends beyond our clients. We live and raise our families here in Sarasota County, are deeply invested in our community, actively supporting local organizations, advocating for sustainable policies, and promoting energy education. We believe in fostering a greener future for Florida, one installation at a time.

At RSE, we operate on core principles: client focus, continuous improvement, community engagement, and 100% accountability. Name: secursun GmbH
Description:
SECURSUN – has been established as a joint venture, the merger of SUNOTEC, European market leader in the construction of large-scale photovoltaic (PV) solar plants, and the project developer securenergy solutions AG combining the specialist expertise of both companies. We have merged both project development and constructions skills at the highest possible level from early stage development to COD in a perfectly synchronized value chain. Hence our claim: Synergy for Energy

As general contractor, SUNOTEC offers all services related to the construction of large-scale PV solar plants: from mechanical and civil engineering services to electrical installations, quality control, procurement, logistics and project management. Founded in 2012, the company operates worldwide and has completed more than 300 turnkey ground-mounted PV installations with a capacity of over 4.3 gigawatts in 16 countries. SUNOTEC employs more than 880 people and currently operates from its offices in Sofia, Bulgaria and Munich, Germany.
Since 2019, Berlin-based securenergy solutions AG has been primarily dedicated to the project development of open-space PV systems in Germany and the Dominican Republic. At this point, the company is looking at a pipeline of around 4.5 gigawatts which is continuously growing. 

Our Goal by 2026
Jointly develop, build, successfully connect to the grid, and operate renewable generation plants.
843,400 Avoidance of CO2 emissions in t/a (compared to a coal-fired power plant). By 2026, SECURSUN will realize renewable energy plants with a total capacity of at least one gigawatt. The solar parks will be connected to the grid and operated by SECURSUN.  The portfolio consists of currently 76 photovoltaic projects with individual project sizes ranging from 2 to 220 
megawatts with estimated completion dates between 2023 and 2026. The majority of the projects are to be operated on a PPA (power purchase agreement) basis.

Name: Solarwashing
Description:
Het reinigen van zonnepanelen is een verstandige keuze. Het rendement van zonnepanelen valt snel terug bij vervuiling. Zelfs als niet het hele dak vervuild is. Zonnepanelen worden namelijk altijd in serie geschakeld. Is er één vervuild, dan valt het rendement in z’n geheel terug. Kortom: “de installatie is zo krachtig als het vuilste paneel”.

Solarwashing is de specialist op het gebied van het reinigen van zonnepanelen. Uitgerust met reinigingsrobots en een hoogwerker reinigen wij elke installatie snel en efficiënt.

Daarbij gebruiken we het zogenaamde osmosewater, wat we zelf filteren. We sluiten de reinigingsinstallatie gewoon aan op uw kraan. Voordat we gaan reinigen filteren we eerst kalk, zout en mineralen uit het water. Zo zijn we zeker van een kalkvrij en streeploos eindresultaat.

Vervolgens besturen we de robot op afstand met een bereik van wel 100 meter. De meeste klussen klaren we vanuit één en dezelfde positie. Kortom: efficiënt en effectief. Nodig ons gerust uit om een prijsopgave te maken!

Name: ValfryX
Description:
Quiénes somos (y quiénes NO somos):

No somos una asesoría energética. Tampoco una comercializadora. Ni unos frikis de los vatios que instalan placas los fines de semana.

Somos ValfryX: el Partner de Ejecución Energética que convierte tu gasto en una ventaja competitiva.

¿Te suena raro? Pues acostúmbrate, porque lo raro es que sigas sin control y pagando facturas a ciegas.

Nuestra Misión (Cómo lo hacemos):

Atacamos tu factura desde tres frentes. Sin piedad.

1. EJECUTAMOS Proyectos de Autoconsumo (EPC): La forma más rápida de anular tu factura es generar tu propia energía.

Modelo PPA (Cero Inversión): ¿Quieres una planta fotovoltaica en tu tejado sin pagar un euro? Somos el socio EPC (Contratista) de uno de los mayores fondos energéticos . Ellos financian, nosotros diseñamos, construimos y aseguramos la máxima calidad.


Modelo CAPEX (Compra Directa): ¿Prefieres ser el dueño de tu instalación? Perfecto. La diseñamos y ejecutamos de llave en mano.

2. DISTRIBUIMOS Almacenamiento (Baterías): Acabamos de "hackear" el mercado. Somos distribuidores oficiales de uno de los mayores fabricantes industriales del mundo (un gigante de 9.000 millones de euros) que acaba de aterrizar en Europa con su tecnología de almacenamiento.

Para Empresas: Añadimos baterías a tu proyecto (nuevo o existente) con precios de derribo. El ROI se dispara.

Para Profesionales (B2B): Si eres instalador o ingeniería, contáctanos. Tenemos precios de distribuidor que te darán el margen que has perdido.

3. OPTIMIZAMOS la Red (Plataforma smab360): Para la energía que sigues comprando. smab360 es nuestra tecnología de gestión. Una suscripción que te da:


Visibilidad Total: Vemos lo que tu comercializadora no quiere que veas .



Auditoría de Facturas: Detectamos errores, penalizaciones y costes ocultos .




Optimización de Contratos: Nos aseguramos de que siempre tengas la mejor tarifa posible .


Lo que NUNCA haremos:

✘ No comisionamos con tu factura. Nuestra lealtad es 100% tuya. ✘ No desapa

•	Analyse et ajustement éventuel des clés de répartition

Principales missions d’AMO 
•	Etude d’opportunité et de faisabilité
•	Analyse du potentiel sur la totalité de votre patrimoine ou d'un site
•	Identification des contraintes techniques et administratives 
•	Evaluation du productible 
•	Projections financières, enjeux techniques, juridiques et financiers
•	Assistance aux démarches administratives d'autorisation
•	Mise en relation avec les prestataires: Financiers / tiers investisseurs / Maîtres d'œuvre / Installateurs / Maintenance

¿A quién ayudamos?

- Empresas con altos consumos energéticos como logísticas, empresas del sector de refrigeración, hoteles y residencias, etc.

- Empresas con grandes áreas disponibles, como techos y suelos, que pueden convertirse en una nueva fuente de ingresos.

¿Qué beneficios obtendrás?

 Reducción inmediata de los costes energéticos en hasta un 40%, aumentando el margen operativo y liberando recursos para otras áreas estratégicas.
 Estabilidad en los costes energéticos a largo plazo, facilitando una planificación financiera más precisa y sin riesgo de fluctuaciones.
 Cumplimiento con estándares de sostenibilidad, mejora en la reputación corporativa y elegibilidad para incentivos fiscales y financieros.
 Seguridad y confianza en la inversión, con proyecciones claras de ahorro energético y un ROI visible en menos de 5 años.
 Transición fluida a la nueva tecnología, sin impacto en las operaciones diarias, con soporte post-venta garantizado.

Nuestros Servicios:

- Autoconsumo Industrial: Soluciones llave en mano para reducir costes energéticos.

Description:

Nous intervenons sur une large gamme de prestations : installation de panneaux photovoltaïques en autoconsommation ou en revente, systèmes avec batteries de stockage, onduleurs, carports et ombrières photovoltaïques, bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques, trackers solaires ainsi que solutions domotiques pour optimiser la gestion de l’énergie. Mon Installateur Solaire est certifié RGE QualiPV, avec une capacité d’installation jusqu’à 500 kVA, gage de sérieux, de conformité et d’éligibilité aux aides de l’État. Cette qualification permet d’assurer des installations respectant les normes les plus exigeantes du marché, tant sur le plan technique que réglementaire.

Afin de simplifier votre démarche, nous prenons également en charge l’intégralité des démarches administratives liées à votre projet : déclarations préalables, demandes de raccordement, dossiers Enedis, Consuel, aides et subventions. Vous bénéficiez ainsi d’un accompagnement complet, de l’étude initiale jusqu’à la mise en service de votre installation, en toute sérénité.

Entreprise de proximité, Mon Installateur Solaire place la transparence, la qualité et la satisfaction client au cœur de ses engagements, pour faire de votre transition énergétique un investissement fiable, durable et maîtrisé.

Name: PureVolt Solar
Description:
We're an independent Irish solar panel installation company based in Galway, Dublin and Cork. Solar is in our DNA, and we're on a mission to see solar panels installed on every roof in Ireland. That way, we can all save money and look after this little planet we all call home.

What we want - We want to see Ireland's homes and businesses switch to renewable energy sources. If that's with us, even better. We're long-term believers, not short-term speculators.

Our plan to get it - We exist to make it easier for people to make the switch to solar. We do this by giving crystal-clear, honest information and offering the level of service that we would expect ourselves. That's it.

What's in it for us - We want to see our business thrive and grow. But for us, it's about more than just that. Our ultimate goal is to help more people switch to solar so we can all live in a greener Ireland. That's why PureVolt exists and that's why we get up in the morning.

Wir nutzen unser Wissen und unsere Innovationen, um den maximalen Solarertrag aus Ihrer Anlage zu holen und die Kosten Ihrer Solarstromanlagen so weit zu senken, dass Anlagen letztendlich ohne Förderung gebaut werden können. Name: oursolarplan.co
Description:
OurSolarPlan.co is a leading solar education company that recognized a fundamental problem in the solar industry: the sales process. Most solar systems were being sold via high-pressure sales tactics and door-to-door knocking, leaving consumers feeling overwhelmed and often misinformed. OurSolarPlan.co saw an opportunity to change the game by offering a more educational and informative process that empowers homeowners to make the best decisions for their energy needs.

OurSolarPlan.co's approach to the solar industry is unique. We have made the process educational and informative, allowing homeowners to understand the benefits of solar energy and how it can fit their unique needs. By leveraging modern technologies like Zoom and Artificial Intelligence, we have taken a soft-sell approach that helps our customers feel more at ease and in control.

With our innovative approach, we provide our customers with a more transparent and personalized solar education experience. We start by conducting a virtual assessment of their home, utilizing artificial intelligence to analyze their energy usage and rooftop space, and then providing recommendations on the best solar system to fit their unique needs. Our team of solar experts then takes the time to explain how solar works, how to calculate savings, and how the installation process will proceed.

Our goal at OurSolarPlan.co is to help homeowners understand that going solar is a smart investment that can save them money, reduce their carbon footprint, and increase the value of their home. We believe that solar energy is the future, and we are committed to providing our customers with the information and tools they need to make an informed decision about switching to solar. So if you're ready to take control of your energy future, join us and let's start on a brighter path together.

Description:
A equipe Solar Marine Racing Team mais conhecida como SMaRT CEFET foi criada em 2014, no Centro Federal de Educação Tecnológica do Rio de Janeiro - Unidade Itaguaí, com o objetivo de desenvolver um barco movido a energia solar para participar da maior competição de barcos solares entre universidades do país, o Desafio Solar Brasil. Participamos nas edições de 2017 e 2018, chegando a ocupar o 9º lugar entre 18 participantes em nossa primeira competição. 

No nosso projeto, é possível colocar em prática os conhecimentos técnicos aprendidos na graduação, assim como entender e desenvolver tecnologias que possam ser utilizadas pelos moradores da região, que tem sua economia baseada predominantemente na pesca e outras utilizações do mar.

A fim de conquistar o nosso objetivo, a equipe é dividida em quatro setores: Operacional, Gestão de Pessoas, Marketing & Estratégia e Financeiro. Assim sendo possível a aplicação da Engenharia de Produção e Engenharia Mecânica, cursos da unidade, e também de treinamentos, workshops, minicursos e palestras para os participantes, para os demais alunos e para algumas escolas da região, contribuir para o desenvolvimento de conhecimentos tecnológicos dos membros e da sociedade.

DRS Energie Solaire, une référence incontestée dans le domaine de l'énergie solaire, se distingue par une expertise de plus de 15 ans, établissant son siège historique à Montpellier, au 83 Rte du Pont de Guerre, 34970 Lattes, France. Spécialisée dans l'installation de panneaux photovoltaïques, cette entreprise dynamique propose des solutions sur mesure qui s'adaptent parfaitement à chaque environnement.

Les services de DRS Energie Solaire ne se limitent pas aux toits, mais s'étendent à des installations variées telles que les carports et les auvents, démontrant son engagement envers l'esthétique et l'efficacité énergétique. En plus des panneaux solaires, l'entreprise propose également l'installation de chauffe-eau solaires, offrant une alternative écologique pour répondre aux besoins en eau chaude de ses clients.

Au cœur de la mission de DRS Energie Solaire se trouve l'idée d'autoconsommation. Les clients recherchent avant tout la réduction de leur facture énergétique mensuelle, et c'est là que l'expertise de l'entreprise entre en jeu. Grâce à des solutions sur mesure, DRS Energie Solaire offre à ses clients la possibilité d'exploiter au maximum l'énergie solaire photovoltaïque, assurant ainsi une indépendance énergétique sans sacrifier le confort.

Les artisans et techniciens qualifiés de DRS Energie Solaire sont les garants d'une installation sans faille. L'entreprise accorde une importance particulière à la qualité de chaque projet, assurant la durabilité et la performance optimale des panneaux solaires installés.

L'engagement de DRS Energie Solaire va au-delà de ses installations. Avec plus de 15 ans d'expérience, l'entreprise s'implique activement dans la sensibilisation environnementale.

Name: TDL Electrical Pty Ltd.
Description:
Commercial Solar Power Company located in Perth, WA. For all commercial solar enquiries contact our Director, Mark Taylor on 0401534470.

More power to you! That sounds confusing but its not. What we mean is we put the ‘power’ of the energy at the office back in your hands. Whether you are getting power from the sun or some clever technology, we can help you save on energy bills and help the environment.

It is our social responsibility at TDL Electrical to do our bit for the the environment and to help you do the same. The environment is important to everyone. We continue to research new energy solutions so that we, and our clients (you) strive to reduce our carbon footprints.

We provide all solar services to commercial premises in the Perth metro area and regional WA.

Our services include:

•	On grid solar panel installation;
•	Electrical safety; and
•	General electrical work.

We can also help if you are wanting to get completely off the grid or are in a remote location on the farm/station with an affordable energy solution tailored for your needs.

Name: Fortsolar Energy Solution

Welcome to Fort Solar Energy – Your Gateway to Sustainable Power Solutions!

At Fort Solar, we stand as a trailblazing force in the solar energy sector, committed to delivering high-impact, low-cost solar power solutions that redefine the way we harness and consume energy. With a keen focus on innovation, reliability, and environmental responsibility, we take pride in being a trusted partner on your journey towards a cleaner and more sustainable future.

 Why Choose Us?

At Fort Solar, we understand the transformative power of solar energy. We go beyond providing solar solutions; we empower businesses, institutions, and organizations to enhance their service delivery and operational efficiency through a continuous, reliable supply of solar power. Our commitment to excellence ensures that you not only save on electricity bills but also contribute to a greener planet.

Our vision at Fort Solar is crystal clear – to be the leading provider of innovative solar energy solutions. We aspire to make clean and affordable energy accessible to all, fostering energy independence, reducing carbon footprints, and contributing to a more sustainable future. By making solar power a practical and efficient choice, we aim to transform the way the world thinks about and utilizes energy resources.

Join us at Fort Solar Energy, where innovation meets sustainability, and together, let's illuminate a brighter, cleaner, and more energy-efficient future.

Name: IEC Solar
Description:
The first thing you’ll need to start capturing and converting the sun’s energy is a solar panel! Solar panels are made up of 100’s of photovoltaic cells that capture solar energy as DC current, and then transfer that energy through DC wiring to an inverter.


From the inverter, AC energy can be used to power your TV or charge your electric car. When your solar energy system is set up and running, the AC current first go to your fuse box, where it’s distributed throughout the house, and then to a battery or back to the electrical grid for your neighbors to use. There are far more moving pieces for more complex solar energy systems, but the concept is generally the same.

IEC provides survey, design, installation, and O&M services in the power industry.IEC is currently serving many residential and Commercial clients in Punjab Region.

Name: S-POWER
Description:
V rámci S-Power Business Solutions navrhujeme a realizujeme velké fotovoltaické systémy, bateriová úložiště a tepelná čerpadla samostatně nebo v kombinaci pro firmy, velké budovy a instituce. 

Naše nabídka služeb je široká a zahrnuje:

 Kompletní fotovoltaická řešení: Poskytujeme individuální přístup a řešení na míru pro každého klienta, od projekce po realizaci.

 Projekční činnost a engineering: Nabízíme samostatné projekční činnosti pro fotovoltaické elektrárny jako podklad pro přípravu budoucí realizace či výběrového řízení na realizaci FVE.

 Široké možnosti řízení a bateriová úložiště: Nabízíme inovativní možnosti řízení pro optimalizaci výkonu vaší fotovoltaické elektrárny. Nabízíme také řešení pro bateriová úložiště.

 Servis a projekční práce: Poskytujeme kompletní servis a údržbu, abychom zajistili, že vaše zařízení funguje efektivně a bezproblémově.

 Dotační poradenství: Společně s našimi partnery poskytujeme dotační poradenství a koordinaci celého projektu, aby byla zajištěna maximální možná podpora.

 Kompletní řešení na klíč: Zajišťujeme vše od získání stavebních povolení, licencí a registrace ERU/OTE apod. Ušetříme vám čas a energii, abyste se mohli soustředit na jiné aspekty vaší činnosti.

Pomáháme klientům při přechodu na udržitelnou energii a dosáhnout energetické nezávislosti prostřednictvím inovativních a efektivních fotovoltaických řešení.

Name: Genset & Solar Power Solutions
Description:
Founded in 2008, Genset & Solar is dedicated to delivering reliable, sustainable, and high-quality solar and backup power solutions across KZN. Over the past 15 years, we have built a reputation for excellence, working closely with residential, commercial, agricultural, and industrial clients to provide custom-designed systems tailored to their specific energy needs.

As a leader in the renewable energy market, Genset & Solar offers a full turn-key service, from the design and installation of photovoltaic (PV) solar power systems to integrated or stand-alone backup solutions. Our approach is focused on creating modular systems that allow for phased installation, ensuring power independence is both cost-effective and scalable.

We take pride in our unwavering commitment to superior design, premium quality products, and exceptional after-sales support. Our experience includes numerous successful projects for high-profile clients such as St Johns School, Mooi River Dairy Farm, Emond Auto, and Save Hyper.

In addition to our vast project portfolio, we are proud to be one of the few Tesla Accredited Installers in South Africa. We were the first company in KwaZulu-Natal to install the Tesla Powerwall in 2016 and have since completed nearly 100 installations of the Tesla Powerwall 2.

At Genset & Solar, our goal is to ensure that each system we design not only meets our clients' energy demands but also helps them achieve significant cost savings while embracing sustainable, green energy solutions.


Genset & Solar has established itself in the market over the last 14 years by providing superior design, quality products; exemplary after-sales service and a team who are dedicated to excellence;  but most importantly;  never compromising on quality.

In de komende 10 jaar moet de eerste 49% CO2 reductie al zijn gerealiseerd. Een enorme uitdaging waarbij uw bijdrage nodig is en wij u graag ondersteunen om de juiste beslissingen te nemen. 

De drie belangrijkste categorieën voor energiegebruik in ons land zijn: industrie 46%, gebouwde omgeving 28% en mobiliteit 20%. Wij richten ons op zakelijke klanten in de gebouwde omgeving (bedrijfspanden, publieke instanties, projectbouw) en mogelijk de daaraan gerelateerde industriefunctie en elektrische mobiliteit.
